The weak chromatic numbers of these hypergraphs are all equal to the order dimension of ${\mathbb{P}}$. Here are established upper bounds on the number of strict alternating cycles a poset ${\mathbb{P}}=(X,\leq)$ can have in terms of $n = |X|$, the cardinality of the groundset of ${\mathbb{P}}$, and the width $w$ of ${\mathbb{P}}$. These bounds also apply to the number of hyperedges of the associated hypergraph ${\mathcal{H}}^s(\mathbb{P})$, with incomparable pairs as vertices and strict alternating cycles dual to its hyperedges.
relevance_reason: Order dimension과 poset structure는 combinatorial geometry와 관련이 있지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, realizability 등과는 직접적 연관이 없음.
summary: Poset의 alternating cycle과 strict alternating cycle의 개수에 대한 Turán 유형의 상한을 확립한다. Poset의 incomparable element들과 critical pair들로 정의된 hypergraph의 weak chromatic number가 poset의 order dimension과 같음을 보인다.
technique: Hypergraph 색칠수(weak chromatic number)와 poset의 width를 이용한 조합론적 상한 도출

title: Lower bounds on non-central sections of isotropic convex bodies
abstract: For fixed $t_0 \in [0,\sqrt{3}]$ we give asymptotically sharp lower bounds on the quantity $L_K \text{vol}_{d-1}(K \cap H)$, where $H$ is a hyperplane at distance $t_0 L_K$ from the origin, $K$ is any symmetric isotropic convex body in $\mathbb{R}^d$, and $L_K$ stands for the isotropic constant of $K$.
relevance_reason: 고차원 볼록체의 단면(section) 기하학을 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 핵심인 convex position 점 배치, oriented matroid, 조합 구조와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 대칭 등방(isotropic) 볼록체 $K$에 대해, 원점으로부터 거리 $t_0 L_K$에 있는 초평면과의 교집합의 부피에 대한 점근적으로 정확한 하한을 제시한다. 등방 상수(isotropic constant) $L_K$를 활용한 고차원 볼록기하 분석이다.
technique: 이등방 볼록체의 측도론적 성질과 단면 부피 추정을 이용한 하한 도출.

title: Linkage problem on optimal $1$-planar graphs
abstract: Enami and Maezawa give a complete characterization of $(s_1, s_2, \ldots, s_k)$-linked planar graphs for any $k$-tuple of positive integers. In this paper, we investigate linkage problems for optimal 1-planar graphs. In particular, we show that every optimal 1-planar graph with connectivity $6$ is $(5, 5)$-linked. Moreover, for an optimal $1$-planar graph $G$ that is not $(2,2,1)$-linked, we characterize disjoint vertex subsets $S_1, S_2, S_3$ in $G$ with $|S_1|=|S_2|=2$ and $|S_3|=1$ such that $G$ is not $\{S_1,S_2,S_3\}$-linked.
relevance_reason: 1-planar graph의 linkage 문제는 McMullen's problem (점 배치, convex position, general position)과 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 1-평면 그래프(1-planar graph)의 연결성(linkage) 문제를 연구한다. 최적 1-평면 그래프(optimal 1-planar graph)에서 connectivity 6인 경우 (5,5)-linked임을 보이고, (2,2,1)-linked가 아닌 그래프들의 특성을 규명한다.
technique: 평면 그래프의 구조적 특성과 연결성 분석을 통한 linkage 문제의 직접적 증명.

title: Exploring the world of edge-chromatic 3-critical graphs
abstract: A graph $G$ with maximum degree $Δ$ is $Δ$-critical if it is connected, satisfies $χ'(G)=Δ+1$, and the deletion of any edge reduces its chromatic index to $Δ$. A $Δ$-critical graph $G$ is called nontrivial if it contains no $Δ$-overfull subgraph; that is, no $H \subseteq G$ such that $|E(H)| > Δ\lfloor |V(H)| /2 \rfloor$. There are no $1$-critical graphs, and the $2$-critical graphs are exactly the odd cycles. By work of Chetwynd and Yap from 1983, there is a unique nontrivial $3$-critical graph of order $9$, and exactly two nontrivial $3$-critical graphs of order $11$. In 2005, Bokal, Brinkmann, and Grünewald showed that there are exactly fourteen nontrivial $3$-critical graphs of order $13$. For even orders, Brinkmann and Steffen proved in 1997 that no $3$-critical graphs of even order exist below order $22$, there is exactly one 3-critical graph of order $22$, and that there are exactly nine $3$-critical graphs of order $24$.   To the best of our knowledge, there has been no further progress on the existence of nontrivial $3$-critical graphs of odd orders beyond the cases established two decades ago. In this paper, using computer-assisted search techniques, we determine the exact numbers of nontrivial $3$-critical graphs of odd orders from $15$ to $21$. The same data pipeline also reproduces the known order-$22$ count of Brinkmann and Steffen, with one nontrivial $3$-critical graph. Beyond enumeration, we prove a characterization theorem for all nontrivial 3-critical graphs, with one case based on snarks. We also provide an analysis of our search algorithm.
relevance_reason: Edge-chromatic criticality는 그래프 색칠 문제로, McMullen's problem의 점 배치·convex position과 직접적 관련성이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 최대 차수 Δ=3인 임계 그래프(3-critical graphs)의 존재성과 개수를 연구합니다. 컴퓨터 보조 탐색을 통해 홀수 차수 15~21에서 nontrivial 3-critical 그래프의 정확한 개수를 결정하고, 모든 nontrivial 3-critical 그래프에 대한 특성화 정리를 증명합니다.
technique: Computer-assisted exhaustive search와 그래프 특성화(characterization)를 결합한 체계적 열거 기법.

title: Discrete Space-Time Wave Kernels and Trace Identities on Regular Graphs
abstract: We study the discrete space-time wave equation on a $(q+1)$-regular graph $X$ associated with the affine Laplace-type operator. For the forward time-difference scheme we derive explicit formulas for the two fundamental solutions (wave kernels) in terms of discrete modified Bessel functions and the non-backtracking walk counts on $X$ thus providing a direct and explicit link between wave propagation and combinatorial graph data. Utilizing uniqueness property of the wave kernel, we prove a new trace-type formula associated to the affine Laplace-type operator on $X$ and apply it to deduce many combinatorial identities. For example, we derive a closed-form expression for evaluation of some trigonometric sums twisted by an additive character as well as evaluations of finite sums of Chebyshev polynomials twisted by binomial coefficients.
relevance_reason: 정규 그래프의 파동 방정식과 추적 공식을 다루며, McMullen's problem의 핵심인 점 배치·oriented matroid·조합 기하학과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 $(q+1)$-정규 그래프 위의 이산 시공간 파동 방정식을 affine Laplace형 연산자와 함께 연구한다. 명시적 파동 커널 공식을 discrete modified Bessel 함수와 non-backtracking walk 개수로 도출하고, 추적 공식(trace formula)을 증명하여 삼각함수 합과 Chebyshev 다항식의 조합 항등식을 얻는다.
technique: Affine Laplace형 연산자의 고유함수 분해 및 파동 커널의 유일성을 이용한 추적 공식 증명.

title: Two-pile and three-pile games of a new variant of Nim known as Halve Nim
abstract: We investigate a variant of Nim called Halve Nim, which in addition to the standard moves of Nim, we allow replacing each pile of coins with half its amount. We determine the P-positions of all two-pile games of Halve Nim. Also, we determine the P-positions of all three-pile games of Halve Nim in which one pile has at most ten coins.
relevance_reason: 조합 게임론(combinatorial game theory)의 P-위치 분석이지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, 기하학적 배치 문제와는 무관함.
summary: Halve Nim이라는 Nim의 변형을 연구하며, 표준 Nim 규칙에 더해 각 더미를 절반으로 줄이는 이동을 허용함. 2-더미 게임의 모든 P-위치를 결정하고, 한 더미가 10개 이하 동전인 3-더미 게임의 P-위치를 부분적으로 결정함.
technique: 게임이론의 역진 귀납법(backward induction)을 통한 P-위치(지는 위치) 특성화

title: On a problem of Sivaraman and a problem of Gyárfás
abstract: The \textit{girth} of a graph $G$, denoted $\mathrm{g}(G)$, is the length of a shortest cycle in $G$.   If $G$ contains no cycle, we define $\mathrm{g}(G)=\infty$.   Sivaraman (2020) asked for the optimal $χ$-bounding function for the class of graphs whose complements have girth at least $6$.   Let \(F(s) = \max\{χ(G): ω(G)\le s,\ \mathrm{g}(\overline{G})\ge 6\}\).   We prove that there exists a constant \(c>0\) such that   \[   c\left(\frac{s}{\log s}\right)^{4/3}   \le   F(s)   \le   (1+o(1))\frac{s^{3/2}}{\log s}.   \]   For small values, we establish the exact results   \[   F(1)=1,\; F(2)=2,\; F(3)=4,\; F(4)=5,\; F(5)=6,\; F(6)=8,   \]   and each bound is sharp.   A graph $G$ is \emph{almost perfect} if every induced subgraph $H$ of $G$ satisfies   \(α(H)ω(H)+1\ge |V(H)|\).   Gyárfás (2023) asked whether almost perfect graphs are $χ$-bounded by the function $g(x)=x+1$.   We answer this question in the negative by showing that there is no constant $c$ such that every almost perfect   graph $G$ satisfies $χ(G)\le ω(G)+c$.
relevance_reason: 그래프 색칠수(chromatic number) 문제로, 이산기하학의 McMullen 문제와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 여집합의 girth가 6 이상인 그래프 클래스에 대한 χ-bounding 함수의 최적 경계를 연구한다. Sivaraman의 문제에 대해 $c(s/\log s)^{4/3} \le F(s) \le (1+o(1))s^{3/2}/\log s$의 상한과 하한을 증명하고, 작은 값들에 대한 정확한 결과를 제시한다. 또한 Gyárfás의 almost perfect 그래프에 관한 문제를 부정적으로 해결한다.
technique: 그래프 색칠수 이론, χ-bounding 함수, girth 제약 조건.

title: Classification of regular Cayley maps of skew-type three on semidihedral groups
abstract: It is well known that every regular Cayley map $M = \CM(G,X,p)$ on a finite group $G$ with respect to an inverse-closed generating set $X$ of $G$ and a specified cyclic permutation $p$ on $X$ corresponds to a skew morphism $\varphi$ on $G$ such that the restriction of $\varphi$ to $X$ is $p$. The skew-type of the map $M$ is defined as the index $[G:\Ker \varphi]$, which equals the number of distinct values in $\mathbb{Z}_{|\varphi|}$ taken by the associated power function $π$ of the skew morphism $\varphi$. In this paper, we develop a covering theory of skew morphisms and as an application we provide a classification of regular Cayley maps of skew-type three on the semidihedral groups.
relevance_reason: 정규 Cayley 맵과 skew morphism의 분류는 대수적 조합론이지만, McMullen's problem(볼록 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid, 다면체 기하)과는 직접적 연관이 없음.
summary: 이 논문은 유한군 위의 정규 Cayley 맵을 skew morphism을 통해 분류하는 문제를 다룬다. Skew morphism의 covering theory를 개발하고, 이를 응용하여 semidihedral 군 위의 skew-type 3인 정규 Cayley 맵을 완전히 분류한다.
technique: Skew morphism의 covering theory와 관련 power function의 값의 분포 분석.

title: Extremal ranks of unlabeled multifurcating rooted trees in a bijective encoding by the positive integers
abstract: Maranca and Rosenberg (2024) devised a ranking scheme for unlabeled multifurcating rooted trees, in which the trees are bijectively associated with the positive integers. Here, generalizing earlier results for bifurcating trees, we determine, for trees with a fixed number of leaves, which multifurcating trees obtain the maximal and minimal ranks. We identify these maximizing and minimizing trees for each of two sets of unlabeled multifurcating rooted trees: strictly $k$-furcating trees, in which each internal node possesses exactly $k$ descendants, and at-most-$k$-furcating trees, in which internal nodes possess at least 2 and at most $k$ descendants. In both scenarios, we find that a tree that can be regarded as maximally balanced attains the minimal rank, and a minimally balanced tree attains the maximal rank. We deduce recurrences for the maximal and minimal rank for trees with fixed numbers of leaves in both the strictly $k$-furcating and at-most-$k$-furcating cases. The maximal rank on $(n-1)(k-1)+1$ leaves grows with $(k!)^{\frac{1}{k-1}} β_k^{(k^n)}$ in the strictly $k$-furcating case, and the maximal rank on $n$ leaves grows with $(k!)^{\frac{1}{k-1}} γ_k^{(k^n)}$ in the at-most-$k$-furcating case, where $β_k > 1$ and $γ_k > 1$ are constants that depend on the value of $k$. We show that $β_k$ decreases as the value of $k$ increases, and that $γ_k > β_k$ for $k \geq 3$. The results contribute to the use of tree encodings for empirical characterization of phylogenies and measurement of tree balance.
relevance_reason: 트리 인코딩과 조합론적 순서는 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 핵심인 convex position 점 배치, oriented matroid, tope graph와는 무관한 phylogenetic tree 균형성 연구.
summary: unlabeled multifurcating rooted tree를 양의 정수와 bijection으로 인코딩하는 ranking scheme에서, 고정된 leaf 개수를 갖는 트리들 중 maximal/minimal rank를 갖는 트리를 특성화한다. strictly k-furcating과 at-most-k-furcating 두 경우 모두에서 최대 균형 트리가 최소 rank를, 최소 균형 트리가 최대 rank를 달성함을 보인다.
technique: recurrence relation과 asymptotic growth analysis를 통한 extremal tree 특성화; tree balance 개념의 활용.

title: Filling surfaces with very few systoles
abstract: In the paper we describe hyperbolic surfaces filled by their systoles, where the total number of systoles is in $O(\frac{g}{\ln \,g})$, that is equivalent to the lower bound of Anderson, Parlier and Pittet \cite{APP}. Various papers \cite{SS}\cite{FB20}\cite{Sanki}\cite{ IM}\cite{ Mathieu} have investigated the same question, and the best previously known upper bounds where in $o(\frac{g}{\sqrt{\ln \,g}})$.   Surprizingly the present approach is, in our opinion, much simpler than the methods of earlier papers.
relevance_reason: 쌍곡 곡면의 systole 채우기 문제로, 이산기하학·조합론의 McMullen 문제(convex position, oriented matroid, 점 배치)와 직접 관련성 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 systole로 채워지는 쌍곡 곡면을 연구하며, systole의 총 개수가 $O(\frac{g}{\ln g})$인 경우를 구성함. 이는 Anderson-Parlier-Pittet의 하한과 일치하며, 기존 상한 $o(\frac{g}{\sqrt{\ln g}})$보다 개선됨.
technique: 더 단순한 기하학적 방법을 사용하여 쌍곡 곡면을 systole로 채우는 구성.

title: Extremal Deletion-Ball Intersections under Run-Count and Lower-Order Deletion-Ball Intersection Constraints
abstract: Motivated by sequence reconstruction and reconstruction codes, we study extremal intersections of deletion balls over a fixed $q$-ary alphabet. Let $Σ_q^n$ be the set of sequences of length $n$ over $Σ_q$, and let $D_t(x)$ denote the set of all sequences obtained from $x\inΣ_q^n$ by deleting exactly $t$ symbols.   Our first result gives a finite upper bound under a lower-order deletion-correction constraint. We prove that if $x,y\inΣ_q^n$ satisfy $D_{s-1}(x)\cap D_{s-1}(y)=\varnothing$, then \[ |D_t(x)\cap D_t(y)| \le \binom{2s}{s}\binom{n-s}{t-s}. \] For binary alphabets, this strengthens a recent asymptotic upper bound of Pham, Goyal, and Kiah (2025, JCTA). We then investigate deletion-ball intersections under simultaneous constraints on run counts and lower-order deletion-ball intersections. For fixed $0<γ\le1$, integers $1\le s\le t$, and $m\ge1$, we show that if $x,y\inΣ_q^n$ have at most $γn$ runs and satisfy $|D_s(x)\cap D_s(y)|\le m$, then \[ |D_t(x)\cap D_t(y)|\le \frac{mγ^{t-s}}{(t-s)!}n^{t-s}+O_{s,t,m}(n^{t-s-1}). \] Moreover, the leading term can be attainable whenever $m$ is realized by a fixed finite-length seed pair. As a consequence, we obtain a direct lifting theorem for deletion reconstruction codes, transferring reconstruction properties from radius $s$ to larger radii $t$. Finally, we establish a parallel insertion theory and derive corresponding results for insertion-ball intersections and insertion reconstruction codes.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 deletion ball 교집합의 극값 문제와 수열 재구성을 다루며, McMullen's problem이 요구하는 convex position, oriented matroid, 또는 polyhedral 구조와는 직접적인 관련이 없습니다.
summary: 이 논문은 q진 알파벳 위의 deletion ball 교집합의 극값을 연구하며, 낮은 차수 deletion-correction 제약 조건 하에서 상한을 증명합니다. run count와 낮은 차수 deletion-ball 교집합 제약을 동시에 고려할 때 deletion ball의 크기에 대한 다항식 상한을 도출하고, 이를 통해 deletion reconstruction code의 lifting 정리를 얻습니다.
technique: 조합론적 계수와 다항식 상한; run count 제약과 낮은 차수 정보로부터 고차 deletion ball의 크기를 제어하는 기법

title: Nearly-uniform degree distributions in spanning subgraphs
abstract: We show that, when $d=o(n)$, every $d$-regular $n$-vertex graph contains a spanning subgraph whose degree distribution is nearly uniform, i.e., for each $0\leq i\leq d$, there are $(1+o(1))n/(d+1)$ vertices with degree $i$. This proves a conjecture of Alon and Wei on irregular subgraphs and strengthens a previous result of Fox, Luo and Pham.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 그래프 이론의 정규성(regularity)과 차수 분포(degree distribution) 문제로, McMullen's problem의 기하학적·조합론적 구조(convex position, oriented matroid, realizability)와 직접 관련이 없습니다.
summary: d-정규 n-정점 그래프가 거의 균등한 차수 분포를 가진 생성 부분그래프를 포함함을 보입니다. 각 차수 $0\leq i\leq d$에 대해 $(1+o(1))n/(d+1)$개의 정점이 그 차수를 가집니다. Alon-Wei 추측을 증명하고 Fox-Luo-Pham의 결과를 강화합니다.

title: On the Periodicity of k-distance Graphs
abstract: The $k$-distance graph $G^k$ of a graph $G$ has the same vertex set as $G$ and two vertices are adjacent if and only if their distance is $k$ in $G$. These graphs have been extensively studied for their connection properties. In this paper, we study various properties of these graphs, including clique number and periodicity. For all $k$, we show that there exists a $k$-distance graph that is weakly periodic for any size period. Our main result is a proof that if $k > 2$ then there exists a $k$-distance graph of any size (strong) period. Finally, we provide evidence that there exists an upper bound on the periodicity of a connected $2$-distance graph as a function of $|V|$.
relevance_reason: k-distance graph의 주기성과 clique number는 점의 배치, convex position, 조합적 구조와 무관한 순수 그래프 이론 문제로, McMullen's problem의 oriented matroid, realizability, 기하학적 배치와 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: k-distance graph $G^k$는 원래 그래프 $G$에서 거리가 정확히 $k$인 정점들을 연결한 그래프이다. 본 논문은 모든 $k$에 대해 약한 주기성(weak periodicity)을 가진 $G^k$가 임의 크기로 존재하고, $k > 2$일 때 강한 주기성을 가진 임의 크기의 $k$-distance graph가 존재함을 증명한다. 또한 연결된 2-distance graph의 주기성에 대한 상한을 제시한다.
technique: 초록만으로는 불확실

title: On ideals in the semilattice of coarse equivalence classes of metrics
abstract: For a Hausdorff topology on the set of ideals of the semilattice $M(X)$ of coarse equivalence classes of metrics on a set $X$, the space $I(M(X))$ of ideals is the closure of the set of principal ideals, thus allowing to view non-principal ideals as generalizations of coarse equivalence classes of metrics. Some ideals arise from coarse structures on $X$. We define a map $Φ$ from $I(M(X))$ to the set $CS(X)$ of coarse structures on $X$, and a map $Ψ$ backwards, and show that $Ψ\circΦ$ is the identity map, thus allowing to identify coarse structures with some ideals of $M(X)$. We show that there are ideals that do not come from $CS(X)$. For any ideal $F$ we define the generalized uniform Roe algebra as the direct limit $C^*$-algebra of the uniform Roe algebras for the equivalence classes of metrics in the ideal, and show that it coincides with the uniform Roe algebra of $Φ(F)$.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 metric의 coarse equivalence class와 ideal의 semilattice 구조를 다루며, McMullen's problem과 관련된 조합·이산기하학적 문제와는 직접 관련이 없다.
summary: 논문은 metric의 coarse equivalence class로 이루어진 semilattice $M(X)$의 ideal들의 공간 $I(M(X))$에 대한 Hausdorff 위상을 연구한다. Coarse structure와 ideal 사이의 대응관계를 정의하여 일부 ideal을 coarse structure로 식별할 수 있음을 보이고, 이를 통해 generalized uniform Roe algebra를 정의한다.
technique: ideal의 semilattice 구조, Hausdorff 위상, 직극한(direct limit) $C^*$-대수의 구성.

title: Thurston norm, polytopes and splitting complexity
abstract: We show that if $G$ is a finitely generated torsion-free group satisfying the Strong Atiyah Conjecture with vanishing first $L^{2}$-Betti number, then the map that assigns to each surjective integral character the first $L^2$-Betti number of the kernel extends to a seminorm on the first cohomology group of $G$ with real coefficients. We call this seminorm the Thurston norm. Moreover, we show that this norm is induced by a polytope in the first homology group with real coefficients. We also generalize this result to higher $L^{2}$-Betti numbers of the kernels, thereby confirming a conjecture of Friedl, Lück and Tillmann.   In the case where $G$ is either a free-by-cyclic group or the fundamental group of an admissible $3$-manifold, we show that the Thurston norm of $G$ admits a combinatorial interpretation that relates it to the splitting complexity of the character. This confirms a conjecture of Gardam and Kielak. As an application, we show that there exists an algorithm to compute the Bieri--Neumann--Strebel invariant of free-by-cyclic groups, and discuss connections to the isomorphism problem in free-by-cyclic groups.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 Thurston norm, $L^2$-Betti 수, free-by-cyclic 군에 관한 것으로 McMullen's problem(볼록 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid 등)과 직접적 관련이 없다.
summary: 유한생성 비틀림없는 군 $G$가 Strong Atiyah Conjecture를 만족하고 첫 번째 $L^2$-Betti 수가 0이면, 핵(kernel)의 첫 번째 $L^2$-Betti 수가 제1 코호몰로지군 위의 세미노름(Thurston norm)으로 확장됨을 증명하고, 이 노름이 제1 호몰로지군의 다면체(polytope)에 의해 유도됨을 보인다. 이를 고차 $L^2$-Betti 수로 일반화하여 Friedl–Lück–Tillmann 추측을 확인하고, free-by-cyclic 군과 허용가능한 3-다양체의 기본군에서 Thurston norm이 splitting complexity와 동치임을 보여 Gardam–Kielak 추측도 해결한다. 응용으로 free-by-cyclic 군의 Bieri–Neumann–Strebel 불변량 계산 알고리즘의 존재성을 제시한다.
technique: Strong Atiyah Conjecture 틀 안에서 $L^2$-Betti 수의 세미노름 구조 및 다면체 유도를 분석하고, 조합론적 splitting complexity 해석을 활용한다.

title: A Counterexample to Ziegler's Cross-Polytope Conjecture for Simplicial 0/1-Polytopes
abstract: Ziegler proved that every simplicial $d$-dimensional $0/1$-polytope has at most $2d$ vertices, and asked whether equality forces the polytope to be centrally symmetric and hence, equivalently, a $0/1$-realization of the $d$-dimensional cross polytope. In this note, we give a negative answer, exhibiting an explicit set of $14$ vertices in $\{0,1\}^7$ whose convex hull is a simplicial $7$-polytope and is not centrally symmetric. Moreover, via exhaustive enumeration we show that up to the symmetries of the cube, there are precisely five such polytopes in dimension $7$ (of two combinatorial types) that are not centrally symmetric.
relevance_reason: 0/1-폴리토프와 조합론적 구조를 다루지만, McMullen 문제(f(5)=11, convex/general position 배치, oriented matroid 등)와 직접적인 관련은 없다.
summary: Ziegler는 단순(simplicial) $d$차원 $0/1$-폴리토프가 최대 $2d$개의 꼭짓점을 가짐을 증명하고, 등호 조건이 중심대칭성을 강제하는지 물었다. 이 논문은 $\{0,1\}^7$ 안의 명시적인 14개 꼭짓점으로 이루어진 볼록껍질이 단순 7-폴리토프이면서 중심대칭이 아님을 보여 반례를 제시한다. 또한 완전탐색(exhaustive enumeration)을 통해 7차원에서 중심대칭이 아닌 그러한 폴리토프가 큐브의 대칭을 고려할 때 정확히 두 가지 조합적 유형의 다섯 개임을 밝힌다.
technique: 명시적 꼭짓점 구성과 컴퓨터 기반 완전탐색(exhaustive enumeration)을 이용해 반례를 발견하고 분류.
connections: 추측: 볼록 위치(convex position) 점 배치의 조합적 유형 분류 문제와 간접적으로 관련될 수 있으나, McMullen 문제의 핵심 도구(oriented matroid, chirotope 등)와의 직접 연결은 초록에서 확인되지 않는다.

title: Small lattice polytopes have few vertices
abstract: This is a geometric retelling of Konyagin and Sevast'yanov's proof of Andrew's theorem, which is a tight upper bound on the number of vertices of a d-dimensional lattice polytope in terms of its volume.
relevance_reason: 격자 폴리토프의 꼭짓점 수 상한에 관한 논문으로, McMullen 문제(볼록 위치·일반 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid)와 직접적인 연관성이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 Konyagin과 Sevast'yanov의 Andrews 정리 증명을 기하학적으로 재서술한다. Andrews 정리는 $d$차원 격자 폴리토프의 꼭짓점 수에 대한 부피 기반의 tight한 상한을 제공한다.
technique: Konyagin–Sevast'yanov 증명의 기하학적 재해석을 핵심 기법으로 사용.

title: Spectral extremal problems for fractional $ID$-$[a,b]$-factor-critical graphs
abstract: A factor of a graph is essentially a specific type spanning subgraph. In recent years, the spectral extremal problem of characterizing the existence of graph factors via eigenvalues has been widely studied. This paper focuses on fractional $ID$-$[a, b]$-factor-critical graphs, which are a natural generalization of fractional $[a,b]$-factors. Let $r \ge 1$ be an integer. A graph $G$ is fractional $ID$-$[a, b]$-factor-critical if for every independent set $I$ of $G$ with $|I| = r$, $G - I$ has a fractional $[a, b]$-factor. In 2026, Jia, Fan and Liu posed the spectral version conjecture for a graph to be fractional $ID$-$[a, b]$-factor-critical [Linear Algebra Appl. 732 (2026) 1-17]. In this paper,   we first prove the conjecture holds for connected graphs when $b\ge 2r+2$. Furthermore, for minimum degree $δ(G)\ge a+r$, we present spectral radius and size conditions that ensure a graph is fractional $ID$-$[a, b]$-factor-critical, which improve the results of Jia, Fan and Liu.
relevance_reason: 그래프 인수(factor) 및 스펙트럼 극값 문제는 조합론이지만, McMullen's problem(볼록위치의 점 배치, oriented matroid, chiroptope)과는 직접적 주제 연관성이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 fractional $ID$-$[a,b]$-factor-critical 그래프의 스펙트럼 특성을 연구하며, 독립집합 제거 후 fractional factor 존재를 보장하는 고유값 조건을 제시한다. Jia, Fan and Liu(2026)의 추측을 $b \ge 2r+2$인 연결 그래프에서 증명하고, 최소차수 조건 하에서 개선된 스펙트럼 반지름 및 크기 조건을 제공한다.
technique: 스펙트럼 극값 이론(spectral extremal theory)을 이용한 그래프 인수의 존재성 특성화.

title: Wasserstein Barycenter Convexity Detects Hilbertian Geometry
abstract: We prove that convexity of the Boltzmann entropy at Wasserstein barycenters is strong enough to distinguish Hilbert spaces from general Banach spaces. Thus Wasserstein barycenters provide an intrinsic optimal-transport test for Hilbertian geometry. More precisely, we show that if a finite-dimensional normed vector space, equipped with Lebesgue measure, satisfies the Wasserstein Jensen's inequality for the entropy at barycenters of arbitrary finite families of probability measures, then its norm must be induced by an inner product.   This contrasts sharply with a well-known result: every finite-dimensional normed vector space satisfies the nonnegative Ricci curvature condition in the sense of Lott--Sturm--Villani, whereas barycenter convexity excludes all non-Hilbertian norms. As a consequence, smooth reversible Finsler manifolds satisfying the corresponding barycentric curvature-dimension condition have Riemannian tangent norms.   The proof does not assume strict convexity of the norm. Its two main ingredients are a rank-one polarization argument, which yields the dual parallelogram identity in the strictly convex case, and a maximal-face trapping argument, which rules out flat faces of the unit ball.
relevance_reason: 본 논문은 Wasserstein barycenter와 Hilbert 공간의 특성화에 관한 함수해석학·최적수송 이론이며, McMullen's problem의 convex position 점 배치, oriented matroid, 다면체 기하와 직접적 연관성이 없음.
summary: 유한차원 노름 벡터공간에서 Boltzmann 엔트로피의 Wasserstein Jensen 부등식이 성립하면 그 노름이 내적으로부터 유도됨을 증명한다. 이는 일반 Banach 공간과 Hilbert 공간을 최적수송을 통해 구별하는 intrinsic 특성을 제공하며, Finsler 다양체에 대한 곡률-차원 조건으로 확장된다.
technique: Rank-one polarization 논증과 unit ball의 평면 면(flat face)을 배제하는 maximal-face trapping 논증을 결합.

title: On the homology groups of clique complexes of strongly regular graphs
abstract: In this paper, we study the first homology groups of clique complexes of strongly regular graphs over arbitrary fields and prove that most of these graphs have trivial first clique homology groups. Using Neumaier's classification of strongly regular graphs with smallest integral eigenvalue, we show that a non-vanishing first homology group may occur only in a short collection of cases: the Petersen graph, the Shrikhande graph, the complete bipartite graphs, the conference graphs on at most $255$ vertices, the lattice graphs, and the exceptional families $E_m$ in Neumaier's classification of strongly regular graphs with smallest adjacency eigenvalue $-m$, for some integer $m \geq 3$. Let $\text{Cl}(G)$ denote the clique complex of a graph $G$, $H_i(\text{Cl}(G),\mathbb{F})$ be the $i$-th homology group of $\text{Cl}(G)$ over the field $\mathbb{F}$, for some $i\geq 1$, and $λ_{min}(G)$ denote the smallest eigenvalue of the adjacency matrix of $G$. We prove that if $(G_n)_{n\geq 1}$ is an infinite family of pairwise distinct strongly regular graphs and $(\mathbb{F}_n)_{n\geq 1}$ is a sequence of fields such that $H_1(\text{Cl}(G_n), \mathbb{F}_n)\not=0$ for every $n$, then either $G_n$ is a lattice graph for infinitely many $n$, or $\lim_{n\rightarrow +\infty} λ_{\min}(G_n)=-\infty$.   For Latin square graphs, we determine the clique homologies over arbitrary fields and show that if $G$ is the strongly regular graph associated with a Latin square $M$ of order $n \geq 5$ and $\mathbb{F}$ is any field, then $H_i(\text{Cl}(G),\mathbb{F})=0$ for $i=1$ or $i \geq 3$, and $\dim H_2(\text{Cl}(G),\mathbb{F})=(n-1)^3-I(M),$ where $I(M)$ is the number of $2 \times 2$ Latin subsquares or intercalates in $M$.
relevance_reason: Strongly regular graph의 clique complex 위상 성질을 연구하나, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, realizability와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 강정규그래프(strongly regular graphs)의 클리크 복합체(clique complex)의 1차 호몰로지군을 연구하며, Neumaier의 분류를 이용해 비자명 호몰로지가 나타나는 경우를 Peterson 그래프, Shrikhande 그래프, 완전이분그래프 등 극히 제한된 경우로 특징지었다. Latin square graphs에 대해서는 클리크 호몰로지를 완전히 결정하고 2차 호몰로지의 차원을 Latin subsquares 개수로 명시적으로 표현했다.
technique: Neumaier의 strongly regular graph 분류, 인접 행렬의 고유값 분석, homological algebra over arbitrary fields

title: Strong Embeddings of Regular Graphs with Prescribed Automorphism Groups
abstract: A classical theorem of Frucht states that every finite group occurs as the automorphism group of a finite graph. We prove an embedded analogue for regular graphs of arbitrary degree. In particular, we show that for every $d\geq 3$ and every finite group $G$, there exists a $d$-regular graph $Γ$ with a strong embedding $β$ such that $\mathrm{Aut}(Γ) \cong \mathrm{Aut}(β(Γ)) \cong G.$ Further, we prove that for every such $d$ and $G$ there exists a sequence of $d$-regular graphs with corresponding strong embeddings whose genera form an unbounded sequence and whose automorphism groups are isomorphic to $G$. Along the way, we identify an   oversight in Sabidussi's classical construction of regular graphs with prescribed automorphism group. We give an alternative construction that corrects this issue and strengthens Sabidussi's result by producing an automorphism group-invariant proper $d$-edge-colouring.
relevance_reason: 본 논문은 정규 그래프의 자기동형 그룹 실현과 강 임베딩에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제(convex position의 점 배치와 oriented matroid의 성질)와는 직접적인 연관이 없음.
summary: Frucht의 정리를 일반화하여, 모든 유한군 G와 차수 d≥3에 대해 자기동형군이 G인 강 임베딩을 갖는 d-정규 그래프가 존재함을 보인다. 또한 같은 자기동형군을 갖지만 속(genus)이 unbounded인 정규 그래프 수열의 존재를 증명하고, Sabidussi의 고전적 구성에서의 오류를 지적하고 수정한다.
technique: 강 임베딩(strong embedding)을 이용한 정규 그래프의 구성, Frucht-Sabidussi 구성의 개선

title: Tournament Ranking: Duality and Efficiency
abstract: The feedback arc set problem on tournaments arises in a rich variety of applications, and has been studied extensively in several research fields over the past six decades. It is well known that this problem is $NP$-hard and admits a polynomial-time approximation scheme (PTAS) in general. A tournament $T=(V, A)$ is called cycle Mengerian (CM) if, for every nonnegative integral weight function defined on $A$, the minimum total weight of a feedback arc set is equal to the maximum size of a cycle packing. In 2020 Chen et al. obtained a structural characterization of all CM tournaments; however, their proof is not algorithmic in nature. In this paper we present combinatorial polynomial-time algorithms for finding both minimum feedback arc sets and maximum cycle packings in arc-weighted CM tournaments.
relevance_reason: Tournament feedback arc set 문제는 acyclic orientation과 관련되지만, McMullen's problem(5차원 convex position 점 배치)과는 직접적 수학적 관련이 없음.
summary: 이 논문은 cycle Mengerian (CM) tournaments에서 feedback arc set 문제와 cycle packing 문제 사이의 duality를 다룬다. CM tournaments의 구조적 특성화를 바탕으로 두 문제를 다항시간에 해결하는 조합 알고리즘을 제시한다.
technique: Cycle Mengerian tournaments의 구조적 특성화를 활용한 조합 다항시간 알고리즘.

title: On Meyniel's Conjecture in Random Hypergraphs
abstract: The game of \emph{Cops and Robbers} is a two player pursuit game on graphs where a team of cops attempts to catch a robber. The cop number $c(G)$ of a graph $G$ is the minimum number of cops needed to guarantee a winning strategy in $G$. A famous conjecture of Meyniel says that if $G$ is connected, then $c(G)=O(\sqrt{n})$. Erde, Kang, Lehner, Mohar and Schmid considered its generalization to $k$-uniform hypergraphs and conjectured that the cop number of such hypergraphs is $O(\sqrt{n/k})$. This may be understood as a hypergraph version of Meyniel's conjecture. In this paper we prove this conjecture for a class of \textit{expanding} hypergraphs and show that with high probability the conjecture holds for random hypergraphs $H^k(n,p))$ provided $k\geq \log^3n$ and the typical degree, $p\binom{n-1}{k-1}$, is $ω(\log^3n)$.
relevance_reason: Cops and Robbers 게임의 경찰 수에 관한 추측으로, McMullen's problem의 점 배치·조합론적 구조와 직접적 관련성이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 k-uniform 하이퍼그래프에서의 Meyniel 추측 일반화를 다룬다. 경시자(cops)와 도둑(robber)의 추적 게임에서 필요한 최소 경찰 수가 $O(\sqrt{n/k})$임을 확장 하이퍼그래프와 무작위 하이퍼그래프 $H^k(n,p)$에서 증명한다.
technique: 확장성(expansion) 조건과 무작위 하이퍼그래프의 확률론적 방법을 활용한 고확률 분석

title: Resolving the Klavžar-Kovše conjecture on opposite semicube isomorphisms in partial cubes and its extension
abstract: Partial cubes are a fundamental class of graphs that admit isometric embeddings into hypercubes. Klavžar and Kovše [Ars Combin. 93 (2009), 77--86] observed that the opposite semicubes of every harmonic-even partial cube are pairwise isomorphic, and asked whether the converse is true, that is, whether a partial cube is harmonic-even if and only if its opposite semicubes are pairwise isomorphic. In this paper, we answer this question in the negative by constructing an infinite family of partial cubes with pairwise isomorphic opposite semicubes that are not harmonic-even. This establishes that pairwise opposite-semicube isomorphism is strictly weaker than harmonic-evenness and naturally leads to the question of what additional condition restores the equivalence. To address this question, we introduce the opposite-semicube Helly property and prove that a finite partial cube satisfying this property is antipodal, or equivalently harmonic-even by Polat's theorem, if and only if it has pairwise isomorphic opposite semicubes.
relevance_reason: Partial cubes와 hypercube 임베딩은 이산기하학의 고전 주제이지만, McMullen's problem(d=5에서의 convex position 점 배치 및 oriented matroid)과는 직접적인 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 partial cube의 opposite semicube 동형성에 관한 Klavžar-Kovše 추측을 부정으로 해결한다. Harmonic-even partial cube가 아니면서도 opposite semicube가 쌍별 동형인 무한 partial cube 족을 구성하고, opposite-semicube Helly 성질을 도입하여 동형성과 harmonic-evenness의 동치 조건을 특성화한다.
technique: Partial cube의 구조적 성질(semicube, harmonic-evenness, Helly property)을 이용한 반례 구성 및 특성화

title: Minimal Isometric Embeddings of Graphs into Abelian Groups: Theory, Algorithms, and Applications to Signal Processing over Networks
abstract: This dissertation develops a framework for embedding arbitrary connected graphs isometrically into Cayley graphs of abelian groups, with applications to harmonic analysis on networks. It addresses representing irregular graph-structured data within highly symmetric algebraic hosts, on which classical Fourier theory applies verbatim rather than by analogy.   The theoretical core is twofold. First, we introduce edge relations phi, Phi, and Psi that detect metric parallelism, a strict generalization of the Djokovic-Winkler relation beyond bipartite and partial-cube structures, with a transitive prune operation converting them into candidate same-generator edge partitions. Second, we prove the Cocycle/Quotient Labeling Theorem: any edge partition induces a most-generic consistent vertex labeling as a GF(2) quotient of dimension k = t - rank(A), where A is the cycle-class parity matrix; the labeling can fail only by shortcuts, never by stretching. With a shortcut-repair loop terminating in the isometric spanning-tree embedding, this gives a universal algorithm: every connected graph G embeds isometrically into a Cayley graph of (Z_2)^k with k <= n-1, verified exhaustively on all 995 connected graphs of at most seven vertices.   A bounds theory follows: k >= max(diam(G), ceil(log2 n)); stars satisfy k_min(K_{1,q}) = ceil(log2 q) + 1, exponentially below the naive dimension; odd cycles require k = n-1. We then generalize the quotient machinery from GF(2) to Z via the Smith Normal Form, giving embeddings into products of cyclic groups. The primary application is harmonic analysis: these embeddings ground Fourier analysis, convolution, and wavelet transforms on graph signals, preserving translation-modulation duality, convolution theorems, and Plancherel identities that matrix-based graph signal processing lacks. We name this framework Group-Embedding-based Graph Signal Processing (GE-GSP).
relevance_reason: 그래프의 기하학적 임베딩을 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, realizability 등과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 이 논문은 임의의 연결 그래프를 아벨군의 Cayley 그래프에 등거리 임베딩하는 이론적 틀을 개발한다. Djokovic-Winkler 관계의 일반화인 edge relation들과 Cocycle/Quotient Labeling Theorem을 통해 GF(2)^k 또는 순환군의 곱으로의 보편적 임베딩 알고리즘을 제시하며, 이를 네트워크 상의 그래프 신호 처리에 적용한다.
technique: Cocycle/Quotient Labeling Theorem과 Smith Normal Form을 이용한 GF(2) 및 Z 위의 quotient 기계론.

title: Function-Counting Theory for Low-Dimensional Data Structures
abstract: The success of deep learning models in classification and regression is widely attributed to the low-dimensional structure that real-world data tend to exhibit, despite their high-dimensional representation. This work attempts to provide a mathematical framework for binary classification on low-dimensional data, building on Cover's (1965) function-counting theory. With our framework, we aim to address the question of how the low-dimensional structure of the data affects the classification capabilities of learning models. Cover's theory relies on a general position assumption that blinds it to the underlying data structure. We refine this assumption to account for the low-dimensionality of the data and derive dichotomy counts that reflect the data structure. We further extend Cover's separation capacity and problem of generalization to the low-dimensional setting, enabling the impact of the underlying data structure on both to be analyzed.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 딥러닝 분류 문제를 위한 함수-카운팅 이론에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제(볼록 위치·일반 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid 등)와 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 Cover(1965)의 함수-카운팅 이론을 저차원 구조를 가진 데이터로 확장하는 수학적 프레임워크를 제시한다. 데이터의 저차원성을 반영하도록 일반 위치(general position) 가정을 정교화하여 데이터 구조를 반영한 이분법(dichotomy) 수를 유도한다. 나아가 Cover의 분리 용량(separation capacity)과 일반화 문제(generalization problem)를 저차원 설정으로 확장하여 데이터 구조가 이 두 측면에 미치는 영향을 분석할 수 있게 한다.
technique: Cover의 함수-카운팅 이론의 일반 위치 가정을 저차원 데이터 구조에 맞게 정제하여 이분법 수(dichotomy count)를 유도하는 방법론.

title: Order polytopes of generalized snake posets are $h^*$-real-rooted
abstract: Order polytopes for generalized snake posets were recently studied by von Bell et al. (2022), and are known to be unimodularly equivalent to strength-one flow polytopes for acyclic directed graphs strongly dual to generalized snake posets. Lee, Vindas-Meléndez, and Wang (2026) conjectured that the Ehrhart $h^*$-polynomials of these order polytopes are real-rooted. We prove this conjecture using a connection between these $h^*$-polynomials and non-nesting rook polynomials, which were recently introduced by Alexandersson and Jal (2024+) in connection with $P$-Eulerian polynomials for width two posets.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 일반화 snake poset의 order polytope의 $h^*$-다항식 실근성에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제(d=5 convex position, oriented matroid 등)와 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: von Bell et al.(2022)이 연구한 일반화 snake poset의 order polytope에 대해, Lee–Vindas-Meléndez–Wang(2026)이 제기한 Ehrhart $h^*$-다항식의 실근성(real-rootedness) 추측을 증명한다. 증명의 핵심은 해당 $h^*$-다항식과 Alexandersson–Jal(2024+)이 도입한 non-nesting rook polynomial 사이의 연결 관계를 활용하는 것이다.
technique: $h^*$-다항식과 non-nesting rook polynomial 사이의 연결을 이용하여 실근성을 증명.

title: Quandle homology and relative group homology
abstract: We introduce a chain map from quandle homology to relative group homology, and construct several quandle cocycles through the chain map. We also relate this chain map to triangulations of Seifert (hyper)surfaces of 1- and 2-dimensional links.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 quandle homology와 상대 군 호몰로지(relative group homology)의 관계 및 링크의 Seifert 초곡면을 다루며, McMullen 문제(볼록 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid 등)와 전혀 무관하다.
summary: 이 논문은 quandle homology에서 상대 군 호몰로지로의 chain map을 도입하고, 이를 통해 여러 quandle cocycle을 구성한다. 또한 이 chain map을 1차원 및 2차원 링크의 Seifert (초)곡면의 삼각분할(triangulation)과 연결한다.
technique: quandle homology에서 relative group homology로의 chain map 구성 및 Seifert 초곡면의 삼각분할 활용.

title: Type B c-Birkhoff polytopes are order polytopes
abstract: In a previous work, we defined (type A) c-Birkhoff polytopes and showed that they were unimodularly equivalent to order polytopes of heap posets. In this note we answer the question: What about type B?
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 type B c-Birkhoff polytope와 order polytope의 동치 관계를 다루며, McMullen 문제(d=5 일반 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid 등)와 직접적 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 이전 연구에서 정의된 type A c-Birkhoff polytope를 type B로 확장하여, type B c-Birkhoff polytope가 heap poset의 order polytope와 단모듈 동치(unimodularly equivalent)임을 보인다. 즉 type B 설정에서도 동일한 order polytope 구조가 성립함을 확인하는 짧은 노트이다.
technique: Heap poset의 order polytope와의 단모듈 동치(unimodular equivalence) 증명.

title: Sharp Nordhaus-Gaddum bounds for throttling
abstract: Throttling is a graph optimization problem, where the throttling number of a graph is the minimum sum or minimum product of the number of vertices in an initial set and the time required to complete a certain graph operation. A Nordhaus-Gaddum bound refers to an upper or lower bound of the sum or product of a graph parameter together with that of its complement. In this paper, we study the Nordhaus-Gaddum sum and product bounds of the various throttling numbers (sum throttling and product throttling with or without initial cost). Graph operations considered are standard zero forcing, positive semidefinite forcing, power domination, and Cops and Robbers.
relevance_reason: Throttling은 그래프 최적화 문제이며 McMullen's problem은 볼록기하학의 점 배치 문제로 연구 주제가 직접 관련되지 않음.
summary: 본 논문은 그래프 throttling 문제의 Nordhaus-Gaddum 경계(bound)를 연구한다. Throttling number는 초기 집합의 크기와 그래프 연산 완료 시간의 합 또는 곱의 최소값으로 정의되며, 표준 zero forcing, positive semidefinite forcing, power domination, Cops and Robbers 등 여러 그래프 연산에 대해 분석한다.
technique: 그래프의 보그래프(complement graph)와의 관계를 이용하여 매개변수의 합과 곱에 대한 sharp bounds를 도출.

title: New bounds for equiangular lines and Balla's conjecture
abstract: Let $N_α(d)$ denote the maximum number of equiangular lines in $\mathbb{R}^d$ with common angle $\arccos(α)$. Balla conjectured that, if the spectral radius order $κ_{\frac{1-α}{2α}}$ of $\frac{1-α}{2α}$ is finite, then   $$N_α(d)\leq \max\left\{\frac{(1-α^2)(1-2α^2)}{2α^4},\left\lfloor\frac{κ_{\frac{1-α}{2α}}(d-1)}{κ_{\frac{1-α}{2α}}-1}\right\rfloor\right\},$$   for any $d\geq 1$. The conjecture has previously been verified only for $α\in\left\{\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{5},\frac{1}{1+2\sqrt{2}}\right\}$. In this paper, we prove that this conjecture holds for $α=\frac{1}{1+2\sqrt{3}}$ and $α=\sqrt{5}-2$. On the other hand, we show that Balla's conjecture fails for infinitely many $α$.
relevance_reason: Equiangular lines는 기하학적 배치 문제이지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position, general position, oriented matroid 와는 직접적 연관이 없음.
summary: 논문은 실수 공간 $\mathbb{R}^d$에서 공통 각도를 갖는 등각선(equiangular lines)의 최대 개수 $N_α(d)$에 관한 상한을 연구한다. Balla의 추측을 $α=\frac{1}{1+2\sqrt{3}}$과 $α=\sqrt{5}-2$인 경우에 증명하고, 동시에 이 추측이 무한히 많은 $α$ 값에 대해 거짓임을 보인다.
technique: 스펙트럼 반경(spectral radius) 개념을 활용하여 등각선 배치의 상한을 도출

title: The Thickness of Infinite Sidon Sets
abstract: Let $γ\ge 1$. A set $A$ of nonnegative integers is a Sidon set if for each $d>0$ there is at most one pair $(a,b) \in A \times A$ with $d=a-b$. If there are at most $γ$ pairs, then $A$ is a $γ$-Golomb ruler. We prove that if $A$ is a $γ$-Golomb ruler, then \[\liminf_{n\to\infty} \frac{|A\cap[0,n)|}{\sqrt{n/\log n}} \le \frac{2}{\sqrt{\log 2}} \sqrtγ.\] There is a $γ$-Golomb ruler $G$ with \[ \limsup_{n\to\infty} \frac{|G\cap[0,n)|}{\sqrt n} \ge \frac{1}{\sqrt2} \sqrtγ.\]
relevance_reason: Sidon set의 밀도 상한은 조합론 문제이지만, McMullen's problem(볼록 위치, 일반 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid, chirotope 등)과는 기하학적 또는 구조적 연관성이 없음.
summary: γ-Golomb ruler(각 양의 정수 거리 d에 대해 최대 γ개의 쌍 (a,b)를 가지는 음이 아닌 정수 집합)의 점근 밀도에 대한 상하한을 증명. 하한은 $\liminf_{n\to\infty} \frac{|A\cap[0,n)|}{\sqrt{n/\log n}} \le \frac{2}{\sqrt{\log 2}}\sqrt{\gamma}$이고, 구성된 예시는 $\limsup_{n\to\infty} \frac{|G\cap[0,n)|}{\sqrt{n}} \ge \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\sqrt{\gamma}$를 만족.
technique: 점 쌍의 개수 제약 조건을 이용한 점근 밀도 분석 및 명시적 구성

title: The threshold for the asymmetric vertex-Ramsey property in randomly perturbed graphs
abstract: For $r \geq 2$ and graphs $H_1, \ldots, H_r, G$, we say that $G$ is $(H_1, \ldots, H_r)$ vertex-Ramsey, or $(H_1, \ldots, H_r)_v$-Ramsey, if whenever we colour the vertices of $G$ with colours from the set $[r]=\{1,2, \ldots, r\}$ there exists $j \in [r]$ such that some copy of $H_j$ in $G$ is monochromatic in colour $j$. Given any fixed collection of graphs $H_1, \ldots, H_r$, Luczak, Ruciński and Voigt and Kreuter determined in the 1990s the threshold edge probability $p$ at which the binomial random graph $G(n,p)$ becomes $(H_1, \ldots, H_r)_v$-Ramsey. More recently, Das, Morris and Treglown investigated the vertex-Ramsey property in the randomly perturbed setting. When $r=2$ they determined the number of random edges one must add to a dense graph to ensure that with probability $1-o(1)$ the resulting graph is $(H_1, H_2)_v$-Ramsey whenever one of $H_1$ or $H_2$ is a clique. They posed the problem of extending their results to all pairs of graphs $(H_1, H_2)$.   In this paper we resolve a more general form of their problem and determine for any $r\geq 2$ and $r$-tuple of graphs $(H_1, \ldots, H_r)$ the number of random edges one must add to a dense graph to ensure that with probability $1-o(1)$ the resulting graph is $(H_1, \ldots, H_r)_v$-Ramsey.
relevance_reason: Vertex-Ramsey 성질과 랜덤 그래프는 이산기하학이나 convex position 문제와 무관한 순수 그래프 Ramsey 이론.
summary: 논문은 randomly perturbed 그래프(밀집 그래프에 랜덤 간선 추가)에서 비대칭 vertex-Ramsey 성질의 임계값을 결정한다. 고정된 그래프 집합 $(H_1, \ldots, H_r)$에 대해 결과 그래프가 $(H_1, \ldots, H_r)_v$-Ramsey가 될 확률이 $1-o(1)$이 되도록 필요한 랜덤 간선의 개수를 일반적으로 특성화한다.
technique: Ramsey 이론과 확률적 방법(probabilistic method)을 활용한 임계값 분석.

title: Random partition for Tokushige's $r$-wise intersecting conjecture
abstract: Let $r\ge 3$ and let $1>p_1\ge p_2\ge\cdots\ge p_n>0$. Let $μ_{\mathbf p}$ denote the product measure on $2^{[n]}$ where each coordinate $i$ is included independently with probability $p_i$. A family $\mathcal A\subseteq 2^{[n]}$ is $r$-wise intersecting if $A_1\cap\cdots\cap A_r\neq\emptyset$ for all $A_1,\ldots,A_r\in\mathcal A$. In 2022, Tokushige proved that if $p_2<\frac{r-1}{r}$, then every $r$-wise intersecting family $\mathcal{A}\subseteq 2^{[n]}$ satisfies $μ_{\mathbf p}(\mathcal{A})\le p_1$, with equality only for stars centred at coordinates of maximum probability. He conjectured that the hypothesis $p_2<\frac{r-1}{r}$ can be replaced by $p_{r+1}<\frac{r-1}{r}$. In this paper, we prove this conjecture in full. The key novelty is the introduction of a new random partition method, which reduces the problem to at most $r$ coordinates and solves it exactly, thereby fully covering all cases with multiple supercritical coordinates.
relevance_reason: McMullen's problem은 convex position과 oriented matroid 관련 조합론이며, 이 논문은 집합족의 교집합 성질과 확률 측도를 다루는 순수 조합론으로 직접 관련성이 없음.
summary: Tokushige의 $r$-wise intersecting family 추측을 증명했다. $r$-wise intersecting family $\mathcal{A}$에 대해 product measure $μ_{\mathbf p}(\mathcal{A})\le p_1$이 $p_{r+1}<\frac{r-1}{r}$ 조건 하에서 성립함을 보였으며, 이는 기존 가설 $p_2<\frac{r-1}{r}$를 약화시킨다.
technique: 새로운 random partition method를 도입하여 문제를 최대 $r$개 좌표로 축소하고 정확히 해결.

title: Is There An Ideal Color Wheel?
abstract: The familiar color wheel is a disk divided into six sectors, colored red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple, in circular order. Three of the colors can be obtained by blending the colors in the two neighboring sectors.   One might wonder: is there a color wheel in which all six of the sections have this property, without all the sections being the same color? We show that the answer is no, not just for the 6-cycle but for any finite connected graph; indeed, for any finite, strongly connected, edge-weighted digraph. The result generalizes the ``harmonic lemma" for graphs, replacing the well-behaved averaging function by paint blending, about which almost nothing is assumed. Our proof makes use of a Markov chain stopping rule.
relevance_reason: 색상 혼합 문제는 그래프 이론과 Markov chain 기법을 사용하지만, McMullen의 문제인 고차원 convex position 점 배치, oriented matroid, realizability와는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 색상환(color wheel)에서 모든 섹션이 인접한 두 섹션의 혼합으로 표현될 수 있는지를 묻는 문제를 다룬다. 유한 연결 그래프 및 강연결 가중 방향그래프에 대해 모든 섹션이 동일하지 않으면서 이 성질을 만족하는 경우는 존재하지 않음을 증명한다.
technique: Markov chain stopping rule을 이용한 조화 보조정리(harmonic lemma) 일반화.

title: Totally Disjoint Diametral Paths
abstract: In this paper, we study totally disjoint diametral paths in simple connected graphs. A diametral path in a graph is a shortest path that connects two vertices whose mutual distance is equal to the diameter of the graph. Totally disjoint paths are paths that have no vertices in common, including their end vertices. We show that the problem of deciding whether a graph $G$ has $k$ totally disjoint diametral paths is NP-complete. We consider restricted classes of graphs for which the problem of determining the maximum size of a set of totally disjoint diametral paths is readily solved. We then give a linear-time algorithm for a subclass of maximal outerplanar graphs called 2-paths, define a polynomial-time algorithm for threshold graphs, and establish a structural bound for proper interval graphs. Finally, we define classes of extremal graphs with $k$ totally disjoint diametral paths of length $d$ having the fewest possible number of edges.
relevance_reason: 그래프의 diametral path 분해 문제는 조합론적이지만 McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, 또는 polytope 구조와는 무관함.
summary: 본 논문은 단순 연결 그래프에서 완전히 분리된 diametral path들의 존재성을 연구한다. k개의 totally disjoint diametral path 결정 문제가 NP-완전임을 보이고, 특정 그래프 클래스(2-paths, threshold graphs, proper interval graphs)에서 다항 시간 알고리즘 또는 구조적 상한을 제시한다.
technique: NP-완전성 증명, 제한된 그래프 클래스의 동적 프로그래밍/선형 시간 알고리즘, extremal graph 분석

title: Fano Geometry and Slow Coupon Collecting
abstract: We study the coupon collector's problem in a generalized setting where each draw reveals a fixed number of coupons and the sampling mechanism is required to be \emph{fair}, meaning that every coupon appears with the same frequency among the admissible draws. Grunbaum and Yaakobi conjectured that, among all fair mechanisms with fixed parameters, the fully random model maximizes the expected time to complete coverage. We disprove this conjecture by exhibiting explicit counterexamples arising from finite geometry. In particular, we show that the line set of the Fano plane yields a fair mechanism whose expected coverage time exceeds that of the full model. Further exact and computational results are obtained for projective planes of higher order. In addition, we analyze a simple infinite family of fair mechanisms, the star mechanism, for which the expected coverage time admits a closed form. Depending on the scaling regime, this mechanism can be asymptotically slower or faster than the full model, showing that no universal extremality principle holds for fair mechanisms without additional structural assumptions.
relevance_reason: 유한 기하학(Fano plane, projective planes)을 활용하지만 조합 최적화 문제와 oriented matroid, convex position, general position 배치 문제와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 공정한 표본 추출 메커니즘 하에서 쿠폰 수집기 문제를 연구하며, Grunbaum-Yaakobi 추측을 유한 기하학(Fano plane, 고차 사영평면)의 구체적 반례로 반박함. 특정 무한 족(star mechanism)에 대해 폐쇄형 기댓값을 도출하고 스케일링 체제에 따른 점근 성능을 분석함.
technique: 유한 기하학의 구조(Fano plane의 선 집합)를 공정한 표본 메커니즘으로 변환하여 쿠폰 커버 시간의 기댓값을 계산.

title: Symmetric edge polytopes are not gamma-positive
abstract: A conjecture posed by Ohsugi and Tsuchiya (2019) postulates that the Ehrhart $h^*$-polynomials of symmetric edge polytopes are $γ$-positive. We disprove this conjecture by exhibiting an infinite family of counterexamples. The smallest example provided by our construction is a $36$-dimensional symmetric edge polytope.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 symmetric edge polytope의 Ehrhart $h^*$-다항식의 $\gamma$-양수성(gamma-positivity)에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제나 관련 도구(oriented matroid, chirotope 등)와 직접적인 연관이 없다.
summary: Ohsugi와 Tsuchiya(2019)가 제기한 'symmetric edge polytope의 Ehrhart $h^*$-다항식은 $\gamma$-양수($\gamma$-positive)이다'라는 추측을 반례의 무한 족(infinite family)을 구성함으로써 반증한다. 이 구성에서 제시되는 가장 작은 반례는 36차원 symmetric edge polytope이다.
technique: 반례의 무한 족을 명시적으로 구성하여 $\gamma$-양수성 추측을 반증.

title: Characterisations of strong $Δ$-matroids
abstract: We study characterisations of strong $Δ$-matroids, compiling a list of five equivalent descriptions. We show a variant of Wenzel's exchange property and the hyperplane exchange property of Borovik-Gelfand-White are equivalent. We also introduce two novel characterisations in terms of 'peerless' and 'isolated' antipodes within the system of feasible sets, banning certain configurations of antipodes either globally or locally. As a corollary, we obtain new 'local' exchange axioms for matroids and $Δ$-matroids. We give algebraic motivation for these new characterisations by introducing the peerless antipode equations, tropical equations that govern whether a $Δ$-matroid has no peerless antipodes. We show that these arise as the tropicalisation of a specific basis of quadratics cutting out the orthogonal Grassmannian.
relevance_reason: Tropical geometry와 oriented matroid 관련 도구를 다루지만, 본 논문은 strong Δ-matroid의 공리적 특성화에 집중하며 McMullen 문제(d=5, 점 배치, acyclic reorientation 등)와 직접적 관련은 없다.
summary: 본 논문은 strong Δ-matroid의 다섯 가지 동치 특성화를 제시하며, Wenzel의 교환 성질과 Borovik-Gelfand-White의 초평면 교환 성질의 동치를 증명한다. 'peerless' 및 'isolated' antipode 개념을 도입하여 실현 가능 집합 계의 특정 antipode 구성을 전역·국소적으로 금지하는 새로운 특성화를 제안하고, 이로부터 matroid와 Δ-matroid에 대한 새로운 '국소' 교환 공리를 도출한다. 대수적 동기로서 peerless antipode 방정식을 소개하며, 이것이 직교 Grassmannian을 절단하는 이차식의 특정 기저의 열대화(tropicalisation)로 나타남을 보인다.
technique: Peerless/isolated antipode 개념 도입, Wenzel·Borovik-Gelfand-White 교환 성질의 동치 증명, 직교 Grassmannian의 이차식 기저의 열대화를 통한 대수적 해석.
connections: 추측: tropical geometry 도구가 McMullen 문제의 realizability 접근에서 사용되는 chirotope·oriented matroid 실현 가능성 연구와 간접적으로 연결될 수 있으나, 초록만으로는 불확실.

title: From Ham-Sandwich to Centerpoints: Semialgebraic Algorithms for Cutting Polytopal Measures
abstract: We design exact algorithms for the ham-sandwich and centerpoint theorems for polytopal measures. Our key observation is that the cap-volume function of such a measure, i.e., the volume cut off by a halfspace, is piecewise rational on a natural decomposition of the space of oriented hyperplanes. This lets us recast prescribed-proportion cutting problems as semialgebraic feasibility problems. For fixed ambient dimension, this yields polynomial-time algorithms to decide the existence of cuts, describe the full solution set, and sample or enumerate solutions. We extend this framework to the center transversal theorem, showing that spaces of deep affine flats are semialgebraic, which holds for centerpoints. We further show that the set of centerpoints of a convex polytope coincides with its floating body at level $1/(d+1)$, a useful semialgebraic description.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 ham-sandwich 정리와 centerpoint 정리를 위한 준대수적(semialgebraic) 알고리즘을 다루며, McMullen 문제나 Larman 추측과 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 polytope 측도(polytopal measures)에 대한 ham-sandwich 정리와 centerpoint 정리의 정확한 알고리즘을 설계한다. 핵심 관찰은 그러한 측도의 cap-volume 함수가 oriented hyperplane 공간의 자연스러운 분해 위에서 조각별 유리함수(piecewise rational)라는 것이며, 이를 통해 prescribed-proportion cutting 문제를 준대수적 실현 가능성 문제(semialgebraic feasibility problem)로 변환한다. 또한 볼록 다면체(convex polytope)의 centerpoint 집합이 레벨 $1/(d+1)$에서의 floating body와 일치함을 보인다.
technique: oriented hyperplane 공간의 자연 분해 위에서 cap-volume 함수의 조각별 유리성을 이용해 cutting 문제를 준대수적 실현 가능성 문제로 환원하고, 고정 차원에서 다항 시간 알고리즘을 도출한다.

title: Alexander's conjecture for infinite simplicial complexes
abstract: Alexander's conjecture states that for every two finite triangulations of the same topological space, if they have a common subdivision, then they have a common stellar subdivision. We generalize the recent result of Adiprasito and Pak, who resolved Alexander's conjecture for finite simplicial complexes, to infinite simplicial complexes.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 위상공간의 삼각분할과 stellar subdivision에 관한 Alexander 추측을 무한 단체 복합체로 일반화한 것으로, McMullen 문제나 관련 oriented matroid 이론과 직접적 연관이 없다.
summary: Alexander 추측은 동일한 위상공간의 두 유한 삼각분할이 공통 세분(subdivision)을 가지면 공통 stellar subdivision도 가진다는 주장이다. Adiprasito와 Pak이 유한 단체 복합체에 대해 이 추측을 해결한 최근 결과를 이 논문은 무한 단체 복합체로 일반화한다.

title: Total positivity of transformation matrices for uniform subdivisions
abstract: The transformation of the $h$-vector of a finite simplicial complex under an $\mathcal{F}$-uniform subdivision is encoded by a transformation matrix. Mu and Welker conjectured that the transformation matrix of the barycentric subdivision is totally positive. In this paper, we give a new combinatorial proof of this conjecture. We also prove the total positivity of the transformation matrix of the interval subdivision. In addition, we establish a sufficient condition for the transformation matrix of a uniform subdivision to be totally positive of order $2$ (TP$_2$), thereby partially answering a question of Mu and Welker. As an application, we show that the transformation matrix of the $r$-colored barycentric subdivision is TP$_2$.
relevance_reason: 단순 복합체의 h-벡터 변환과 전양성(total positivity) 문제로, McMullen's problem의 convex position과 일반적 점 배치 문제와는 직접적 관련성이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 균일 세분화(uniform subdivision)에서 h-벡터의 변환 행렬이 전양성(totally positive)을 가지는 조건을 연구한다. Mu-Welker 추측인 중심 세분화(barycentric subdivision)의 변환 행렬 전양성을 조합론적으로 증명하고, 구간 세분화(interval subdivision)의 전양성 및 TP₂ 조건을 확립한다.
technique: 단순 복합체의 조합론적 구조와 h-벡터 변환 행렬의 전양성 성질을 이용한 조합론적 증명

title: $L^p$-form of the KNRS conjecture
abstract: The Kohayakawa--Nagle--Rödl--Schacht conjecture predicts that locally dense graphs contain, asymptotically, at least as many homomorphic copies of any fixed graph as the random graph of the same edge density. We prove that every graph with at least one edge satisfies a natural $L^p$ relaxation of this conjecture in the graphon setting. More precisely, let $F$ be a graph with $m>0$ edges, and let $n$ be the number of non-isolated vertices of $F$. If $$   p\ge \binom {n}{2}/m, $$ then for every $ρ$-locally dense graphon $W$, $$   t(F,W^{\circ p})\ge ρ^{pm}. $$ Equivalently, if $$   W_F(\mathbf x)=\prod_{ij\in E(F)}W(x_i,x_j), $$ then $$   \|W_F\|_{L^p}\ge ρ^{e(F)}. $$ The proof is based on a Hölder uniformization over vertex relabellings, in the spirit of Conlon--Lee. We also prove a more general comparison principle with edge-transitive KNRS supergraphs, yielding sharper exponents whenever $F$ embeds into an edge-transitive KNRS graph. Finally, positive-semidefinite methods give theta-subdivision results: Sidorenko-good graphs are closed under arbitrary uniform theta-subdivisions; the non-uniform theta theorem of Im--Li--Liu admits a Sidorenko-good lift, under the same divisibility assumptions, after removing the parity restriction; and uniform theta-subdivisions of KNRS graphs are regular-KNRS.
relevance_reason: 이산기하학 및 oriented matroid, 점 배치 일반화 문제와 무관하며, 그래프 준동형사상과 graphon 이론의 확률적 조합론 문제에 집중.
summary: 본 논문은 Kohayakawa–Nagle–Rödl–Schacht 추측의 $L^p$ 완화 형태를 graphon 설정에서 증명한다. 국소 밀집 그래프원에서 고정 그래프 $F$의 준동형사상 개수가 같은 간선 밀도의 무작위 그래프보다 많다는 주장을 $L^p$ 노름 부등식으로 일반화했다.
technique: Hölder 균일화(uniformization)를 정점 재라벨링에 대해 적용하고, 양정치 반정부호(positive-semidefinite) 방법을 활용한 theta-subdivision 결과.

title: Transition Matrices between Shifted $t$-Schur Bases and Cyclotomic Schur $Q$-Positivity
abstract: For a strict partition $λ$, let $\mathcal Q_λ(X;t)=Q_λ[X-tX]$ be the shifted $t$-Schur function arising from the modified Greaves--Jing--Zhu operator on the odd power-sum ring. We study transition matrices between the shifted bases with parameters $t$ and $s$. The relative scaling operator is diagonal in the odd power-sum basis, leading to explicit spectral data, determinant and trace formulas, weighted symmetry, a spin-character formula, and a transition Cauchy identity.   For the cyclotomic specialization $C_{λμ}^{[M]}(t)=C_{λμ}(t^M,t)$, the relative operator becomes plethystic substitution by $1+t+\cdots+t^{M-1}$. We prove Schur $Q$-positivity and reciprocity, derive factorization and root-of-unity rank formulas, and give an exact computation method. For $M=2$, all one-row transitions are computed explicitly, and the nonzero coefficients are unimodal.
relevance_reason: Schur 함수의 기저 변환과 조합론적 양성(positivity)을 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, 또는 polyhedral structure와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: shifted $t$-Schur 함수 $\mathcal{Q}_λ(X;t)$에 대한 기저 변환 행렬을 연구하며, cyclotomic 특수화에서 Schur $Q$-positivity를 증명하고, plethystic 대체 구조를 통해 전이 행렬의 명시적 공식과 인수분해를 도출한다.
technique: odd power-sum basis에서의 스펙트럼 데이터 분석, plethystic substitution, Schur $Q$-positivity 증명

title: For edge-color-critical graphs, non-$r$-partite spectral extremal graphs are edge extremal
abstract: A graph is non-$r$-partite if its chromatic number exceeds $r$. For an edge-color-critical graph $F$ with $χ(F)=r+1$, let $\mathrm{ex}_{r+1,ρ}(n,F)$ be the maximum adjacency spectral radius among non-$r$-partite $F$-free graphs of order $n$, and let $\mathrm{EX}_{r+1,ρ}(n,F)$ and $\mathrm{EX}_{r+1}(n,F)$ be the families of such graphs attaining, respectively, this maximum spectral radius and the maximum number of edges $\mathrm{ex}_{r+1}(n,F)$. Fang and Zhai conjectured that $\mathrm{EX}_{r+1,ρ}(n,F)\subseteq\mathrm{EX}_{r+1}(n,F)$ for every such $F$ and all large $n$. In this paper, we prove this inclusion under the hypothesis $\mathrm{ex}_{r+1}(n,F)=|E(T_{n,r})|-\lfloor n/r\rfloor+O(1)$, where $T_{n,r}$ is the Turán graph, together with a structural condition on the sub-decomposition family of $F$. As the main application, for $F=K_{1,1,t_3,\ldots,t_{r+1}}$ with $t_3,\ldots,t_{r+1}\ge 2$ we show   \[   \mathrm{ex}_{r+1}(n,F)=|E(T_{n,r})|-\Bigl\lfloor\frac nr\Bigr\rfloor+2(t_{\min}-1),   \qquad t_{\min}:=\min\{t_3,\ldots,t_{r+1}\},   \]   for all sufficiently large $n$, and deduce that $\mathrm{EX}_{r+1,ρ}(n,F)\subseteq\mathrm{EX}_{r+1}(n,F)$.
relevance_reason: 논문은 극값 그래프 이론(extremal graph theory)의 색칠수(chromatic number) 제약 조건 하에서 스펙트럼 반경과 간선 수의 관계를 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, realizability 등 기하학적·조합적 구조와는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 비$r$-분할 $F$-free 그래프 중 최대 인접 스펙트럼 반경을 갖는 그래프들이 최대 간선 수를 갖는 그래프들에 포함되는지를 조사한다. 특별히 완전 다중분할 그래프 $K_{1,1,t_3,\ldots,t_{r+1}}$에 대해 Turán 그래프로부터의 편차를 정확히 계산하고 포함 관계를 증명한다.
technique: 스펙트럼 반경(adjacency spectral radius) 분석과 Turán-type 간선 계산, 부분분해(sub-decomposition) 구조 조건을 활용한 극값 그래프 특성화.

title: Peres--Schlag's nonempty-interior problem and a shifted-product variant for product sets
abstract: We study finite-field analogues of the Peres--Schlag nonempty-interior problem for product sets. Given \(A\subseteq\mathbb F_p\), we ask when a suitable one-dimensional linear image of \(A^n\) is full; equivalently, when there exist coefficients \(t_1,\ldots,t_n\in\mathbb F_p\) such that \[   t_1A+\cdots+t_nA=\mathbb F_p. \] For \(n\ge3\), we prove that, for every \(η>0\), this holds whenever \[   |A|\gg_{n,η} p^{\frac{3}{2n-1}+η}. \] This improves the exponent predicted by the direct product-set analogue of the Peres--Schlag threshold, namely \(|A|\gg p^{2/n}\). We also prove a two-dimensional near-half-density result.   Motivated by sum-product phenomena, we also introduce and study a product-type variant in which linear forms are replaced by shifted product maps. We prove finite-field covering results for shifted products \[   (t_1 + A)(t_2 + A)\cdots(t_n + A) \] at the same density scale as in the linear case. Finally, we prove a Euclidean shifted-product analogue: if \(A\subseteq\mathbb R\) is Borel and \(\dim_H A>2/n\), then some shifted product of \(n\) copies of \(A\) contains a nonempty open interval.
relevance_reason: 유한체 product set의 covering 문제를 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 핵심인 convex position, oriented matroid, realizability와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 유한체 $\mathbb{F}_p$에서 집합 $A$의 linear image $t_1A+\cdots+t_nA$가 전체 체를 덮을 조건을 연구하고, shifted product variant $(t_1+A)(t_2+A)\cdots(t_n+A)$에 대한 covering 결과를 증명함. Hausdorff dimension 조건을 통해 Euclidean 버전도 제시함.
technique: 유한체 및 실수 위에서의 product set covering과 sum-product 현상(sum-product phenomena) 활용.

title: 3-Colouring Graphs Excluding a Fixed Minor
abstract: We show that, for every fixed graph $H$, every $n$-vertex graph $G$ that excludes $H$ as a minor is $3$-colourable with clustering $O_H(n^{4/9})$. That is, there exists a function $f$ such that for every graph $H$, every $n\ge 1$, every $n$-vertex graph $G$ that excludes $H$ as a minor has a vertex colouring with $3$ colours in which each monochromatic component has size at most $f(H)\cdot n^{4/9}$. This generalizes a recent result of Dujmović, Morin, Norin, and Wood (\textit{arXiv}:2507.03163) from planar graphs to all proper minor-closed graph classes and is the first improvement on clustered $3$-colouring of proper minor-closed graph classes since the upper bound of $O_H(\sqrt{n})$ due to Linial, Matoušek, Sheffet, and Tardos (\textit{Comb. Prob. Comput.}, \textbf{17}(4):577--589, 2008).
relevance_reason: 3-colouring of minor-closed graph classes는 이산기하학의 combinatorial structure를 다루지만, McMullen's problem(d=5 convex polytopes의 face vector characterization)과는 직접적인 관련성이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 H를 minor로 제외하는 모든 n-vertex 그래프가 clustering $O_H(n^{4/9})$를 가지는 3-colourability를 가짐을 보인다. 이는 평면그래프에 대한 최근 결과를 모든 proper minor-closed graph classes로 일반화하며, 2008년 이후 이 분야의 첫 번째 개선이다.
technique: clustered coloring의 clustering bound를 minor-excluded graphs에 대해 $O(\sqrt{n})$에서 $O(n^{4/9})$로 개선하는 기법 (구체적 방법은 초록에 미제시)

title: On the Spectrum of the Line Graph of a Family of Bipartite Graphs Arising from the Boolean Lattice
abstract: The Boolean lattice $BL_n$, $n\geq 3$, is the graph whose vertex set is the collection of all subsets of $[n]=\{1,2,\ldots,n\}$, where two subsets $U$ and $W$ are adjacent if and only if their symmetric difference has precisely one element. In the graph $BL_n$, the \emph{layer} $L_k$ is the family of all $k$-element subsets of $[n]$. The subgraph $BL_n(k-1,k)$ is the induced subgraph of $BL_n$ on layers $L_{k-1}$ and $L_{k}$. This graph is bipartite and, when $n=2k-1$, is $k$-regular and isomorphic to the bipartite double cover $2{\cdot}O_k$ of the odd graph $O_k$. In this paper, we determine the full adjacency spectrum -- eigenvalues together with their multiplicities -- of the line graph $L(BL_n(k-1,k))$ for all admissible values of $n$ and $k$. As a consequence, we show that $L(BL_n(k-1,k))$ is an integral graph whenever $n = 2k-1$, and we recover as a special case the spectrum of the line graph $L(n)$ of $BL_n(1,2)$ established by Mirafzal~\cite{pap-sm-1}.
relevance_reason: Boolean lattice의 spectral 분석은 조합론의 기초 구조를 다루지만, McMullen's problem(점의 convex position, oriented matroid, tope graph)과는 직접적 관련성 없음.
summary: Boolean lattice $BL_n$의 층(layer) $L_{k-1}$과 $L_k$로 유도된 이분 그래프 $BL_n(k-1,k)$의 line graph $L(BL_n(k-1,k))$의 전체 인접 스펙트럼(고유값과 중복도)을 결정했다. 특히 $n=2k-1$일 때 integral graph임을 보이고, 이전 결과를 일반화한다.
technique: 인접 스펙트럼의 직접 계산 및 특성화(eigenvalues and multiplicities determination).

title: Structure of Cayley Codes
abstract: Cayley codes, introduced by Kaufman and Wigderson, are linear codes constructed from a Cayley graph and a smaller linear code. We explore general properties of the class of Cayley codes for finite groups. In particular we give a reduction to Cayley codes for connected Cayley graphs that maintains code properties such as rate, minimum distance and symmetry. Also, for a given Cayley code, we identify a family of symmetric Cayley codes, each associated with a normal edge-transitive Cayley graph, such that the given Cayley code embeds into the direct sum of the symmetric Cayley codes. We analyse several families of examples, in particular studying the behaviour of the Cayley code construction under forming direct products and cartesian products of Cayley graphs, and we pose a number of open questions.
relevance_reason: Cayley codes는 coding theory와 group theory의 결합이며, McMullen's problem은 볼록기하학과 oriented matroid의 조합론적 구조에 관한 것으로 직접 관련성이 없음.
summary: 이 논문은 Kaufman과 Wigderson이 도입한 Cayley codes를 연구하며, 유한군에 대한 Cayley graphs에서 구성된 선형 코드의 일반적 성질을 탐구한다. 연결된 Cayley graphs로의 축소, 대칭성 보존, 그리고 직곱과 직합 구조 하에서의 행동을 분석한다.
technique: Cayley graphs의 normal edge-transitive 부분구조를 통한 symmetric Cayley codes의 embedding 방법과 직곱/직합 구조의 코드 이론적 분석.

title: The signless Laplacian spectral radius of graphs without disjoint cliques
abstract: A graph $G$ is $(t+1)K_{r+1}$-free if it contains no $t+1$ pairwise vertex-disjoint copies of $K_{r+1}$. Moon [Canad. J. Math. 20 (1968) 95-102] and Simonovits [Theory of Graphs (Proc. Colloq., Tihany, 1966)] independently determined that, for sufficiently large $n$, $K_{t}\vee T_{r}(n-t)$ is the unique $n$-vertex $(t+1)K_{r+1}$-free graph with the maximum number of edges. In 2023, Ni, Wang and Kang [Electron. J. Combin. 30 (2023) \#P1.20] showed that the graph $K_{t}\vee T_{r}(n-t)$ is also the unique adjacency spectral extremal graph over all $n$-vertex $(t+1)K_{r+1}$-free graphs for sufficiently large $n$. In this paper, for $r\geq 3$ and $t\geq 0$, we prove that $K_{t}\vee T_r(n-t)$ is the unique graph attaining the maximum signless Laplacian spectral radius among all $(t+1)K_{r+1}$-free graphs of sufficiently large order $n$.
relevance_reason: 그래프 스펙트럼 극값 문제이나 McMullen's problem(convex polytope의 f-vector)과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 $(t+1)K_{r+1}$-free 그래프(서로소인 clique $t+1$개를 포함하지 않음) 중에서 signless Laplacian spectral radius를 최대화하는 그래프를 특성화한다. 충분히 큰 order $n$에 대해 $K_t \vee T_r(n-t)$가 유일한 극값 그래프임을 증명하며, 이는 Moon-Simonovits의 edge 수 극값 결과와 2023년의 adjacency spectral 극값 결과를 signless Laplacian 스펙트럼으로 확장한 것이다.
technique: signless Laplacian spectral radius 분석 및 그래프 구조 극값화 기법.

title: Berge tight cycles of all lengths in hypergraphs
abstract: Given a set $R$ of positive integers, an $R$-graph $H = (V, E)$ is a hypergraph where the cardinality of each hyperedge belongs to $R$. If $R = \{r\}$, we sometimes refer to the hypergraph as an $r$-graph rather than an $R$-graph. For a set $S \subseteq V$, let $d_H(S)$ denote the number of hyperedges of $H$ containing $S$. Given a nonnegative integer $s$, the minimum $s$-degree $δ_s(H)$ is the minimum of $d_H(S)$ over all $s$-vertex subsets $S$ of $V$. Let $r$ and $t$ be positive integers with $r < t$. We denote by $C_t^r$ the $t$-vertex $r$-uniform tight cycle, which is an $r$-graph with at least three hyperedges whose vertices admit a cyclic ordering such that every $r$ consecutive vertices form a hyperedge. In particular, $C_t^2$ is the classical cycle $C_t$ in $2$-graphs. For hypergraphs $F$ and $H$, we say that $H$ is a Berge-$F$ if there exist an injection $f \colon V(F) \to V(H)$ and a bijection $g \colon E(F) \to E(H)$ such that $\{f(v): v \in e\} \subseteq g(e)$ for all $e \in E(F)$.   Lu and Wang [Discrete Math. 344 (2021), 112462] proved that every $[3]$-graph $H$ on $n \geq 6$ vertices with $δ_2(H) \geq 1$ contains a Berge-$C_t$ for all $3 \leq t \leq n$. In this paper, we prove that for any positive integer $r$ and any set $R \subseteq [k]$ with $k \geq 2$, there exists an integer $n_0 = n_0(k,r)$ such that every $R$-graph $H$ on $n \geq n_0$ vertices with $δ_r(H) \geq 1$ contains a Berge-$C_t^r$ for all $r+1 \leq t \leq n$. In particular, when $k = 4$ and $r = 3$, we show that every $[4]$-graph $H$ on $n \geq 9$ vertices with $δ_3(H) \geq 1$ contains a Berge-$C_t^3$ for all $4 \leq t \leq n$. We also characterize all the counterexamples when $4 \leq n \leq 8$.
relevance_reason: Berge cycles in hypergraphs는 조합론적 구조 이론이지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position·oriented matroid·chirotope 등 기하학적 도구와 직접 관련 없음.
summary: 이 논문은 minimum s-degree 조건 하에서 $R$-그래프(혼합 크기 하이퍼엣지)와 균등 하이퍼그래프가 모든 길이의 Berge tight cycle을 포함함을 증명한다. Lu-Wang의 3-그래프 결과를 일반화하여, $R$-그래프에서 $δ_r(H) ≥ 1$ 조건 아래 $r+1 ≤ t ≤ n$인 모든 Berge-$C_t^r$의 존재성을 보인다.
technique: 귀납법과 minimum degree 조건을 활용한 존재성 증명; 소수 정점 수에 대한 반례 특성화.

title: On the Marstrand projection theorem for the Assouad spectrum
abstract: Marstrand's projection theorem states that the Hausdorff dimension of the orthogonal projection of a Borel set in the plane onto lines is constant almost surely. This property extends to other notions of dimension, such as box and packing dimensions, but does not hold for the Assouad dimension. In this paper, we show that Marstrand's projection theorem also fails for the quasi-Assouad dimension and the Assouad spectrum, which interpolates between the upper box and quasi-Assouad dimensions. Additionally, we establish an almost sure lower bound for the Assouad spectrum of the projections using capacity-theoretic dimension profiles, and an almost sure upper bound for projections of bounded planar sets via an incidence geometry-inspired tube-counting argument. As an application, for a parametrised family of homogeneous self-similar sets, we obtain an almost sure upper bound for the Assouad spectrum which beats the trivial upper bound coming from the upper box dimension.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 fractal geometry와 dimension theory에 관한 것으로, McMullen's problem(convex position 점 배치, oriented matroid, chirotope 등)과 주제적 관련성이 없습니다.
summary: 본 논문은 Marstrand 정사영 정리가 Assouad spectrum과 quasi-Assouad dimension에서 실패함을 보이고, 용량-이론적 차원 프로파일과 입사기하 기반 튜브-계산 논증을 이용하여 정사영의 Assouad spectrum에 대한 거의 확실한 상·하 경계를 확립합니다. 자기유사 집합의 매개변수 족에 적용하여 상자 차원의 자명한 경계를 개선한 상한을 도출합니다.
technique: Capacity-theoretic dimension profiles와 incidence geometry 기반 tube-counting argument를 활용한 거의 확실한(almost sure) 경계 증명.

title: Multiplicity for partially ordered sets
abstract: Let $\mathcal Q=\{Q_a:a\geq1\}$ be a nested family of finite posets such that $Q_a\subseteq Q_{a+1}$ and $|Q_a|<|Q_{a+1}|$. For a poset $Q$, let $\mathcal C_t(Q)$ denote the set of all strict $t$-chains in $Q$. Given an $r$-coloring of $\mathcal C_t(Q_a)$ and posets $P_1,\ldots,P_r$, a weak copy of $P_i$ is called monochromatic of color $i$ if all $t$-chains in the copy have color $i$; the strong version is defined in the same way for induced copies. The corresponding weak and strong multiplicity parameters are the minimum possible total number of such monochromatic copies in the host poset.For the Boolean lattice $B_n$, define $E_n={(S,T,U)\in B_n^3:S\subsetneq T\subsetneq U,\ |S|+|T|=|U|}.$ For a two-coloring $χ:B_n\to{0,1}$, a triple $(S,T,U)\in E_n$ is monochromatic if $χ(S)=χ(T)=χ(U)$. Let $R^{\mathrm{arith}}_2$ be the least integer $n$ such that every two-coloring of $B_n$ contains a monochromatic triple in $E_n$, and let $M^{\mathrm{arith}}_2(B_n)$ be the minimum number of monochromatic triples in $E_n$ over all two-colorings of $B_n$. We prove that $R^{\mathrm{arith}}_2=9.$ Moreover, $|E_n|=\binom{2n}{n}-[x^n](1+x+x^2)^n-2^n+1=\frac{4^n}{\sqrt{πn}}\bigl(1+o(1)\bigr),$ and $2^{δn+o(n)}\le M^{\mathrm{arith}}_2(B_n)\le 2^{γn+o(n)}, $ where $δ\approx 1.356779$ and $γ\approx 1.567837$ are explicit entropy constants. For general nested host families, we prove a double-counting lower bound for strong poset multiplicity. For an arbitrary finite host poset $R$, we also introduce a Fourier-Möbius method and give an exact Fourier expansion for strong multiplicity, a Parseval-type error bound, and a spectral lower bound.
relevance_reason: 포집 문제(Ramsey-type results on posets)와 색칠 조합론을 다루지만, McMullen 문제(convex position의 점 배치와 oriented matroid의 구조)와는 직접적인 기하학적 또는 실현가능성(realizability) 연관성이 없음.
summary: 부분순서집합(poset)의 중복도(multiplicity)를 연구하며, 특히 Boolean lattice $B_n$의 두 가지 색칠에서 산술적 조건을 만족하는 단색 삼중쌍(monochromatic triples)의 최소 개수를 분석한다. 저자들은 $R^{\mathrm{arith}}_2=9$를 증명하고, $M^{\mathrm{arith}}_2(B_n)$에 대한 엔트로피 상수 $\delta\approx 1.356779$와 $\gamma\approx 1.567837$를 이용한 상하한을 제시한다.
technique: Fourier-Möbius 변환을 이용한 spectral 하한과 double-counting 논법을 통한 강(strong) poset 중복도 분석.

title: A Delsarte Linear Programming Approach to the Erdős--Falconer Distance Problem over Finite Fields
abstract: We introduce a Delsarte linear programming approach to the finite field Erdős--Falconer distance problem. Let \(q\) be an odd prime power, let \(n\) be even, and let \(Q\) be a non-degenerate quadratic form on \(\mathbb{F}_q^n\). For \(E\subset \mathbb{F}_q^n\), define   \[   Δ_Q(E)=\{Q(x-y):\ x,y\in E\}.   \]   We prove that, for every fixed \(0<α<\frac{1}{2}\), there exist constants \(C_α>0\) and \(q_α\) such that if \(q\ge q_α\) and $|E|\ge C_αq^{\frac n2+\frac13},$   then   \[   |Δ_Q(E)|>1+α(q-1).   \]   In particular, \(Δ_Q(E)\) contains a positive proportion of the elements of \(\mathbb{F}_q\), and hence \(|Δ_Q(E)|\gg q\).   Our result applies uniformly to all non-degenerate quadratic forms in even-dimensional finite field vector spaces. In the Euclidean case   \[   Q(x)=x_1^2+\cdots+x_n^2,   \]   it improves, for every even \(n\ge 4\) over arbitrary finite fields, the general exponent \(\frac{n+1}{2}\) obtained by Iosevich and Rudnev to $\frac n2+\frac13.$   The proof is based on the association scheme arising from the level sets of \(Q\). By analyzing the corresponding eigenvalues through Gauss sums and Kloosterman sums, we construct a suitable feasible solution to the Delsarte linear program. This provides a new algebraic-combinatorial method for obtaining distance set estimates over finite fields.
relevance_reason: 유한체 상의 거리 집합 문제로서 조합론적이지만, McMullen 문제(볼록 위치의 점 배치, oriented matroid, 실현가능성)와는 직접적 연관이 없음.
summary: 유한체 $\mathbb{F}_q^n$ 위에서 비퇴화 이차형식 $Q$에 대해 점 집합 $E$의 거리 집합 $Δ_Q(E)$의 크기를 연구한다. Delsarte 선형계획법을 사용하여, $|E| \geq C_α q^{n/2+1/3}$일 때 $|Δ_Q(E)| > 1+α(q-1)$임을 증명하며, 유클리드 경우 기존 지수 $(n+1)/2$를 $n/2+1/3$으로 개선한다.
technique: association scheme의 level set과 Gauss sum, Kloosterman sum을 통한 고유값 분석으로 Delsarte 선형계획의 feasible solution 구성.

title: A complete solution to the generalized honeymoon Oberwolfach problem with one round table
abstract: The generalized honeymoon Oberwolfach problem (HOP) asks whether it is possible to seat $2n$ participants consisting of $n$ newlywed couples at a conference with $s$ tables of size $2$ and $t$ "round'' tables of sizes $2m_1, 2m_2, \ldots, 2m_t$, where $n = s + \sum_{i=1}^{t} m_i $ with all $m_i \geq 2$, over several nights so that each participant sits next to their spouse every time and next to each other participant exactly once. We denote this problem by $HOP(2^{\langle s \rangle}, 2m_1, \ldots, 2m_t)$. In this paper, we provide a complete solution to the generalized HOP with one round table, showing that the obvious necessary conditions for $HOP(2^{\langle s \rangle}, 2m)$ to have a solution are also sufficient.
relevance_reason: 조합론의 설계 이론(design theory) 분야이나, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, polyhedral 구조와는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 generalized honeymoon Oberwolfach problem(HOP)의 완전한 해결을 제시한다. 특히 한 개의 둥근 탁자를 포함하는 경우 $HOP(2^{\langle s \rangle}, 2m)$에 대해 필요충분조건을 규명한다. 2n명의 참가자(n쌍의 신혼부부)가 여러 밤에 걸쳐 배치되는데, 각 참가자가 배우자와 항상 인접하고 다른 모든 참가자와 정확히 한 번씩 인접하도록 하는 조건을 분석한다.
technique: 그래프 분해(graph decomposition) 및 설계 이론 기법을 통한 조합적 구성.

title: Robustness and hyperstability for the Erdős-Gallai theorem
abstract: The Erdős-Gallai theorem states that every graph of average degree $d$ contains a cycle of length at least $d$. We prove the following robust extension of the Erdős-Gallai theorem: For every $c>0$ there exists $K$ such that for all $d\geq K$, $p\geq K/d$ and every graph $G$ with average degree $d$, the random graph $G_p$ obtained by independently percolating each edge of $G$ with probability $p$ contains a cycle of length $(1-c)d$ asymptotically almost surely as $|V(G)|\to \infty$. With related methods, we prove the following hyperstability version of the Erdős-Gallai theorem: any graph $G$ without a cycle of length at least $d$ is at most $c dn$ edge deletions away from a graph all of whose connected components have a vertex-cover of size $(1+c)d$.   At the core of our argument lies a very general structure theorem about graphs that originates from results of Pokrovskiy concerning the hyperstability of bounded-degree trees.
relevance_reason: Erdős-Gallai 정리는 그래프 이론의 고전 결과이며, McMullen 문제는 볼록다면체와 점 배치의 조합론적 구조에 관한 것으로 직접 관련성이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 Erdős-Gallai 정리(평균 차수 d인 그래프는 길이 d 이상의 순환을 포함)의 견고한 확장을 증명한다. 랜덤 percolation 하에서 길이 약 (1-c)d의 순환을 점근적으로 확실히 포함함을 보이고, hyperstability 버전으로 d 이상의 순환이 없는 그래프는 cd n개 간선 삭제로 제한된 vertex-cover를 갖는 그래프에 가까움을 증명한다.
technique: Pokrovskiy의 유계 차수 트리 hyperstability 결과에서 비롯된 그래프 구조 정리를 통한 일반적 접근.

title: Annihilation, Independence, and Residue: Sharp Matching Bounds for the Annihilation Gap and a TxGraffiti Application
abstract: Let $G$ be a finite simple graph. The annihilation number $a(G)$ is an efficiently computable upper bound on the independence number $α(G)$. We develop a sharp matching-number theory for the gap $a(G)-α(G)$. The strongest general theorem is the exact closed form \[a(G)-α(G)\leq 2μ(G)+1- \lceil \sqrt{6 μ(G)} \rceil \qquad(μ(G)\geq 1), \] and the bound is attained for every prescribed matching number. We also prove sharp matching-dependent bounds for forests, bipartite graphs, and König-Egerváry graphs, with equality constructions, equality certificates, and equality criteria. Finally, we treat a TxGraffiti output as a machine-conjecture case study.
