title: FFLV bases for covariant representations of $\mathfrak{gl}(m|n)$
abstract: We study the PBW filtration on covariant representations for the Lie superalgebra $\mathfrak{gl}(m|n)$. We prove for all covariant weights of the form $(λ|μ,0^{n-1})$, that there exists a lattice polytope such that the lattice points of this polytope parametrize a basis of the corresponding associated graded space. As a consequence, we obtain degenerations of partial flag supervarieties for the supergroup $GL(m|n)$ into toric supervarieties.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 Lie 초대수 $\mathfrak{gl}(m|n)$의 공변 표현에 대한 PBW 필트레이션과 토릭 퇴화를 다루며, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid와 무관하다.
summary: 이 논문은 Lie 초대수 $\mathfrak{gl}(m|n)$의 공변 표현(covariant representations)에 대한 PBW 필트레이션을 연구한다. $(\lambda|\mu, 0^{n-1})$ 형태의 모든 공변 가중치에 대해, 대응하는 associated graded 공간의 기저를 격자점(lattice points)으로 매개변수화하는 격자 다면체(lattice polytope)의 존재를 증명한다. 그 결과로, 초군 $GL(m|n)$의 부분 깃발 초다양체(partial flag supervarieties)의 토릭 초다양체(toric supervarieties)로의 퇴화(degeneration)를 얻는다.
technique: PBW 필트레이션과 FFLV(Feigin–Fourier–Littelmann–Vinberg) 기저 구성을 Lie 초대수 설정으로 확장하여 격자 다면체의 격자점으로 기저를 매개변수화한다.

title: Properties of the Tropical Characteristic Polynomial of Symmetric Matrices
abstract: We investigate the combinatorial structure of the tropical characteristic polynomial of symmetric matrices using the tropical permanents of their principal submatrices. We establish new inequalities for the leading coefficients of the tropical characteristic polynomial, revealing concavity properties of the coefficient sequence and yielding necessary conditions for a sequence to arise as the coefficient sequence of the tropical characteristic polynomial of a symmetric matrix. These results provide a deeper understanding of the structure of tropical characteristic polynomials associated with symmetric matrices.
relevance_reason: 열대기하학(tropical geometry)을 도구로 사용한다는 점에서 McMullen 문제의 접근 도구 목록과 부분적으로 겹치나, 대칭 행렬의 열대 특성다항식 계수 구조를 다루는 것으로 McMullen 문제 자체와는 직접적 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 대칭 행렬의 열대 특성다항식(tropical characteristic polynomial)의 조합론적 구조를 주요 부분행렬(principal submatrix)의 열대 퍼머넌트(tropical permanent)를 이용해 분석한다. 열대 특성다항식의 선두 계수(leading coefficients)에 대한 새로운 부등식을 확립하고, 계수 수열의 오목성(concavity) 성질을 밝힌다. 이를 통해 어떤 수열이 대칭 행렬의 열대 특성다항식의 계수 수열로 실현될 수 있는지에 대한 필요 조건을 제시한다.
technique: 주요 부분행렬의 열대 퍼머넌트를 활용하여 열대 특성다항식의 계수에 대한 부등식 및 오목성 조건을 도출.

title: Edge transmission irregular graphs
abstract: The transmission of a vertex $v$ in a connected graph $G$ is the sum of distances from $v$ to all vertices in $G$. A transmission irregular (TI) graph is a connected graph in which any two distinct vertices have different transmissions. We extend the concept of transmission to edges by defining the transmission of an edge as the sum of the transmissions of its two endpoints. A connected graph can now be called edge transmission irregular (ETI) if any two distinct edges have different transmissions. We show that almost all graphs are not ETI and then investigate several related order realizability problems involving chemical ETI graphs. In particular, we prove that for every $n \ge 15$, there exists a subcubic tree of order $n$ that is both TI and ETI.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 그래프의 transmission irregularity에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid와 전혀 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 꼭짓점의 transmission(모든 꼭짓점까지의 거리 합)을 간선으로 확장하여, 두 끝점의 transmission 합을 간선의 transmission으로 정의하고, 모든 간선의 transmission이 서로 다른 그래프를 edge transmission irregular(ETI)라 부른다. 거의 모든 그래프는 ETI가 아님을 증명하고, 화학적 ETI 그래프의 order realizability 문제를 탐구한다. 특히 $n \ge 15$인 모든 $n$에 대해 TI이면서 ETI인 subcubic tree가 존재함을 증명한다.
technique: 그래프의 거리 기반 불변량(transmission) 분석 및 subcubic tree 구성을 통한 존재성 증명.

title: Characteristic Independence of Betti Numbers of Monomial Ideals in Five Variables
abstract: Alesandroni proved that Betti numbers of monomial ideals in at most four variables are independent of the characteristic of the base field, while Peeva exhibited characteristic-dependent Betti numbers in six variables. We prove that the five-variable case is characteristic-independent. More precisely, if $S=k[x_1,\ldots,x_5]$ and $M\subseteq S$ is a monomial ideal, then the multigraded, graded, and total Betti numbers of $S/M$ are independent of $\operatorname{char}(k)$. The proof reduces arbitrary monomial ideals to squarefree twin ideals and then applies Hochster's formula. The topological input is that simplicial complexes on at most five vertices have torsion-free integral homology. Peeva's example arising from the six-vertex triangulation of $\mathbb{RP}^2$ shows that the bound is sharp. We also record a computation of the graded Betti tables of squarefree monomial ideals in five variables up to relabeling.
comment: 16 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables; code and data available at https://github.com/voltroom0606/fivevariablebettinumbers
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 단항식 아이디얼의 Betti 수의 표수 독립성에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제(볼록 위치·방향 매트로이드)와 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: Alesandroni의 4변수 결과와 Peeva의 6변수 반례 사이의 공백을 메워, 5변수 다항식 환 $S=k[x_1,\ldots,x_5]$ 위의 임의 단항식 아이디얼 $S/M$의 다중차수·차수·전체 Betti 수가 기저 체의 표수에 무관함을 증명한다. 증명의 핵심 위상학적 사실은 최대 5개의 꼭짓점을 가지는 단체 복합체(simplicial complex)가 뒤틀림 없는(torsion-free) 정수 호몰로지를 가진다는 것이며, Hochster 공식을 통해 적용된다. 6꼭짓점 $\mathbb{RP}^2$ 삼각분할에서 나오는 Peeva의 예제가 이 경계의 날카로움을 보여준다.
technique: 임의 단항식 아이디얼을 squarefree twin ideal로 환원한 뒤 Hochster 공식을 적용하고, 5꼭짓점 이하 단체 복합체의 정수 호몰로지 torsion-free 성질을 위상적 입력으로 사용한다.

title: Pulse Graphs: Prime-Activated Boolean Dynamics on Directed Graphs
abstract: We study synchronous Boolean dynamics on finite loopless directed graphs in which a vertex is active at the next time step exactly when its number of active in-neighbors is prime. We call these systems Pulse Graphs. Let $L(n)$ denote the largest attractor period realizable on $n$ vertices. Exhaustive enumeration gives \[ L(1),\ldots,L(5)=1,1,1,3,9. \] Our main result determines the exponential order of the maximum period: \[ 2^{n-3}-1\leq L(n)\leq2^n-1 \qquad(n\geq5). \] The lower bound is obtained by implementing a maximal-length affine feedback register using prime-count logic gates. For $n\geq6$, the construction is loopless, has maximum in-degree five, and uses only $O(n)$ edges.   For complete directed graphs, we derive an exact update formula, classify all attractors as fixed points or complement two-cycles, prove that every orbit reaches its eventual attractor within three updates, and count the attractors explicitly. We also derive the activation probability under independent random inputs. For sparse random directed graphs, the associated prime-Poisson mean-field map undergoes a nondegenerate fold at \[ c_\ast\approx3.824963, \qquad ρ_\ast\approx0.368241, \] with local bistability immediately above the threshold.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 유향 그래프 위의 불리언 동역학(Boolean dynamics)을 다루며, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid, 볼록 위치 점 배치와는 전혀 무관하다.
summary: 이 논문은 활성 in-neighbor 수가 소수일 때 정점이 활성화되는 동기식 불리언 동역학 'Pulse Graphs'를 연구한다. 주요 결과로 $n$개의 정점에서 실현 가능한 최대 어트랙터 주기 $L(n)$의 지수적 하한과 상한 $2^{n-3}-1 \leq L(n) \leq 2^n-1$ ($n \geq 5$)을 증명하며, 완전 유향 그래프와 희소 랜덤 유향 그래프에서의 어트랙터 분류 및 평균장 분기 분석도 제시한다.
technique: 최대 길이 affine feedback shift register를 소수-카운트 논리 게이트로 구현하여 하한을 구성하고, 완전 유향 그래프에서는 정확한 갱신 공식과 어트랙터 계수를 유도한다.

title: Finiteness of pseudo-Anosov flows without perfect fits
abstract: We show that a fixed closed 3-manifold admits at most finitely many pseudo-Anosov flows without perfect fits and deduce finiteness of veering triangulations in a fixed 3-manifold.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 3-다양체 위의 pseudo-Anosov 흐름과 veering triangulation의 유한성에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제(볼록 위치, oriented matroid, 점 배치)와 직접적 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 고정된 닫힌 3-다양체에서 perfect fits가 없는 pseudo-Anosov 흐름이 유한히 많음을 증명한다. 이로부터 고정된 3-다양체 내의 veering triangulation의 유한성도 도출된다.
technique: 초록만으로는 구체적 기법 불확실.

title: Dimension-free cotype for isotropic log-concave random polytope spaces
abstract: Let $X_1,\ldots,X_N$ be independent random vectors in $\mathbb{R}^n$ with common isotropic log-concave distribution $μ$ and set $P_{N,n}^μ:=\operatorname{conv}\{\pm X_i:1\leqslant i\leqslant N\}$. Assume that $N/n=γ\geqslant γ_0$ where $γ_0>1$ is an absolute constant. We prove that with probability at least $1-Cγ\exp(-c n^{1/4})$ every $k$-dimensional subspace $E$ of $(\mathbb{R}^n,\|\cdot\|_{P_{N,n}^μ})$ satisfies $d_{\mathrm{BM}} (E,\ell_\infty^k) \geqslant cγ^{-C}k^α$ for every $1\leqslant k\leqslant n$ where $c,C,α>0$ are absolute constants. Consequently, with the same probability, $(\mathbb{R}^n,\|\cdot\|_{P_{N,n}^μ})$ has cotype $q(γ)<\infty$ with cotype constant depending only on $γ$, in particular the cotype exponent and the cotype constant are independent of $n$ and of $μ$. The proof adapts the deterministic coefficient scheme of Huang-Tikhomirov replacing the Gaussian estimates in their argument by estimates for isotropic log-concave random matrices. As an application, using the log-concave extension of Gluskin's theorem, we obtain a separable Banach space of finite cotype for which the Banach-Mazur diameter of its $k$-dimensional subspaces is of order $k$ and whose finite-dimensional building blocks are generated by isotropic log-concave random polytopes.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 등방성 로그-오목 랜덤 폴리토프 공간의 cotype에 관한 함수해석학/확률론 결과로, McMullen 문제(볼록 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid, chirotope 등)와 직접적 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 $N/n = \gamma \geq \gamma_0 > 1$ 조건 하에, 독립적인 등방성 로그-오목 분포를 따르는 벡터들로 생성된 랜덤 폴리토프 $P_{N,n}^\mu$에 대응하는 노름 공간이 $n$과 $\mu$에 무관한 유한 cotype $q(\gamma) < \infty$를 가짐을 높은 확률로 증명한다. 증명은 Huang-Tikhomirov의 결정론적 계수 스킴을 등방성 로그-오목 랜덤 행렬 추정치로 대체·적용하는 방식으로 진행된다. 응용으로서, Gluskin 정리의 로그-오목 확장을 이용해 $k$-차원 부분공간의 Banach-Mazur 지름이 $k$ 차수인 유한 cotype의 분리 가능 Banach 공간을 구성한다.
technique: Huang-Tikhomirov의 결정론적 계수 스킴(coefficient scheme)을 등방성 로그-오목 랜덤 행렬에 대한 추정치로 적응시켜 차원 독립적 cotype 상수를 도출.

title: Dense Subset Sum in Multi-Dimension
abstract: We study the additive structure of dense subset sum in multi-dimension, and use the structure to develop efficient algorithms for the dense subset sum problem. More precisely, given a set $A$ of $n$ vectors in the $d$-dimensional hyperrectangle $[N_1]\times [N_2]\times\cdots\times [N_d]$, we study the structure of $\mathcal{S}(A)$, which is the set of all subset sums of $A$. We focus on the dense regime of the problem where $n \gg \sqrtΦ$ and $Φ= N_1 \times \cdots \times N_d$.   We show that for any constant $d\geq 1$, if $n \gg \sqrtΦ$, then $\mathcal{S}(A)$ contains a long generalized progression in multi-dimension. If we further have that no non-trivial lattice can contain the majority of $A$, then $\mathcal{S}(A)$ contains all the integer points in the zonotope $\{x_1\vec{a}_1 + \cdots + x_n\vec{a}_n: o(1)\leq x_j \leq 1-o(1), x_j \in \mathbb{R}\}$. Compared to the previous results for $d \geq 2$, our result significantly reduces the density threshold and enlarges the region inside which all the integer points belong to $\mathcal{S}(A)$. Also, it matches the bound for the 1-dimensional case.   Using our combinatorics result, we also develop an $\tilde{O}(n)$-time algorithm for the dense subset sum problem in multi-dimension.
comment: A preliminary version to appear in FOCS'26
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 다차원 부분집합 합(subset sum) 문제의 조밀 구조와 알고리즘을 다루며, McMullen 문제·oriented matroid·볼록 위치 점 배치와는 직접적 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 $d$차원 초직사각형 $[N_1]\times\cdots\times[N_d]$ 위의 $n$개 벡터 집합 $A$에 대해 $n\gg\sqrt{\Phi}$ ($\Phi=N_1\cdots N_d$)인 조밀 체제에서 부분집합 합의 집합 $\mathcal{S}(A)$의 구조를 분석한다. 주요 결과로, 비자명 격자가 $A$의 대부분을 포함하지 않는 조건 하에서 $\mathcal{S}(A)$는 조노토프(zonotope) 내부의 모든 정수점을 포함함을 보이며, 이는 $d\geq 2$인 경우의 기존 결과보다 밀도 임계값을 크게 낮추고 1차원 결과와 일치한다. 또한 이 조합론적 결과를 활용하여 다차원 조밀 부분집합 합 문제를 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 시간에 해결하는 알고리즘을 제시한다.
technique: 다차원 일반화 산술 진행(generalized arithmetic progression) 구조 분석과 격자 조건을 결합하여 조노토프 내 정수점 포함을 증명하고, 이를 기반으로 선형 시간 알고리즘을 설계한다.

title: Free products, extremal matroids, and a generalization of perfect matroid designs
abstract: Extremal matroids are those that yield vertices in the polytope of matroids. We show how to get the point, in the appropriate polytope of matroids, for the free product $M\square M'$ of matroids $M$ and $M'$ from the points for $M$ and $M'$ in their polytopes of matroids. With this we show that if $M\square M'$ is extremal, then $M$ and $M'$ are extremal. The converse is false. We identify a large class of matroids that includes perfect matroid designs and sparse paving matroids, and we find sufficient conditions under which free products of extremal matroids in this class are extremal.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 matroid의 free product와 extremal matroid에 관한 연구로, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid의 acyclic reorientation과 직접적 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 matroid polytope의 꼭짓점을 이루는 extremal matroid를 연구하며, free product $M \square M'$의 polytope 상의 점이 $M$과 $M'$ 각각의 점으로부터 어떻게 결정되는지를 보인다. $M \square M'$이 extremal이면 $M$과 $M'$ 모두 extremal임을 증명하지만, 역은 성립하지 않음을 보인다. 또한 perfect matroid design과 sparse paving matroid를 포함하는 넓은 matroid 클래스를 식별하고, 이 클래스 내 extremal matroid들의 free product가 extremal이 되기 위한 충분조건을 제시한다.
technique: Matroid polytope 상의 점 표현을 이용하여 free product 연산의 extremality 보존 여부를 분석하는 다면체적 접근법.

title: Two-block cycles and chromatic number of Hamiltonian digraphs
abstract: Let $k$ and $\ell$ be positive integers. The family $C(k,\ell)$ consists of all digraphs obtained from two internally vertex-disjoint directed paths of lengths at least $k$ and $\ell$, respectively, and identifying their initial vertices and their terminal vertices. Addario-Berry, Havet and Thomassé (JCT-B, 2007) asked whether, for any positive integers $k$ and $\ell$ with $k+\ell \ge 4$, the chromatic number $χ(D)$ is at most $k+\ell-1$ for every $C(k,\ell)$-free strongly connected digraph $D$. Let $D$ be a $C(k,\ell)$-free Hamiltonian digraph. Kim, Kim, Ma and Park (JGT, 2018) showed that $χ(D) \le k+\ell$ and the bound is attained when $k+\ell=5$. In this paper, we prove that $χ(D) \le k+\ell-1$ for $k+\ell\ge 6$ and this bound is best possible for all $k+\ell\geq 6$, which resolves the problem posed by Addario-Berry, Havet and Thomassé for Hamiltonian digraphs.
relevance_reason: 본 논문은 방향 그래프의 색수(chromatic number) 문제를 다루며, McMullen's problem은 볼록 위치의 점 배치와 oriented matroid의 조합 기하학 문제로 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 두 개의 내부 정점 분리 경로로 구성된 방향 그래프 족 $C(k,\ell)$을 다룬다. $C(k,\ell)$-자유 해밀턴 방향 그래프의 색수가 $k+\ell-1$ 이하임을 증명하며, 이는 Addario-Berry, Havet, Thomassé의 문제를 해밀턴 그래프에 대해 해결한다.
technique: 방향 그래프의 구조적 성질과 해밀턴 경로 존재 조건을 활용한 색수 상한 증명.

title: Sufficient conditions for $(K_2 \cup kK_1)$-free graphs to be Hamilton-connected
abstract: The toughness of a non-complete graph $G$, denoted $τ(G)$, is defined as \[ τ(G) = \min\left\{ \frac{|S|}{ω(G-S)} : S \subseteq V(G),\ ω(G-S) \geq 2 \right\}, \] where $ω(G-S)$ is the number of components of $G - S$. For a complete graph $G$, we define $τ(G) = \infty$. A graph $G$ is $t$-tough if $τ(G) \geq t$. For a positive integer $k$, a graph $G$ is $(K_2 \cup kK_1)$-free if it contains no induced subgraph isomorphic to $K_2 \cup kK_1$. Recently, Liu \cite{liu} showed that every $2k$-connected $(K_2 \cup kK_1)$-free graph $G$ with $τ(G) > 1$ is Hamilton-connected. In this paper, we strengthen this result by proving that every $(k+1)$-connected $(K_2 \cup kK_1)$-free graph $G$ with $τ(G) > 1$ and minimum degree $δ(G) \geq 2k$ is Hamilton-connected. Moreover, by imposing restrictions to the independence number $α(G)$, we prove that every $k$-connected $(K_2 \cup kK_1)$-free graph $G$ of order $n$ with $2k+1 \leq α(G) < \frac{n}{2}$ and $δ(G) \geq 2k$ is Hamilton-connected, and that the bounds on $α(G)$ are sharp.
relevance_reason: Hamilton-connectivity 조건은 점 배치와 볼록 위치(convex position) 문제와 무관한 그래프 이론의 순환 경로 문제.
summary: 본 논문은 $(K_2 \cup kK_1)$-free 그래프에서 Hamilton-connected 성질을 보이기 위한 충분조건들을 연구한다. 특히 연결성(connectivity), toughness, 최소차수(minimum degree), 독립수(independence number) 제약 조건 하에서 Hamilton-connectedness를 보인다.
technique: 그래프의 toughness, connectivity, 최소차수, 독립수 등 그래프 불변량들의 상한 조건 설정을 통한 조합론적 논증.

title: Improving Upper Bounds for the Maximum Clique Problem using Reduction Rules
abstract: We study the interaction between reduction rules and upper-bound functions for the Maximum Clique Problem (MCP). We show how MCP upper-bound functions can strengthen classical core and truss reductions by replacing local size conditions with upper-bound tests. This leads to the \((k,ω^u)\)-core, the \((k,ω^u)\)-truss, and the more general \((k,d,ω^u)\)-truss, where the parameter \(d\) controls the trade-off between stronger reductions and additional computational cost. For each of these notions, we prove clique-preservation properties, correctness of the corresponding peeling algorithm, and running-time bounds. Based on these reductions, we introduce a general framework for improving upper-bound values for MCP. We give two concrete instantiations of the framework: one that uses only the combined truss and core reductions, and one that combines the truss and core reductions with repeated applications of structions. Computational experiments on 73 benchmark graphs show that the proposed reductions can substantially improve several standard upper-bound functions and that combining multiple reduction methods can be beneficial in practice. In particular, the combination of structions, truss and core reductions with a DSatur-based bound often reached SDP-level upper-bound values faster than direct SDP computation; on the tested graphs with edge density below \(0.7\), it did so in every case. Using the truss and core reduction with the Lovász theta upper-bound function, we also improve the previously best certified integer upper-bound values for three difficult DIMACS instances whose exact clique numbers are not known. In particular, we improve upper-bound values for graph   \texttt{C500.9} from 83 to 73, for graph \texttt{C1000.9} from 122 to 115, and for graph \texttt{C2000.9} from 177 to 168.
relevance_reason: 최대클리크 문제의 상한 개선은 McMullen's problem (볼록 위치의 점 집합에서 라인어 프로그래밍과 관련된 고차원 조합 기하)과 무관함.
summary: 본 논문은 최대클리크 문제(MCP)의 상한값 개선을 위해 축소 규칙(reduction rules)과 상한 함수(upper-bound functions)의 상호작용을 연구한다. (k,ω^u)-core, (k,ω^u)-truss, (k,d,ω^u)-truss 등의 새로운 축소 개념을 도입하고, 이들의 클리크 보존성과 실행 시간 복잡도를 분석한다. 제안된 프레임워크를 73개 벤치마크 그래프에 적용하여 여러 표준 상한 함수를 개선했으며, 특히 DIMACS 어려운 인스턴스 3개에서 인증된 정수 상한값을 크게 향상시켰다.
technique: 축소된 그래프 구조(core, truss)에 상한 테스트를 통합하여 classical peeling algorithm을 강화하고, 이를 구조적 축소(struts)와 여러 상한 함수(DSatur, Lovász theta)와 결합하는 프레임워크.

title: Changes in the Seidel energy of blow-up graphs under edge deletion
abstract: Let $S(G)$ denote the Seidel matrix of a simple graph $G$, and let $E_S(G)$ be the Seidel energy of $G$, defined as the sum of the absolute values of the eigenvalues of $S(G)$. In this paper, we study the change of Seidel energy under edge deletion. For an independent-set blow-up graph $G=H[n_1,\ldots,n_p]$, we establish a general structural criterion within the framework of independent-set blow-up graphs. More precisely, if the endpoints of the deleted edge $e$ belong to blow-up parts of sizes $n_a$ and $n_b$, respectively, then $E_S(G-e)>E_S(G)$ whenever both $n_a,n_b$ are at least $4$, or one is $3$ and the other is at least $6$, or one is $2$ and the other is at least $15$.   As applications, we obtain the following consequences. First, for every Turán graph $T(n,r)$ with $r\geq4$ and $n\geq4r$, deleting any edge strictly increases the Seidel energy. Second, for complete multipartite graphs, we derive an exact reduced-order spectral criterion for the remaining cases not covered by the structural result. This criterion determines whether the Seidel energy increases, decreases, or remains unchanged after deleting an edge, by using matrices whose orders depend only on the number of partite sets. These results provide affirmative answers to two problems proposed by Tian et al. [\textit{Linear and Multilinear Algebra} 70 (19) (2022), 4597--4614].
relevance_reason: Seidel 행렬의 고유값과 에너지 변화를 연구하는 스펙트럼 그래프 이론 문제로, McMullen's problem의 점 배치·combinatorial geometry와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 독립집합 blow-up 그래프에서 간선 삭제 시 Seidel 에너지의 변화를 연구하며, 삭제된 간선의 끝점이 속한 blow-up 부분의 크기에 따라 에너지가 증가하는 조건을 확립했다. Turán 그래프와 완전 다중분할 그래프에 대해 구체적인 준거기준을 도출하였다.
technique: 행렬의 고유값 분석과 독립집합 blow-up 그래프의 스펙트럼 구조 특성화.

title: Hamiltonicity of Cartesian products of trees with odd paths
abstract: A $\{P_2,P_3\}$-factor in a graph $G$ is a factor of $G$ in which every component is a path on two or three vertices. Let $T\Box P_n$ be the Cartesian product of a tree $T$ and a path on $n$ vertices. Kao and Weng proved that $T\Box P_n$ is hamiltonian if $T$ has a path factor and $n$ is a sufficiently large even integer. In this article we prove that, for every odd $n$, there exists a tree $T$ of maximum degree 4 that has a $\{P_2,P_3\}$-factor such that $T\Box P_n$ is not hamiltonian, thereby refuting a conjecture by Kao and Weng.
relevance_reason: 그래프의 Hamiltonicity와 경로 인수분해(path factorization)를 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, 실현가능성(realizability) 등과는 직접적 연관이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 트리 T와 홀수 경로 $P_n$의 카르테시안 곱 $T \Box P_n$의 해밀턴성을 연구한다. Kao와 Weng의 추측을 반박하여, 최대차수 4인 트리 T가 $\{P_2, P_3\}$-인수를 가지면서도 모든 홀수 n에 대해 $T \Box P_n$이 해밀턴 경로를 갖지 않는 반례를 구성했다.
technique: 경로 인수분해($\{P_2, P_3\}$-factor)와 카르테시안 곱의 구조적 성질을 이용한 반례 구성.

title: An Erdős-Pósa theorem for cycles and faces of distinct lengths
abstract: We show that for every $k \in \mathbb{N}$, every graph $G$ contains $k$ vertex-disjoint cycles of different lengths, or there exists a set $X \subseteq V(G)$ with $|X| \in \mathcal{O}(k^6\mathsf{polylog}(k))$ such that $G-X$ has at most $k-1$ cycle lengths.   We also prove analogous results for facial lengths of embedded graphs. Let $G$ be a graph with a closed 2-cell embedding $ψ$ on a surface $Σ$ of Euler genus $g$, let $c$ be a colouring of the faces $\mathcal{F}(ψ)$ of $ψ$, and let $R(G,ψ)$ be the radial graph of $(G, ψ)$. Then there exist $k$ faces $F_1, \ldots , F_k \in \mathcal{F}(ψ)$ that are given pairwise distinct colours by $c$ and are pairwise at distance at least $d$ in $ψ$, or there exists a set $X \subseteq V(G)$ of order at most $\mathcal{O}(k^2dg)$ such that $|\{ c(F) \mid F \in \mathcal{F}(ψ) \text{ and } V(F) \cap \bigcup_{x \in X} N^d_{R(G,ψ)}(x) = \emptyset \}| \leq k(k+2)$.   Finally, using a result from additive combinatorics, we show that there are subdivided ladders with only a small number of cycle lengths. This suggests that it may be difficult to improve our bounds.
relevance_reason: 본 논문은 그래프의 사이클 길이 다양성에 관한 Erdős-Pósa 유형 정리를 다루며, McMullen's problem의 convex position, general position, oriented matroid 등 이산기하학적 구조와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 모든 그래프 $G$가 $k$개의 서로 다른 길이의 정점-분리 사이클을 포함하거나, $G-X$가 $k-1$개 이하의 사이클 길이를 가지도록 하는 크기 $O(k^6\mathsf{polylog}(k))$의 정점 집합 $X$가 존재함을 보인다. 임베드된 그래프의 면(face) 길이에 대한 유사한 결과도 증명한다.
technique: 그래프 분해 및 Erdős-Pósa 타입의 이분법적 접근법(dichotomy argument)을 사용한 구조적 정리.

title: Proofs of two conjectures on generalizations of Brouwer's Laplacian conjecture
abstract: Let $G=(V,E)$ be a simple graph of order $n$ and let $λ_1(G)\ge \cdots \ge λ_n(G)$ be the eigenvalues of its Laplacian matrix. Brouwer conjectured that for every $1\le k\le n$, $\sum_{i=1}^kλ_i(G)\le |E|+\binom{k+1}{2}$, which was recently confirmed by Kothari and Tudose. Before Brouwer's conjecture was proved, Lew (JCT-B, 2026) established a weaker form of Brouwer's Laplacian eigenvalue inequality and proposed two conjectures for upper bounds on the sum of the $k$ largest Laplacian eigenvalues, one in terms of the matching number and the other in terms of the vertex-cover number. Using Brouwer's Laplacian inequality, we prove both conjectures.
relevance_reason: Laplacian 고유값 부등식과 매칭·정점 덮개 수의 관계로, McMullen's problem의 oriented matroid·convex position·general position과는 직접 관련 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 Brouwer의 Laplacian 추측을 일반화한 두 추측을 증명한다. 첫째는 최대 k개 Laplacian 고유값의 합을 매칭 수(matching number)로 상한하고, 둘째는 정점 덮개 수(vertex-cover number)로 상한한다. Brouwer의 Laplacian 부등식을 활용하여 두 결과를 입증한다.
technique: Brouwer의 증명된 Laplacian 고유값 부등식을 기반으로 매칭·정점 덮개 구조를 그래프 이론적으로 분석.

title: Star Coloring of Hypergraphs
abstract: We study a generalization of the star coloring problem on hypergraphs. For a family of connected subhypergraphs $\mathcal{F}$, we define an $\mathcal{F}$-coloring of a hypergraph as a coloring avoiding monochromatic hyperedges and any 2-colored member of $\mathcal{F}$. We let $χ^r_{\mathcal{F}}(d)$ be the maximum of the minimum number of colors needed for an $\mathcal{F}$-coloring of an $r$-uniform hypergraph with maximum degree $d.$ We show bounds for $χ^r_{\mathcal{F}}(d)$, that also yield results on star and acyclic coloring problem on hypergraphs.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 하이퍼그래프 색칠(hypergraph coloring) 문제를 다루며, McMullen's problem과 직접적인 관련이 없습니다.
summary: 본 논문은 하이퍼그래프의 일반화된 별 색칠(star coloring) 문제를 연구합니다. 연결된 부분하이퍼그래프 족(family) $\mathcal{F}$에 대해 $\mathcal{F}$-색칠을 정의하며, 이는 단색 하이퍼엣지와 2-색 $\mathcal{F}$-멤버를 피합니다. 최대 차수 $d$를 갖는 $r$-균일 하이퍼그래프에서 필요한 최소 색의 개수에 대한 경계를 제시합니다.
technique: 최대 차수 제약 조건 하에서 하이퍼그래프 색칠 문제의 색수(chromatic number) 경계 도출.

title: Genus-zero links with prescribed knots as components
abstract: We prove that any finite collection of at least three isotopy classes of knots in a 3-manifold $M$ is realizable as the components of a genus-zero link in $M$, provided that an obvious requirement on their conjugacy classes in $π_1(M)$ is met. This condition is vacuously satisfied for $M = \mathbb S^3$, and in this case we also control the pairwise linking numbers of the components. Replacing the 3-genus with the 4-genus, we obtain an analogous result where only two knot isotopy classes are prescribed.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 3-다양체에서의 링크와 매듭의 위상기하학을 다루며, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid, 볼록 위치 점 배치와 전혀 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 3-다양체 $M$에서 적어도 세 개의 매듭 동위류(isotopy class)의 유한 집합이 genus-zero 링크의 성분으로 실현될 수 있음을 증명한다. $M = \mathbb{S}^3$의 경우 성분들의 쌍별 연결수(linking number)도 제어할 수 있으며, 3-genus를 4-genus로 대체하면 두 개의 매듭 동위류를 지정하는 유사한 결과를 얻는다.

title: Tverberg's theorem for unions of convex sets: Sharp bounds and colored extensions
abstract: Let $f_{r}(d,s_{1},\ldots,s_{r})$ be the least $N$ such that every $N$-point set $P\subseteq \mathbb{R}^{d}$ has an $r$-partition $P=P_{1}\sqcup\cdots\sqcup P_{r}$ with the following property: whenever $C_{i}\supseteq P_{i}$ is a union of at most $s_{i}$ convex sets, one has $\bigcap_{i=1}^{r}C_{i}\ne\emptyset$. A recent breakthrough of Alon and Smorodinsky established the first effective upper bounds $f_{r}(d,s,\ldots,s)\le Cdr^{2}s^{r}\log r\log(es^{r})$ for this problem. We obtain an asymptotically sharp lower bound by proving $f_r(d,s,\ldots,s)\ge c(d-r+2)s^r\log(s+1)$ for every $d\ge r+2$, which shows that $f_r(d,s,\ldots,s)=Θ_{d,r}(s^r\log s)$ for every fixed $d\ge r+2$. We also prove the general lower bound $f_r(d,s,\ldots,s)>s^{\min\{d,r\}}$. On the other hand, we develop a local counting argument to show that $f_r(d,s,\ldots,s)\le C_{d}rs^r\log(ers^r)$ and $f_r(d,s,\ldots,s)\le C_{d}r^{d+2}s^{d+1}\log(ers)$ whenever $r\ge d+1$, improving the upper bound of Alon and Smorodinsky.   We also study two colored analogues. The direct Bárány--Larman-type extension, in which one seeks $r$ disjoint rainbow sets chosen from $d+1$ color classes, fails as soon as two convex pieces are allowed. Nevertheless, we identify the correct colored formulation and prove a complete transversal theorem with quantitative bounds, which was also independently obtained by Keller and Smorodinsky.
comment: 16 pages. Note added: Keller and Smorodinsky independently proved Theorem 1.5 in broader setting via different method. arXiv:2607.10496
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 Tverberg 정리의 변형(union of convex sets)을 다루며, McMullen 문제나 Larman 추측과 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 $\mathbb{R}^d$의 점 집합을 $r$-분할할 때 각 부분집합의 합집합 볼록 집합들이 공통 교점을 갖도록 하는 최소 점 개수 $f_r(d,s,\ldots,s)$에 대해 점근적으로 sharp한 하한 $f_r(d,s,\ldots,s) \ge c(d-r+2)s^r\log(s+1)$을 증명하여 $f_r(d,s,\ldots,s)=\Theta_{d,r}(s^r\log s)$임을 확립한다. 또한 $r\ge d+1$인 경우 Alon–Smorodinsky의 상한을 개선하는 새로운 상한을 local counting argument로 도출한다. 나아가 Bárány–Larman형 colored 확장을 연구하여 두 볼록 조각이 허용되면 직접 확장이 실패함을 보이고, 올바른 colored 정식화 하에 완전한 transversal 정리를 증명한다.
technique: 점근적 하한 증명을 위한 확률적·조합론적 구성, 상한 개선을 위한 local counting argument, colored transversal을 위한 정량적 분석.

title: fkcompute: an efficient $F_K$ invariant calculator
abstract: We introduce fkcompute, an open-source package for computing the Gukov--Manolescu invariant of links from a braid presentation. fkcompute implements Park's inverted state sum through a three-phase pipeline. First, a search is performed for a suitable braid presentation and for an additional inversion data on the braid. Then, the state space of the inverted sum is encoded as a polytope, bounded by the associated linear constraint system. Finally, the invariant is constructed by multiplication of R-matrices associated to the states. Benchmarks show that prime knots up to 12 crossings, and prime links up to 10 crossings and of at most 3 components, are comfortably within reach. As a result, fkcompute is used to compile the first public database of the Gukov--Manolescu invariant. The package is available as a Python library, a command-line tool, and a Mathematica paclet.
comment: 17 pages, 1 figure, 1 table, GitHub repository: github.com/caltech-quantum-topology/fkcompute, database: topology.fyi
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 위상수학(매듭·링크)의 Gukov–Manolescu 불변량 계산에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid, 볼록 위치 점 배치와 전혀 관련이 없다.
summary: fkcompute는 브레이드 표현(braid presentation)으로부터 링크의 Gukov–Manolescu 불변량 $F_K$를 계산하는 오픈소스 패키지로, Park의 inverted state sum을 세 단계 파이프라인(브레이드 탐색, 폴리토프 인코딩, R-행렬 곱)으로 구현한다. 교차점 12개 이하의 소 매듭과 10개 이하·3성분 이하의 소 링크를 처리할 수 있으며, 이를 통해 최초의 공개 $F_K$ 불변량 데이터베이스를 구축하였다.
technique: state space를 선형 제약계(linear constraint system)로 한정된 폴리토프로 인코딩한 후 R-행렬 곱으로 불변량을 구성하는 세 단계 파이프라인.

title: A Matching-Number Refinement of Brouwer's Laplacian Eigenvalue Inequality
abstract: Let $G=(V,E)$ be a finite simple graph with Laplacian eigenvalues   $λ_1(L(G))\ge\cdots\geλ_{|V|}(L(G))$, and define   \[   \eps_k(G)=   \sum_{j=1}^{\min\{k,|V|\}}λ_j(L(G))-|E|.   \]   Let $ν(G)$ be the matching number of $G$, and let $n(G)$ be the number of   non-isolated vertices of $G$. Lew proved that   \(\eps_k(G)\le kν(G)+\lfloor k/2\rfloor\), and conjectured that the   additive term can be removed in the non-endpoint range. We prove this   conjecture:   \[   \eps_k(G)\le kν(G)   \qquad   (1\le k\le n(G)-2).   \]   We also characterize all equality cases. Up to isolated vertices, equality   holds precisely for stars, for \(K_1\vee(K_k\cup\overline{K_{n-k-1}})\) with   \(k\) odd, and for \(K_n-E(K_{1,t})\) with \(n\) odd, \(k=n-2\), and   \(1\le t\le n-2\). We also analyze the endpoint range \(k\ge n(G)-1\), where   \(\eps_k(G)=|E|\), and determine the specific cases where the inequality \(\varepsilon_k(G)\le kν(G)\) fails or holds with equality.
relevance_reason: 스펙트럼 그래프 이론의 라플라시안 고유값 부등식으로, McMullen's problem(convex position, general position 점 배치, oriented matroid)과 주제적 연관성이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 Brouwer의 라플라시안 고유값 부등식을 매칭 수(matching number)로 정제한 결과를 제시한다. $\eps_k(G)\le k\nu(G)$ (범위 $1\le k\le n(G)-2$)를 증명하고 모든 등호 경우를 완전히 특성화하였다.
technique: 라플라시안 고유값의 합에 대한 스펙트럼 그래프 이론적 부등식 증명.

title: Quantum Latin Squares of Order Six with Cardinalities Nineteen, Twenty-One, and Twenty-Three
abstract: We give three explicit quantum Latin squares of order $6$ with cardinalities $19$, $21$, and $23$, where vectors differing only by a global phase are counted as identical. The first two examples arise from normalized Schur products of columns of complex Hadamard matrices. For cardinality $19$, a Butson-type matrix over eighth roots of unity has the unique nontrivial coincidence $v_{01}=v_{25}=v_{34}$. For cardinality $21$, an explicit member of Karlsson's three-parameter family has $21$ pairwise inequivalent unordered Schur products. To exceed the symmetric Schur-product bound, we give a third, direct-sum construction based on the decomposition $\C^6=\C^4\oplusC^2$. It uses nineteen distinct rays in the four-dimensional summand and four rays in the two-dimensional summand, arranged so that every row and column is an orthonormal basis, yielding cardinality $23$. Together with our earlier constructions of cardinalities $13$, $15$, and $17$ and previously known order-six examples, these results determine every cardinality in the interval $6\leq c\leq24$, with the sole exception of the impossible value $c=7$.
relevance_reason: 양자 라틴 방진(quantum Latin squares)과 Schur 곱은 조합론이지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, 실현 가능성(realizability)과 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 6차 양자 라틴 방진(quantum Latin squares)에 대해 카디널리티 19, 21, 23을 갖는 세 개의 명시적 구성을 제시한다. 처음 두 예는 복소 Hadamard 행렬의 정규화된 Schur 곱에서 유래하며, 세 번째는 직합 분해를 기반으로 한 구성이다. 함께 이전 결과들과 알려진 예들은 구간 $6 \leq c \leq 24$의 모든 카디널리티를 결정하며, 불가능한 값 $c=7$을 제외한다.
technique: 복소 Hadamard 행렬로부터의 Schur 곱, Butson-type 행렬, Karlsson의 매개변수족, 직합 분해에 기반한 직접 구성.

title: Palindromic Poincaré polynomials in Type $B$
abstract: We completely describe the set of all palindromic Poincaré polynomials in type $B_n$. Additionally, we show that all lower Bruhat intervals in type $A_n$ occur in type $B_n$. As a consequence, all Poincaré polynomials $P_w(q)$ and all Kazhdan--Lusztig polynomials $P_{x,y}(q)$ of type $A_n$ occur in type $B_n$.
relevance_reason: Bruhat 순서와 Kazhdan-Lusztig 다항식은 Coxeter 군론의 조합론적 주제이지만, McMullen의 문제(고차원 convex polytope의 f-vector)와는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: Type $B_n$ Coxeter 군에서 회문 Poincaré 다항식의 완전한 분류를 제시하며, Type $A_n$의 모든 하부 Bruhat 구간이 Type $B_n$에서 실현됨을 보인다. 결과적으로 Type $A_n$의 모든 Poincaré 다항식과 Kazhdan-Lusztig 다항식이 Type $B_n$에서도 나타난다.

title: An Improved Lower Bound for Diamond-Free Families
abstract: We construct a diamond-free family in the Boolean lattice whose size is asymptotically larger than the union of two middle layers. Denote the diamond poset by $Q_2$ and let $La(n,Q_2)$ be the maximum size of a family in $2^{[n]}$ containing no weak copy of $Q_2$. We prove $La(n,Q_2) \ge (c+o(1))\binom{n}{\lfloor n/2\rfloor}$, where $c \approx 2.147908$. In particular, this disproves the diamond conjecture.
relevance_reason: 부울 격자의 조합론적 최대화 문제이지만, McMullen's problem의 고차원 볼록 배치(convex position), oriented matroid, chirotope 등과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 다이아몬드 포셋(diamond poset $Q_2$)의 약약한 사본을 포함하지 않는 부울 격자 $2^{[n]}$의 최대 family 크기에 대한 하한을 개선했다. $La(n,Q_2) \ge (c+o(1))\binom{n}{\lfloor n/2\rfloor}$ (단, $c \approx 2.147908$)를 증명하여 diamond conjecture를 반박한다.
technique: 부울 격자 내 familie의 구성적 구성 방법을 이용한 하한 증명

title: On Two Combinatorial Inequalities That Explain the Blimpy Shape of Heady-s and Taily-s Bit Strings
abstract: We prove two inequalities introduced in our prior study of the graphical shape of the number of bit strings with a given score under an interesting scoring system. Generating functions are used to establish the inequalities, which in turn imply two of the salient graphical features, uni-modality near the zero score and shape asymmetry for positive versus negative scores. One inequality provides a lower bound on the expected value of a discrete random variable with probabilities proportional to a product of two binomial coefficients. The other inequality states that the expected value with respect to near central binomial coefficients of other binomial coefficients lying on an oblique ray in Pascal's triangle exceeds the expected value along an adjacent parallel ray to its left.
relevance_reason: 비트 문자열의 조합론적 부등식 연구로, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, 또는 polyhedral matching fields와 직접적 관련성이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 특정 채점 시스템에서 주어진 점수를 갖는 비트 문자열의 개수에 관한 두 개의 조합론적 부등식을 증명한다. 생성함수를 이용하여 부등식을 확립하고, 이를 통해 단봉성(unimodality)과 비대칭성(shape asymmetry) 같은 그래프 특성을 도출한다.
technique: 생성함수(generating functions)를 이용한 이항계수 곱 관련 기댓값 부등식의 증명.

title: Algebraic structures on non-Archimedean Urysohn universal metric spaces
abstract: We investigate valued-field structures on Urysohn universal ultrametric spaces. We introduce $p$-adic Levi--Civita fields as subfields of $p$-adic Hahn fields and treat them together with ordinary Levi--Civita fields. For a subgroup $G$ of $\mathbb{R}$ containing $\mathbb{Z}$ and a countably infinite perfect field $k$, the corresponding Levi--Civita valued field is isometric to the $R$-Urysohn universal ultrametric space, where $R=\{0\}\cup\{η^{-g}\mid g\in G\}$. Thus these spaces admit field structures extending prescribed prime valued fields, including $\mathbb{Q}$ with the trivial valuation and the $p$-adic fields $\mathbb{Q}_{p}$. We also prove that complete valued fields with infinite residue fields are haloed, and hence universal for separable ultrametric spaces with corresponding distance sets. In the separable case, such a valued field is itself isometric to the corresponding Urysohn space. Examples include $\mathbb{C}_{p}$, the completion of the maximal unramified extension of $\mathbb{Q}_{p}$, Laurent series fields, and completions of their algebraic closures. Finally, for a countably infinite perfect residue field, the corresponding full Hahn-type valued field is a Urysohn universal ultrametric space exactly when its value group is order-isomorphic to $\mathbb{Z}$.
comment: 22 pages. This paper is a revised and expanded version of the latter part of the first version of arXiv:2309.06704v1
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 비아르키메데스 기하학과 값매김 체(valued field) 구조를 다루며, McMullen's problem이 요구하는 이산기하학·점 배치·볼록위치와 직접적 관련이 없습니다.
summary: 논문은 Urysohn 보편 초거리공간(ultrametric space) 위의 값매김 체 구조를 조사합니다. p진 Levi-Civita 체를 도입하고, 특정 부분군과 완전체에 대해 대응하는 Levi-Civita 값매김 체가 R-Urysohn 보편 초거리공간과 등거리동형임을 증명합니다. 특히 무한 잉여체를 가진 완전 값매김 체는 분리가능한 초거리공간에 보편적이며, 가치군이 ℤ와 순서동형일 때 정확히 Urysohn 보편공간이 됩니다.
technique: 값매김 체론, Hahn 체 구성, 초거리공간의 등거리 분류, haloed 체의 성질 활용

title: On regular homogeneously traceable nonhamiltonian graphs
abstract: A graph is homogeneously traceable if each vertex is an endpoint of a Hamiltonian path. Chartrand, Gould, and Kapoor (1979) proved irregular homogeneously traceable nonhamiltonian graphs exist for every order $n\ge 9$. Hu and Zhan (DAM, 2022) considered the $3$-regular and $4$-regular cases and asked which order $n$ can be realized by a $k$-regular homogeneously traceable nonhamiltonian graph. Recently, Liu and Qiao (DAM, 2026) showed that $n=p(k-1)+q\ge 6(k-1)+q$ can be realized if $k\ge 5$ is odd and $q\in\{0,2,4,6\}$, or $k\ge 6$ is even and $q\in\{0,1,...,6\}$. In this paper, we show that for any $k\ge 6$ and $n\ge 6(k-2)$, there exists a $k$-regular homogeneously traceable nonhamiltonian graph of order $n$.
relevance_reason: 정규 그래프의 Hamiltonian 경로 존재성을 다루지만, McMullen's problem (convex position, oriented matroid, realizability)과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 homogeneously traceable nonhamiltonian 정규 그래프의 존재성을 연구합니다. 모든 꼭짓점이 어떤 Hamiltonian path의 끝점이 되지만 Hamiltonian cycle은 없는 그래프를 특성화하며, $k \geq 6$ 및 $n \geq 6(k-2)$일 때 $k$-정규 그래프가 항상 존재함을 증명합니다.
technique: 정규 그래프 구성을 통한 조합론적 존재 증명 (Hu-Zhan과 Liu-Qiao의 선행 결과 개선).

title: Twofold universality of large-$N$ melonic random tensors
abstract: We construct a measure that exhibits two aspects of a new type of universality and dramatically simplifies the integration of tensors $T_{a_1,a_2,\ldots,a_D} \in \mathbb{C}$ ($a_1,\ldots,a_D=1,\ldots,N$) at large $N$. In contrast to matrix integration, in which matrix traces canonically yield the integrand, tensors need additional information (equivalent to a $D$-coloured graph $B$) to contract their indices and form a tensor trace $B(T)$. We show that, whenever each $B_1,\ldots, B_n$ can be obtained by a recursive construction known as melonicity, then the leading order in $N$ of the integral of $ {B_1}(T) {B_2}(T) \cdots {B_n}(T) $ is independent of the -- often intricate -- combinatorics of the traces $B_i$, but also, to our surprise, independent of $D$ as far as $D\geq 3$. Instead, at large $N$, these integrals are some functions (indexed by $n$) of the number of vertices $2p_i$ of $B_i$ which we call melonic polynomials. Melonic traces cumulants with respect to any ('interacting') measure \[ \exp\Big\{-N^{D-1} \sum_{i=1}^m g_i {B_i}(T)\Big\} \mathrm{d}μ_0(T) \quad (g_1,\ldots,g_m \in \mathbb{R}, \mathrm{d}μ_0(T) =\text{the tensor Gaussian}) \] with each $B_i$ melonic, can be computed with our universal measure that replaces each $B_i$ by a canonical trace depending only on $p_i$. We prove that any two melonic tensor models are indistinguishable at large-$N$, independently of the number of tensor indices (first universality aspect), and of the fine-grainedness of their interactions (second universality), being a sufficient condition that the couplings (the parameters $g_i$ above) agree and their respective traces are monomials with the same degree in $T$.
comment: 22 pp, 12pt fontsize, several figures. Comments welcome
relevance_reason: tensor integration, large-N limits, combinatorial structures(melonic graphs)를 다루지만 McMullen's problem(볼록점 배치, oriented matroid, tope graph)과는 직접적 연결이 없음.
summary: 이 논문은 대규모 N에서 melonic 무작위 tensor의 적분을 위한 보편적 측도를 구성한다. 핵심 결과는 melonic 구조를 따르는 D-색칠 그래프 $B_1, \ldots, B_n$에 대해, leading order $N$ 적분이 개별 trace의 복잡한 조합론에 무관하며, $D\geq 3$일 때 차원 $D$에도 무관함을 보인다. 두 melonic tensor 모델이 coupling과 trace 차수만 같으면 large-N에서 구별불가능함을 증명한다(이중 보편성).
technique: melonicity를 통한 재귀적 tensor trace 구성, tensor Gaussian 측도, large-N 전개에서의 cumulant 계산.

title: Proximity Measures for Classes of Phylogenetic Networks
abstract: Phylogenetic networks are used to represent the evolutionary history of species. Due to biological interpretations and computational advantages, researchers have focused on restricted classes of phylogenetic networks, such as tree-child, orchard, and tree-based. These classes capture different notions of tree-likeness: tree-child networks require every internal vertex to have a taxon reachable by a tree path, orchard networks are trees with horizontal arcs (for modelling histories rife with horizontal gene transfers), and tree-based networks are trees with additional (not-necessarily horizontal) arcs. A natural question to ask is ``how far is a given network from belonging to a particular class?'' This motivates the study of proximity measures, which measure the minimum number of graph modifications required to transform a network into one belonging to a particular class. In this paper, we consider three proximity measures based on leaf addition, valid arc deletion, and arc deletion. We study pairwise comparability of the proximity measures, prove complexity results, and derive extremal bounds for the classes of tree, tree-child, orchard, and tree-based networks.
comment: 33 pages, 17 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2305.03106
relevance_reason: 계통발생 네트워크 분류의 근접성 측정은 McMullen's problem(볼록위치 점 배치, oriented matroid, 조합기하)과 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 이 논문은 계통발생 네트워크(phylogenetic networks)가 특정 제한된 클래스(tree-child, orchard, tree-based)에 얼마나 가까운지 측정하는 근접성 측정을 연구한다. 잎 추가, 호(arc) 삭제 등 그래프 수정 기반의 세 가지 근접성 측정을 정의하고, 이들 간의 비교가능성, 복잡성 결과, 극값 경계를 도출한다.
technique: 그래프 수정 거리(graph modification distance) 정의 및 비교를 통한 네트워크 클래스 간 구조적 거리 측정.

title: Cut-homotopies and the complexity of edge-coloring problems
abstract: We study the computational complexity of problems that ask if a given graph admits an edge-coloring that does not contain an edge-colored clique from some fixed finite family. We show that every such problem is poly-time equivalent to a Constraint Satisfaction Problem, yielding a P vs. NP-complete dichotomy. Our main contribution lies in the reduction from the CSP to the coloring problem where we apply methods from Ramsey theory and a novel notion of cut-homotopy.
relevance_reason: Edge-coloring의 계산복잡도 문제로, McMullen's problem의 점 배치·oriented matroid·조합 구조와는 직접 관련성 없음.
summary: 주어진 그래프가 특정 유한족의 edge-colored clique을 포함하지 않는 edge-coloring을 허용하는지 묻는 문제들의 계산복잡도를 연구함. 모든 이러한 문제가 Constraint Satisfaction Problem과 다항식 시간 동치임을 보이고 P vs. NP 이분법(dichotomy)을 도출함.
technique: Ramsey 이론과 새로운 cut-homotopy 개념을 활용한 CSP에서 coloring 문제로의 환원(reduction).

title: Distribution of Sandpile groups of random bipartite graphs
abstract: Fix a prime $p$ and a constant $\frac{1}{p}<α\leq 1$. Consider the random Erdős--Rényi bipartite graph $G_α(n,u)$ with bipartition $(V_1,V_2)$ of sizes $|V_1|=n$ and $|V_2|=\lceilαn\rceil$, and edge probability $0<u<1$. The authors of [1] and [8] conjectured a limiting distribution for the $p$-Sylow subgroup of the sandpile group of $G_α(n,u)$ as $n\to\infty$. We prove this conjecture for odd primes $p$.   Similar results have previously been proved by computing the expected number of surjections from the random abelian $p$-group to $H$, for each finite abelian $p$-group $H$. However, in our setting, these surjective moments often diverge to infinity, despite the conjectured limiting distribution having finite moments. We resolve this issue by discarding the graphs for which too many vertices have degrees divisible by $p$. Once we remove the contribution of this rare set of graphs, then the surjective moments converge to the expected values. When $p$ is odd, applying Wood's universality theorem yields the desired convergence in distribution.   For $p=2$, our computed moments (after excluding the rare set of graphs) match those of the conjectured distribution. However, these moments do not uniquely determine a distribution.
relevance_reason: 샌드파일 군의 분포는 조합론적 구조이지만, McMullen's problem(볼록 위치의 점 배치, oriented matroid, 실현가능성)과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 무작위 이분 그래프의 샌드파일 군의 p-Sylow 부분군이 $n\to\infty$일 때 주어진 극한 분포로 수렴함을 증명한다. 기존 추측을 기수 소수 $p$에 대해 해결하였으며, 차수가 $p$로 나누어지는 정점이 과도하게 많은 드문 그래프들을 제외함으로써 surjective moment 수렴 문제를 극복했다.
technique: Surjective moment 계산과 드문 그래프 집합 제외, Wood의 보편성 정리(universality theorem) 적용.

title: The isomorphic section-projection problem for convex bodies
abstract: Let $K, L$ be convex bodies in $\mathbb{R}^n$ with $K$ centered. Assume that $|K \cap θ^{\perp}| \le |L|θ^{\perp}|$ for all $θ\in S^{n-1}$. We prove that $|K| \le c\sqrt{n}|L|$, which is sharp up to the choice of the absolute constant. The result gives the sharp isomorphic order in a mixed section-projection comparison problem, complementing the isomorphic Busemann-Petty and Shephard problems. It also removes the John's position assumption from an earlier result of the author, up to an absolute constant factor.
relevance_reason: 볼록기하학의 단면-사영 문제를 다루지만 이산기하학·조합론의 점 배치, oriented matroid, triangulation 등과 직접 관련 없음.
summary: 중심을 갖는 볼록체 K, L에 대해 모든 방향 θ에서 단면(section)의 부피가 비교되면 전체 부피도 √n 인수 내에서 비교된다는 결과를 증명. 이는 Busemann-Petty 및 Shephard 문제의 동형(isomorphic) 버전을 보완하며, John 위치 가정을 제거한 개선된 결과.
technique: 단면과 사영의 부피 부등식을 이용한 연속 볼록기하학 방법

title: Claw-free cubic graphs and zero forcing
abstract: A claw-free cubic graph is a cubic graph with no induced subgraph isomorphic to $K_{1,3}$. The zero forcing process begins with an initial set $S$ of colored vertices. At each step, a colored vertex with exactly one uncolored neighbor forces that neighbor to become colored. If repeated applications of this rule color every vertex of $G$, then $S$ is called a zero forcing set. The minimum cardinality of a zero forcing set is the zero forcing number, denoted by $Z(G)$. In this paper, we answer three open questions posed by Davila and Henning concerning upper bounds on the zero forcing number of claw-free cubic graphs.   We characterize the connected claw-free cubic graphs satisfying $Z(G)=α(G)+1$, where $α(G)$ is the independence number. In addition, we establish the improved upper bound $Z(G)\leq \frac{T}{2}+D+2$ for claw-free cubic graphs with Hamiltonian contraction multigraphs, where $D$ is the number of diamonds and $T$ is the number of triangles in $G$.
relevance_reason: Zero forcing on claw-free cubic graphs는 McMullen의 문제(convex position, oriented matroid, realizability)와 직접적인 연관이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 claw-free cubic 그래프(induced $K_{1,3}$가 없는 3-정규 그래프)에서 zero forcing number $Z(G)$의 상한에 관한 연구이다. Davila와 Henning의 세 가지 미해결 문제를 해결하고, $Z(G)=\alpha(G)+1$을 만족하는 connected claw-free cubic 그래프를 특성화하며, Hamiltonian contraction multigraph를 가진 경우 $Z(G)\leq\frac{T}{2}+D+2$ 상한을 확립한다.
technique: Zero forcing process와 그래프 구조(independence number, diamonds, triangles)의 관계를 이용한 상한 도출.

title: Second Order Differential Operators on Graphs
abstract: The commutator of a pair of vector fields on a graph is not a vector field in general, but rather a second order differential operator. We investigate this departure from the classical case of vectors fields on a manifold by examining the geometry of balls of radius two, concentrating on the set of paths of length two connecting a given vertex with the center of the ball. There is a natural surjection from the space of sections of the second tangent bundle to the space of second order differential operators whose kernel reflects the geometry of these balls. Using this map we draw several conclusions about second order differential operators including canonical forms, formulas for their adjoints, and a necessary and sufficient condition for a commutator to be a vector field.
relevance_reason: 그래프 위의 미분기하학적 구조 연구로, McMullen's problem의 조합론적·기하학적 접근과 무관함.
summary: 그래프 위의 벡터장 쌍의 교환자(commutator)가 일반적으로 2차 미분연산자가 되는 현상을 조사한다. 반지름 2인 공(ball)의 기하학, 특히 중심 정점을 연결하는 길이 2인 경로들의 집합에 초점을 맞춘다. 2차 접선다발(second tangent bundle)의 단면공간에서 2차 미분연산자 공간으로의 자연스러운 전사(surjection)를 이용하여 표준형, 수반작용소(adjoint) 공식, 교환자가 벡터장이 되기 위한 필요충분조건을 도출한다.
technique: 2차 접선다발의 구간(section) 공간과 그 kernel을 통한 기하학적 특성화(geometric characterization).

title: A tight single-change covering design with block size 6
abstract: We give a tight single-change covering design with $v=26$ and $k=6$. This answers Problem 1 of the Nineteenth British Combinatorial Conference, which asked whether such a design exists with block size greater than $5$. We also describe the satisfiability search that found the design, including negative search results at the smallest admissible order $v=21$.
relevance_reason: Covering designs와 combinatorial block designs는 discrete geometry의 점 배치 문제와 구조적 유사성이 있으나, McMullen's problem (convex position, oriented matroid, polyhedral matching)과 직접적 연관 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 블록 크기 $k=6$, 점 개수 $v=26$인 tight single-change covering design을 구성하여 British Combinatorial Conference의 문제를 해결한다. Satisfiability search를 통해 최소 admissible order $v=21$에서는 존재하지 않음을 보였다.
technique: Satisfiability search (SAT solver 기반 exhaustive search).

title: Local flag algebras
abstract: We introduce local flag algebras, a variant of Razborov's flag algebra framework in which densities are normalised by the maximum degree $Δ(G)$ rather than the order $|G|$. The framework supports the same semidefinite-method machinery as the classical version, but is tailored to extremal problems that scale with the maximum degree. As an illustrative first application we bound the number of pentagons in a triangle-free graph $G$ as a function of $|G|$ and $Δ(G)$.
relevance_reason: Flag algebras는 조합론의 일반적 도구이지만, McMullen's problem(convex position, oriented matroid, realizability)과는 직접 관련성이 없음.
summary: Razborov의 flag algebra 프레임워크를 변형하여 local flag algebras를 도입. 밀도를 정점 개수 |G|가 아닌 최대 차수 Δ(G)로 정규화하며, 최대 차수에 비례하는 극값 문제에 맞춤화. 삼각형이 없는 그래프에서 오각형 개수를 |G|와 Δ(G)의 함수로 제한하는 첫 응용 제시.
technique: Local flag algebras와 semidefinite programming 방법을 결합하여 최대 차수 기반 정규화 하의 극값 문제 해결.

title: Alternating adjacent-sum polytopes: transfer matrices and Ehrhart series
abstract: We study a period-two family of adjacent-sum lattice polytopes whose consecutive-coordinate bounds alternate between $s$ and $s+1$. This provides a simple non-uniform deformation of the classical uniform model while retaining an explicit transfer-matrix structure.   The lattice-point counts exhibit a parity split: the odd- and even-dimensional sequences have distinct rational generating functions with a common denominator. The odd-dimensional series satisfies a Möbius recurrence and admits an arctangent closed form, whereas the even-dimensional series obeys a coupled recurrence. Their common dominant pole determines the exponential growth in both parity classes.   For the cyclic model obtained by adding a constraint between the first and last coordinates, the count becomes a matrix trace. The two cyclic parity classes again have rational generating functions with the same denominator; the even-dimensional numerator has a Jacobi-derivative form, while the odd-dimensional one is given by an explicit anti-diagonal cofactor expression.   We also derive dimension-generating functions for fixed dilations, linear recurrences for lattice-point counts, rational volume-generating functions, and a bivariate identity for the coefficients of the $h^*$-polynomials. When $s=1$, every even-dimensional polytope decomposes into a Cartesian product of unimodular triangles, yielding explicit formulas and the Gorenstein property. For every $s\geq 2$, the Gorenstein property fails in some even dimension.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 격자 다면체(lattice polytopes)의 Ehrhart 이론과 전이행렬(transfer matrix) 구조를 다루며, McMullen 문제나 Larman 추측, oriented matroid 등과 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: 연속 좌표 경계가 $s$와 $s+1$ 사이에서 교대하는 인접합 격자 다면체(adjacent-sum lattice polytopes) 족을 연구한다. 격자점 개수는 홀수·짝수 차원에 따라 분리되어 각각 유리 생성함수를 가지며, 홀수 차원 수열은 Möbius 점화식과 아크탄젠트 닫힌형을 만족한다. $s=1$일 때 짝수 차원 다면체는 단모듈 삼각형의 데카르트 곱으로 분해되어 Gorenstein 성질을 가지며, $s \geq 2$이면 일부 짝수 차원에서 Gorenstein 성질이 성립하지 않음을 보인다.
technique: 전이행렬(transfer matrix) 구조를 이용한 격자점 계수, 행렬 추적(matrix trace)을 통한 순환 모델 분석, $h^*$-다항식 계수에 대한 이변수 항등식 도출.

title: Second-order rigidity of coned polytope frameworks and the stress-flex conjecture from a vector-valued Schläfli formula
abstract: A coned polytope framework (CPF) is the bar-joint framework obtained from the 1-skeleton of a convex polytope by coning over some interior point. It was recently shown that CPFs are rigid, though the exact order of rigidity remained open. In this paper we introduce the Wachspress stress and use it to show that CPFs are prestress stable, in particular, second-order rigid. To this end, we resolve the stress-flex conjecture in the case of the Wachspress stress by identifying its dual formulation as a corollary of a vector-valued Schläfli-type formula introduced by Schlenker and Souam. We give a new and purely discrete-geometric proof of this generalized Schläfli formula.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 볼록 다면체의 bar-joint framework 강성(rigidity)과 stress-flex conjecture를 다루며, McMullen 문제(점 배치, oriented matroid, chirotope 등)와 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: Coned polytope framework(CPF)는 볼록 다면체의 1-골격에 내부점을 coning하여 얻는 bar-joint framework로, 최근 rigid함이 증명되었으나 강성의 차수는 미해결이었다. 본 논문은 Wachspress stress를 도입하여 CPF가 prestress stable, 특히 2차 rigid함을 증명하고, Schlenker–Souam의 vector-valued Schläfli형 공식의 따름정리로서 stress-flex conjecture의 Wachspress stress 경우를 해결한다. 또한 이 일반화된 Schläfli 공식에 대한 순수 이산기하학적 증명을 새로이 제시한다.
technique: Wachspress stress를 이용한 prestress stability 분석과 vector-valued Schläfli형 공식의 이산기하학적 증명.

title: Several families of incommensurable noncompact hyperbolic Coxeter polytopes
abstract: We classify all 141 finite-volume hyperbolic Coxeter five-dimensional polytopes with eight facets, of which 125 are noncompact. Using maximal-cusp density and a noncompact analog of Bogachev-Douba-Raimbault's argument, we construct infinitely many pairwise incommensurable noncompact Coxeter polytopes in dimensions 4, 5, 6, 7, and 9, with the number of commensurability classes growing at least exponentially in volume.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 쌍곡 Coxeter 다면체의 분류 및 공약불가능성(incommensurability)에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제나 Larman 추측과 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 8개의 면(facet)을 가지는 5차원 유한 부피 쌍곡 Coxeter 다면체를 모두 141개로 분류하며, 그 중 125개가 비컴팩트(noncompact)임을 보인다. 또한 최대 첨두 밀도(maximal-cusp density)와 Bogachev-Douba-Raimbault 논증의 비컴팩트 유사체를 이용하여, 4, 5, 6, 7, 9차원에서 쌍으로 공약불가능한(pairwise incommensurable) 비컴팩트 Coxeter 다면체가 무한히 많이 존재함을 구성한다. 이 공약불가능 류(commensurability class)의 수는 부피에 대해 적어도 지수적으로 증가한다.
technique: 최대 첨두 밀도(maximal-cusp density) 불변량과 Bogachev-Douba-Raimbault 논증의 비컴팩트 유사체를 핵심 도구로 사용하여 공약불가능성을 증명한다.

title: A dual linear programming bound for sphere packing in dimension 36
abstract: We construct an explicit dual-feasible point for the Cohn--Elkies linear program in dimension $36$, built from the space of weight-$18$ modular forms for $Γ_0(24)$ following the method of Cohn and Triantafillou. The certificate shows that the two-point linear programming bound on the sphere packing density in dimension $36$ exceeds the density of the best packing currently known -- the Kschischang--Pasupathy packing, of center density $2^{18}/3^{10}$ -- by a factor of at least $32.91$. In particular, no Cohn--Elkies auxiliary function can certify the best known packing in dimension $36$ as optimal. To our knowledge this is the first such dual bound in any dimension above $32$, extending the table of Cohn--Triantafillou ($d=12,16,20,28,32$), Li ($3\le d\le 13$), and de~Courcy-Ireland--Dostert--Viazovska ($d=6$). The certificate is rigorous and machine-checkable, with exact rational data and certified interval bounds: the dual point is a rational vector, coefficient nonnegativity is verified by exact arithmetic up to $n=800$, and eventual positivity of the two relevant $q$-expansions is proved via an explicit Deligne-type tail bound whose constant is certified with outward-rounded interval arithmetic. Two methodological points may be of independent interest: a constraint-generation (cutting-plane) formulation of the exact rational LP, which is what makes an exact vertex whose Eisenstein data supports the tail argument reachable; and a sharpened, lift-aware form of the Deligne bookkeeping constant that discounts deep oldform lifts, without which the finite verification in dimension $36$ fails (the crossover moves past the verified window).
comment: 13 pages. Ancillary files: exact certificate + machine-checkable verifier. v2: substantially revised exposition and verification bundle; main result unchanged
relevance_reason: 구 채우기 문제는 이산기하학이지만, McMullen's problem(convex position 점 배치, oriented matroid, chirotope)과는 직접적 관련성이 없음.
summary: Cohn-Elkies 선형계획법의 쌍대 실행가능점을 36차원에서 명시적으로 구성하고, 기존 최적 구 채우기(Kschischang-Pasupathy 패킹)보다 32.91배 이상 우수한 상한을 제시한다. 정확한 유리 데이터와 검증 가능한 구간 경계를 사용한 엄격한 증명으로, 32 이상의 차원에서 처음으로 이런 쌍대 상한을 제공한다.
technique: modular form(무게 18, $\Gamma_0(24)$)을 기반으로 한 constraint-generation(cutting-plane) 공식화와, Deligne-type tail bound를 이용한 $q$-전개의 점근 양성성 증명.

title: Quantitative stability of the intersection body operator near the ball, and the dynamical origin of the two--dimensional degeneracy
abstract: Let $\IB$ denote the intersection body operator on star bodies in $\R^n$. A recent theorem of Milman, Shabelman and Yehudayoff establishes that for $n\ge 3$ the equation $\IB^2 K = cK$ holds if and only if $K$ is a centered ellipsoid, thereby resolving the fixed--point problem for $\IB^2$ and, as a consequence, the long--standing conjecture $\IB K = cK \Leftrightarrow K$ is a ball. We complement this qualitative rigidity with a \emph{quantitative} analysis in a neighbourhood of the ball. Linearizing the associated shape dynamics on $L^2(\Sph)$, we compute the full spectrum of the operator $\IB^2$ at the ball in closed form for every dimension: the degree--two (ellipsoidal) harmonics are neutral with multiplier exactly $1$, while all higher harmonics are contracted, with a sharp spectral gap \[   \mathrm{gap}(n)\;=\;\frac{(n-2)(n+4)}{(n+1)^2}. \] This yields an explicit linear stability constant $C(n)=(n+1)^2/\big((n-2)(n+4)\big)$, and, via a center--manifold reduction, a local quantitative stability statement for $\IB^2$ near the ball valid in each fixed dimension $n\ge 3$. The gap degenerates precisely as $n\to 2^+$, giving a transparent \emph{dynamical} explanation of the well--known exceptional status of the plane, where $\IB K = 2K$ for every origin--symmetric star body. We also record the reduced normal form of $\IB$ on the ellipsoidal directions and observe that the centered ellipsoids constitute a normally attracting invariant manifold for the shape under iterated intersection bodies. The methods are perturbative and do not address the global periodic problem $\IB^m K = cK$ for $m\ge 3$, which we discuss.
relevance_reason: 교집합체 연산자의 안정성과 스펙트럼 분석이 주제이며, McMullen 문제의 일반위치·점 배치·기하학적 강성과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 별 모양 본체(star bodies)에서 교집합체 연산자 $\IB$의 정량적 안정성을 연구한다. Milman-Shabelman-Yehudayoff의 정성적 결과(타원체만이 $\IB^2 K = cK$의 해)를 보완하여, 구 근처에서 선형화된 형태역학의 스펙트럼을 완전히 계산하고, 차수 2 조화함수는 중립적(multiplier=1)이며 더 높은 조화함수는 축약되는 현상을 보인다. 2차원으로의 극한에서 스펙트럼 갭이 소멸하는 동적 기원을 규명한다.
technique: L²(𝕊ⁿ) 위의 형태역학 선형화 및 중심다양체 축소(center-manifold reduction)를 통한 국소 스펙트럼 분석.

title: On the maximum size of $B_3$-free families
abstract: A family $\mathcal{G}$ of sets is a weak copy of the poset $(P,\leqslant)$ if there exists a bijection $ι:P\rightarrow \mathcal{G}$ with $ι(p)\subset ι(q)$ whenever $p\leqslant q$. $\mathcal{G}$ is a strong copy if $ι(p)\subset ι(q)$ if and only if $p\leqslant q$ holds. A family is weak (strong) $P$-free if it does not contain any weak (strong) copies of $P$. For a poset $P$, let $e(P)$ ($e^*(P)$) denote the most number of middle layers of $2^{[n]}$ that does not contain a weak (strong) copy of $P$. Ellis, Ivan, and Leader were the first to show the existence of posets $P$ for which there exists a positive real $\varepsilon_P$ such that $La(n,P)\ge (e(P)+\varepsilon_P)\binom{n}{\lfloor n/2}$ and $La^*(n,P)\ge (e^*(P)+\varepsilon_P)\binom{n}{\lfloor n/2}$ holds, where $La(n,P)$ ($La^*(n,P)$) denotes the maximum size of a weak (strong) $P$-free family $\mathcal{F}\subseteq 2^{[n]}$. More precisely, they showed that $P=B_d$ are such posets for all $d\ge 4$, where $B_d$ is the Boolean lattice ordered by inclusion. Very recently, Tompkins showed that the diamond $B_2$ is also such a poset. In this short note, we apply his method to settle the case of the last Boolean poset $B_3$. We show that there exists a positive $\varepsilon$ such that $$La^*(n,B_3)\ge La(n,B_3)\ge La(n,D_6)\ge (3+\varepsilon)\binom{n}{\lfloor n/2\rfloor},$$   where $D_6$ is the poset on eight elements $a<b_1,\dots,b_6<c$.
relevance_reason: 이산집합 조합론 문제이나 McMullen's problem(convex position, oriented matroid, realizability)과는 직접 관련이 없고, poset 구조의 extremal combinatorics만 다룸.
summary: 본 논문은 Boolean lattice $B_3$의 weak/strong copy를 포함하지 않는 power set의 부분가족의 최대 크기를 연구한다. Ellis-Ivan-Leader의 결과를 확장하여 $La(n,B_3) \ge (3+\varepsilon)\binom{n}{\lfloor n/2\rfloor}$임을 보이며, Tompkins의 방법을 적용한다.
technique: Poset embedding의 extremal 함수 분석; middle layers에서의 weak/strong $P$-free family 구성.

title: Far-apart Erdős--Pósa property of long cycles
abstract: We prove that there exist functions $f:\mathbb N^2\to\mathbb N$ and $g:\mathbb N\to\mathbb N$ such that for all positive integers $k$, $d$, and $\ell\ge3$, every graph $G$ either contains $k$ cycles of length at least $\ell$ that are pairwise at distance greater than $d$, or admits a subset of vertices $X$ with $|X|\le f(k,\ell)$ such that $G-B_G(X,g(d))$ contains no cycle of length at least $\ell$, where $B_G(X,r)$ denotes the ball of radius $r$ around $X$. This generalizes a theorem of Dujmović, Joret, Micek, and Morin (2024), which established the $\ell=3$ case. Moreover, we prove that the theorem holds with $f(k,\ell)\in\mathcal{O}(\ell k\log k)$ and $g(d)\in\mathcal{O}(d)$. The linear bound on $g$ is best possible, while the bound on $f$ is optimal as a function of $k$ for every fixed $\ell$. In particular, for $\ell=3$ our result improves the previous bound of $\mathcal{O}(k^{18}\mathsf{polylog} k)$ by Dujmović et al.
relevance_reason: 그래프 이론의 Erdős–Pósa 성질과 cycle packing 문제로, 이산기하학의 점 배치·convex position 문제와는 직접적 관련성이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 long cycle의 far-apart Erdős–Pósa 성질을 증명하며, 모든 그래프가 거리가 $d$보다 큰 길이 $\ell$ 이상의 $k$개 사이클을 포함하거나, $|X|\le f(k,\ell)$인 정점 부분집합으로 제거했을 때 장주기가 없음을 보인다. 최적에 가까운 경계 $f(k,\ell)\in\mathcal{O}(\ell k\log k)$, $g(d)\in\mathcal{O}(d)$를 달성한다.
technique: 정점 제거 기법(ball-based deletion)과 귀납적 cycle packing 논증을 통해 보조정리를 구성.

title: A 64-Rectangle Counterexample to Wegner's Conjecture and LP Gaps up to $5/2$
abstract: Wegner conjectured that every finite family $\mathcal R$ of axis-parallel rectangles satisfies $τ(\mathcal R)\le 2ν(\mathcal R)-1$, where $ν$ is the packing number and $τ$ is the piercing number. Ajwani, Gajjala, Raman, and Ray recently disproved this by constructing a triangle-free counterexample on $2196\cdot 8^9$ rectangles and, using a computer-assisted package-and-port recursion, obtained a standard LP gap of $17891/8064$ for Maximum Independent Set of Rectangles. We give a simpler and hand-checkable counterexample with $64$ rectangles. It is built from an eight-rectangle gadget whose independent sets inject into four ordered slots; we then use four horizontal and four vertical copies of this gadget to form a triangle-free family with $ν=16$ and $τ\ge 32$. We use the same horizontal-vertical step to define recursive families of rectangles $P_r$ with $ν(P_r)=4^{2^r}$. For the standard clique, equivalently point, relaxation we obtain a finite gap $73/32$ at $P_3$, improving the previous benchmark of $17891/8064$. We then construct recursive fractional solutions and matching piercing sets showing $\lim_r α^*(P_r)/ν(P_r)=\lim_r τ(P_r)/ν(P_r)=5/2$. Finally, by disjoint union with isolated rectangles, we show that every rational $t\in[1,5/2)$ occurs as a standard LP gap and also as a packing-piercing ratio for suitable rectangle families.
comment: A version of this paper was submitted to a conference on 9 July 2026
relevance_reason: 축평행 직사각형의 piercing/packing 문제는 조합 기하학이지만 McMullen's problem(convex position, oriented matroid, general position)과는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: Wegner's conjecture을 반박하는 64개 직사각형의 counterexample을 제시하고, axis-parallel rectangles의 maximum independent set에 대한 LP relaxation gap을 분석한다. 구체적으로 표준 LP gap이 5/2에 수렴하는 재귀적 family를 구성하고, [1, 5/2) 범위의 모든 유리수가 gap으로 나타남을 보인다.
technique: 8-직사각형 gadget의 수평-수직 재귀적 구성과 fractional solution 및 matching piercing set의 명시적 구성

title: Local and global average degree in bipartite graphs
abstract: Let $F_{\mathrm{bip}}(n)$ denote the maximum, over all $n$-vertex bipartite graphs without isolated vertices, of the ratio of the minimum local average degree to the global average degree. We prove that $F_{\mathrm{bip}}(n)=\frac14\sqrt n+\frac38+o(1)$. This answers a problem posed by Tuza.
relevance_reason: 이분 그래프의 차수 비율 문제로, McMullen's problem(볼록 위치의 점 배치, oriented matroid, 다면체 구조)과 직접적 주제 연관성이 없음.
summary: 고립 꼭짓점이 없는 n-정점 이분 그래프에서 최소 국소 평균 차수(local average degree)와 전역 평균 차수(global average degree)의 비의 최댓값 $F_{\mathrm{bip}}(n)$을 정확히 결정했다. 주요 결과는 $F_{\mathrm{bip}}(n)=\frac{1}{4}\sqrt{n}+\frac{3}{8}+o(1)$이며, 이는 Tuza가 제시한 문제에 대한 답변이다.

title: On two counterexamples in the geometry of numbers
abstract: We give counterexamples to two optimization problems in dimensions eight and nine.   1. The Cartesian-product problem posed by Cassels for critical determinants and later formulated by Zong for lattice packings and for packings allowing translations but not rotations: whether the corresponding product inequalities are always equalities.   2. A question raised by Sarnak and formulated as a conjecture in Chiu: whether, among unit-volume flat tori, height is minimized by a lattice maximizing the length of its shortest nonzero vector.   The first counterexample is exact and also disproves the natural product formula for unrestricted congruent packings. The second is numerical but within reasonable floating-point accuracy.
comment: Ancillary files contains reproduction of computations
relevance_reason: 기하학 분야이지만 격자 최적화·수 기하학(geometry of numbers)으로, McMullen's problem의 조합기하학적 접근과는 주제가 상이함.
summary: 이 논문은 수 기하학의 두 최적화 문제에 대한 반례를 제시한다: Cassels의 임계행렬식(critical determinants)과 관련된 Cartesian-product 문제, 및 단위 부피 평탄 토러스에서의 높이 최소화 문제. 첫 번째 반례는 정확하며 비합동 패킹(unrestricted congruent packings)의 곱 공식도 반박한다.

title: Corner Rectangle Visibility Graphs
abstract: We introduce corner rectangle visibility graphs (CRVGs), a combination of two geometrically defined classes of graphs: rectangle visibility graphs (RVGs) and rectangle-of-influence graphs (RIGs). A CRVG has vertices represented by axis-parallel rectangles in the plane, and edges represented by axis-parallel rectangles with one corner at a corner of a vertex-rectangle, an opposite corner at the boundary of another vertex-rectangle, and no vertex-rectangles in their interiors. We also consider CRVGs that only see in one or two directions (south CRVGs and southwest CRVGs).   We prove that south CRVGs have at most $\left[\frac{n^2}{4}\right]+n-2$ edges, and this bound is tight. This is the same as the tight edge bound for closed RIGs, but they are different graph classes. We also show that southwest CRVGs have at most $\left[\frac{n^2}{3}+\frac{n}{3}\right]-1$ edges, and this bound is tight. We prove that CRVGs on $n$ vertices have at most $e$ edges, where $\lfloor \frac{3n^2}{8} \rfloor \leq e \leq \lfloor \frac{2n^2}{5} \rfloor$. Finally, we classify several families of graphs as CRVGs, SCRVGs, and SWCRVGs.
relevance_reason: 기하학적 그래프 클래스의 조합론적 성질을 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, realizability 등 핵심 도구와 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 축정렬 직사각형으로 표현된 꼭짓점과 모서리 조건으로 정의된 corner rectangle visibility graphs (CRVGs)를 도입. South CRVGs는 최대 $\lfloor\frac{n^2}{4}\rfloor+n-2$개 모서리를 가지며 이 경계가 타이트함을 증명하고, southwest CRVGs와 전체 CRVGs에 대한 모서리 상한도 제시.
technique: 기하학적 제약 조건 하에서 그래프 모서리의 조합론적 상한을 증명하기 위한 직접 구성 및 조건부 계수.

title: Erdős-Ko-Rado-type problem for hypergraph matchings
abstract: Given integers $1\leq t\leq k$, a family of $k$-matchings in a complete $r$-partite $r$-uniform hypergraph is said to be $t$-intersecting if any two of its members share at least $t$ common edges. This concept unifies several well-studied classes of intersecting families, including classical intersecting families, intersecting families of permutations, partial permutations, and generalized permutations, as well as intersecting families of injections. In this paper we employ two approaches to determine the maximum size of $t$-intersecting families of $k$-matchings and to characterize the extremal families that attain this bound. Using a recent result of Keller, Lifshitz, Minzer, and Sheinfeld on $t$-intersecting families of permutations, we obtain Erdős-Ko-Rado-type theorems whose thresholds depend only on $t$. We also develop a $t$-cover-based approach that offers a complementary characterization of the extremal families.
relevance_reason: Erdős-Ko-Rado 극값 조합론 문제이나 McMullen's problem(convex polytope 면 격자, oriented matroid 재현성)과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 완전 $r$-분할 $r$-균일 초그래프에서 $t$-교차하는 $k$-매칭 족(임의의 두 원소가 최소 $t$개 공통 간선 공유)의 최대 크기를 결정하고 극값 족을 특성화함. 순열, 부분순열, 일반화 순열, 단사함수의 교차 족 등 여러 알려진 개념을 통합하며, Keller-Lifshitz-Minzer-Sheinfeld의 순열 족 결과를 이용해 임계값이 $t$만 의존하는 Erdős-Ko-Rado 정리를 도출.
technique: Keller 등의 $t$-교차 순열 족 결과 활용 및 $t$-덮개(t-cover) 기반 접근법을 통한 극값 족 특성화.

title: The chain replacement of a poset flow
abstract: We introduce the chain replacement of a poset flow: it is obtained by considering the simplicial nerves of the posets of strictly increasing chains in the given poset, ordered by refinement. It maps finite posets to q-cofibrant flows and inclusions of finite posets to q-cofibrations. Using the combinatorial properties of the chain replacement, we prove that pushouts along the chain replacement of an order-reflecting inclusion of finite posets preserve spaces of execution paths. By introducing the Hurewicz model structure on flows (or H-model structure), we deduce the same property for any q-cofibrant replacement of an order-reflecting inclusion of finite posets.
relevance_reason: 순서 이론과 조합 위상수학 대상이지만 McMullen's problem(convex position, oriented matroid, 점 배치)과 직접 관련성 없음.
summary: Poset flow의 chain replacement를 도입하며, 이는 순증가 체인의 poset들의 단순 신경(simplicial nerves)으로 정의된다. 이 구성이 유한 poset을 q-cofibrant flow로 매핑하고, order-reflecting inclusion을 q-cofibration으로 보내는 성질을 가진다. Hurewicz 모델 구조(H-model structure)를 통해 실행 경로(execution paths) 공간이 pushout 아래에서 보존됨을 증명한다.
technique: 단순 신경, 모델 범주 구조, 순서 이론적 성질의 위상적 해석.

title: The Action of the Lie Algebra $\mathfrak{sl}_n$ on Colored Graphs and Multicolored Johnson Graphs
abstract: We consider the space of $(n-1)$-colored graphs on a fixed set of $N$ vertices. Each edge position of the complete graph $K_N$ has $n$ possible states: the absence of an edge and $n-1$ colors. This gives a natural identification of the space of such graphs with the tensor power $(\mathbb C^n)^{\otimes m}$, where $m=\binom N2$, and defines on it the diagonal action of the Lie algebra $\mathfrak{gl}_n$, and, after restriction, the action of $\mathfrak{sl}_n$. For a fixed profile $α=(α_0,\dots,α_{n-1})$, we consider the graph $J(m;α)$ whose vertices are colored graphs of this profile and whose adjacency is defined by a single exchange of states in two edge positions. This graph is the transposition graph on the set of words with fixed profile, also known as the \emph{multislice}. The main result is an expression of the adjacency operator in terms of the root operators of $\mathfrak{sl}_n$ and a derivation of its spectrum by means of the quadratic Casimir operator of $\mathfrak{gl}_n$ and the Schur--Weyl decomposition. It is proved that the adjacency operator belongs to the center of the algebra $\End_{S_m}(\mathcal C_α)$. The contribution of each spectral block to the multiplicity of the corresponding eigenvalue is described in terms of a Kostka number and the dimension of a Specht module. For $n=2$, one obtains the classical Johnson graph and its known spectrum. As applications, a formula for the valency is established, connectivity is proved, the Hoffman bound for independent sets is obtained, and the three-state case is considered in detail; in this case the natural symmetrized subspace realizes the module $\Sym^m(\mathbb C^3)$.
relevance_reason: 조합론 분야이지만 McMullen's problem의 핵심인 convex position, general position 점 배치, oriented matroid, 실현성(realizability) 문제와 무관하며, 대신 표현론과 리 대수의 스펙트럼 이론에 초점을 맞춤.
summary: 이 논문은 N개 정점의 (n-1)-색 그래프 공간에서 $\mathfrak{sl}_n$ 리 대수의 작용을 연구한다. 고정된 프로파일을 갖는 다중색 Johnson 그래프 $J(m;α)$의 인접 연산자를 근 연산자(root operator)로 표현하고, Casimir 연산자와 Schur-Weyl 분해를 이용하여 스펙트럼을 유도한다.
technique: 리 대수의 근 연산자와 Casimir 연산자, Schur-Weyl 분해를 이용한 표현론적 스펙트럼 분석.

title: Kleber's conjecture and complementary products of symmetric functions
abstract: We prove Kleber's rectangular-complement conjecture for Schur functions over an arbitrary commutative ring $R$, showing that, for a fixed rectangle, the products $s_λs_{λ^\vee}$, indexed by unordered complementary pairs, are linearly independent in $Λ_R$. The proof rests on a general independence theorem for componentwise splittings, which asserts that for every partition $θ$, the products $s_αs_β$ are linearly independent as $\{α,β\}$ ranges over unordered pairs of partitions satisfying $α+β=θ$. The independence of the products $s_λs_{λ^\vee}$ also yields linear independence of the Koike--Terada universal-character products over any field, answering a question of Gao--Orelowitz--Yong. We also prove the analogous result for monomial symmetric functions over fields of characteristic zero, as well as integral linear independence over $\mathbb{Z}$.
relevance_reason: 대칭함수의 선형독립성을 다루지만 McMullen의 문제(convex position, oriented matroid, 고차원 조합기하)와 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: Kleber의 직사각형-여집합 추측을 증명하여, 고정된 직사각형에 대해 여집합 쌍으로 인덱싱된 곱 $s_λs_{λ^\vee}$가 대칭함수환 $Λ_R$에서 선형독립임을 보임. 일반적인 componentwise splitting에 대한 독립성 정리를 통해 증명되며, Koike–Terada 범용-문자 곱의 선형독립성도 확립함.
technique: Schur 함수의 componentwise splitting에 대한 일반 독립성 정리

title: Overfull Conjecture for graphs with maximum degree 4
abstract: Let $G$ be a simple graph with maximum degree $Δ(G)$. The graph $G$ is overfull if $\left|E(G)\right|> Δ(G)\lfloor |V(G)|/2\rfloor$. In 1986, Chetwynd and Hilton proposed the Overfull Conjecture: If $G$ is a simple graph with $Δ(G)>\frac{|V(G)|}{3}$, then $G$ is a Class $2$ graph if and only if $G$ contains an overfull subgraph $H$ with $Δ(H)=Δ(G)$. In this paper, we give a proof of this conjecture for graphs with maximum degree $4$.
relevance_reason: 조합론 분야이나 McMullen's problem과 무관한 그래프 색칠 이론 관련 연구.
summary: 본 논문은 Chetwynd-Hilton의 Overfull Conjecture를 최대차수 4인 그래프에 대해 증명한다. Overfull Conjecture는 최대차수가 충분히 크면 Class 2 그래프의 특성을 overfull 부분그래프로 완전히 특성화할 수 있다는 것을 주장한다.
technique: 최대차수 4인 경우에 대한 직접 분석을 통한 증명 (초록만으로는 구체적 기법 불확실).

title: D-coloring of planar graphs
abstract: A proper edge-coloring of a graph $G$ is a D-coloring if every subgraph isomorphic to $K_4-e$ is rainbow. The minimum number of colors in such a coloring is the D-chromatic index $χ'_D(G)$. Wang conjectured that every planar graph of maximum degree $Δ\ge 4$ satisfies $χ'_D(G) \le 9$ for $Δ= 4$, $χ'_D(G) \le 10$ for $Δ= 5$, and $χ'_D(G) \le 2Δ- 1$ for $Δ\ge 6$. We prove that every planar graph $G$ satisfies \[ χ_D'(G) \leq \begin{cases} 9, & Δ(G) \leq 4, \\ 10, & Δ(G) = 5, \\ 2Δ(G) - 1, & Δ(G) \geq 33. \end{cases} \] Each bound is best possible in its stated range. Consequently, Wang's conjecture remains open only for $6 \le Δ\le 32$.
relevance_reason: 평면그래프의 변 칠하기 문제로, McMullen's problem의 기하학적·조합론적 성질(convex position, general position, oriented matroid)과는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 평면그래프의 D-칠하기(모든 $K_4-e$ 부분그래프가 무지개색)에 대한 D-색수를 연구한다. Wang의 추측을 부분적으로 증명하여 $Δ≤4, Δ=5, Δ≥33$ 범위에서 경계값을 확립했으며, $6≤Δ≤32$ 범위만 미해결로 남겨둔다.
technique: 초록에 명시된 증명 기법 없음

title: Decision problem for Hamilton $2$-cycles in $4$-graphs
abstract: A $4$-uniform $2$-cycle in a $4$-uniform hypergraph of length $t$ is a cyclic ordering of $2t$ vertices $v_1v_2\cdots v_{2t}v_1$ such that $v_{2i+1}v_{2i+2}v_{2i+3}v_{2i+4}$ are edges for $0\le i\le t-1$ while the addition is modulo $2t$.   For every $γ>0$ and large $n$, we characterize the $n$-vertex $4$-uniform hypergraphs such that every triple of vertices is contained in at least $(1/3+γ)n$ edges and admits a Hamilton $2$-cycle. Up to the error term $γn$, the assumption on the minimum codegree is best possible and verifies a conjecture of Garbe and Mycroft. As a consequence, this gives a polynomial-time algorithm that decides whether an $n$-vertex $4$-uniform hypergraph with minimum codegree $(1/3+γ)n$ contains a Hamilton $2$-cycle. This stands as a steep contrast to the graph case where such a hardness gap has size $o(n)$.
relevance_reason: Hamilton 순환 문제는 그래프/초그래프 이론의 조합론적 문제이나, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, realizability 등 이산기하학 중심의 연구 문제와 직접적 관련성이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 4-uniform 초그래프에서 Hamilton 2-cycle의 존재성을 특성화하며, 최소 codegree 조건 $(1/3+γ)n$에서 다항 시간 결정 알고리즘을 제시한다. 이는 Garbe–Mycroft 추측을 검증하고, 그래프 경우와 달리 경경계 간의 큰 경도 격차(hardness gap)를 보여준다.
technique: 최소 codegree 조건 기반 특성화 및 다항 시간 결정 알고리즘

title: The 1/3-phenomenon of placement probabilities of tilings in the semiregular hexagon
abstract: We prove Krattenthaler's conjecture from 2001 about the $1/3$-phenomenon for lozenge tilings of semiregular hexagons. In a first step we reduce the problem to the case of regular hexagons. In a second step we further reduce the question to a special case already covered in the literature. This is achieved by vast application of the celebrated Zeilberger Algorithm and the Holonomic Ansatz.
relevance_reason: 로젠 타일링과 육각형 기하는 조합론적 구조를 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, 실현 가능성과는 직접 관련 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 반정규 육각형(semiregular hexagon)의 로젠 타일링에서 배치 확률의 1/3 현상에 대한 Krattenthaler의 2001년 추측을 증명한다. 정규 육각형으로의 축약을 거쳐 기존 문헌에서 다룬 특수한 경우로 문제를 감소시킨다.
technique: Zeilberger Algorithm과 Holonomic Ansatz의 광범위한 적용을 통한 체계적 감소(reduction).

title: Three-Bit Flows and Cycle Covers. Part I
abstract: We study the relationship between nowhere-zero three-bit flows, labeled triangles, and cycle double covers of bridgeless multigraphs. Using the flow theorems of Seymour and Tutte, we realize the three flow values at each vertex as the side differences of a triangle whose sides carry two-element subsets of $\F_2^3$. We express agreement of these local labels across graph edges as a binary system and prove its solvability by an inconsistency certificate, a local tester-parity identity, and a global double count.
