The resulting compatible labels trace cycle components in which every edge occurs exactly twice, proving that every finite bridgeless multigraph has a cycle double cover, proving the cycle double cover conjecture.
relevance_reason: Cycle double cover conjecture는 그래프 이론의 고전 문제이며, McMullen's problem은 볼록 위치의 점 배치와 oriented matroid의 구조에 관한 이산기하학 문제로, 주제와 방법론이 근본적으로 다름.
summary: 본 논문은 bridgeless multigraph의 cycle double cover conjecture를 nowhere-zero three-bit flow, labeled triangles, 및 $\F_2^3$의 두 원소 부분집합을 이용하여 증명한다. 각 꼭짓점에서 흐름 값들을 삼각형의 변 차이로 실현하고, 이진 시스템의 일관성을 inconsistency certificate와 global double count로 보인다.
technique: Seymour와 Tutte의 흐름 정리를 활용하여 국소 삼각형 라벨과 전역 이진 시스템의 solvability를 연결하는 방법.

title: Generalizations of nets and Latin squares
abstract: We examine combinatorial structures which generalize $(k,n)$-nets, orthogonal arrays, and mutually orthogonal Latin squares. By a reticulation we mean of a point set and two collections (types) of families of lines such that two lines of different types meet in exactly one point and each family of lines partitions the point set. The number of points incident with any line depends only upon the type of the line, and every point is incident with the same number of lines of a given type. Each choice of one line family of each type leads to an arrangement of the points into a rectangular grid. Recording the line containing a given point in the corresponding position of an array gives to a generalization of sets of mutually orthogonal Latin squares, dubbed a cooperative system. A cooperative system consists of a collection of column-Latin matrices and a collection of row-Latin matrices such that each column-Latin matrix is orthogonal to each row-Latin matrix. Recording lines which contain a given point as a tuple gives a generalization of certain orthogonal arrays, dubbed semi-orthogonal arrays. Notions of parastrophy and isotopy for cooperative systems, corresponding to permuting families of lines and lines within each family, are introduced. Constructions of small reticulations and three recursive constructions of larger reticulations are given.
relevance_reason: Latin squares와 orthogonal arrays는 조합론의 고전 주제이나, McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, tope graph 등과는 직접적 연관이 없음.
summary: 논문은 (k,n)-nets, orthogonal arrays, 상호직교 Latin squares를 일반화하는 reticulation 구조를 소개한다. Cooperative system은 column-Latin과 row-Latin 행렬의 직교성 조건을 만족하고, semi-orthogonal arrays는 특정 orthogonal arrays의 일반화이다. 작은 reticulations의 구성과 세 가지 재귀적 구성 방법이 제시된다.
technique: Reticulation 프레임워크를 통한 점-직선 관계 구조화와 parastrophy, isotopy 개념 도입.

title: Normal ordering in the $(p,q)$-deformed generalized Weyl algebra. III: The binomial formula
abstract: We study the $(p, q)$-deformed generalized Weyl algebra generated by variables $X, Y$ and $Z_p$ satisfying the $(p, q)$-commutation relations $XY-qYX=h Y^sZ_{p}, XZ_p=pZ_pX$, and $Z_pY=pYZ_p$, with $s\in \mathbb{N}_0$. Within this framework, we investigate the noncommutative binomial formula $(X+Y)^n$ and related identities. In particular, we show how the associated normal ordering coefficients can be expressed in terms of $(p,q)$-deformed $s$-rook numbers. We treat several special cases explicitly, recovering known results from literature as well as deriving new ones.
relevance_reason: $(p,q)$-deformed Weyl algebra와 normal ordering은 비가환기하학이나 표현론에 속하며, McMullen's problem의 combinatorial convex geometry와 직접적 연관이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 $(p,q)$-deformed generalized Weyl algebra에서 noncommutative binomial formula $(X+Y)^n$을 연구하며, normal ordering coefficients를 $(p,q)$-deformed $s$-rook numbers로 표현한다. 특수 경우들을 명시적으로 다루어 기존 결과를 회복하고 새로운 항등식들을 도출한다.
technique: $(p,q)$-commutation relations에서의 normal ordering과 rook numbers를 이용한 계수 표현.

title: Aperiodicity and subword complexity in the binary expansion of powers of three
abstract: We prove two results on the fine structure of the binary digits of $3^{m}$. First, for every fixed period $p$, the number of positions at which the binary expansion of $3^{m}$ breaks $p$-periodicity grows in order like $\log m/\log\log m$; equivalently, no window of the expansion deeper than a fixed power of $\log m$ is $p$-periodic. Second, the finite binary word formed by the low-order digits of $3^{m}$ has full low-order subword complexity: its complexity function satisfies $\pcx_{3^{m}}(n)\ge n+1$ for every length $n$, once $m$ is large enough.
relevance_reason: 이산기하학이나 조합론의 조합적 구조(특히 convex position, oriented matroid, realizability 등)와 무관하며, 수론적·수학기초 성질에 관한 논문.
summary: 3의 거듭제곱 $3^m$의 이진 전개식에서 주기성을 깨뜨리는 위치의 개수가 $\log m/\log\log m$ 정도로 증가함을 보이고, 낮은 자리 이진 단어의 subword complexity가 최소 $n+1$을 만족함을 증명한다.
technique: 이진 전개의 주기성 분석 및 complexity function 추정

title: The Lean Number of a Hypergraph
abstract: Inspired by the notion of tricolorability of knots, we introduce the concept of lean coloring for hypergraphs and the associated lean number of a hypergraph. Lean coloring often involves very few colors, yet still requires the methods of usual graph coloring, forcing the overall complexity to be NP-Hard. We provide two alternative formulations of the lean coloring problem that involve a type of coloring on abstract simplicial complexes and a partial coloring on bipartite graphs. We then provide bounds for the lean numbers of hypergraphs that are $k$-uniform, $k$-partite, wide-path connected, or $r$-complete. Python-like script is included to allow the implementation and study of a lean coloring algorithm. We conclude with some directions for future work and present the lean numbers of $130$ knots and links.
relevance_reason: 하이퍼그래프 색칠 문제는 McMullen's problem의 조합론적 구조(convex position, general position, oriented matroid)와 직접적인 연관이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 매듭의 삼색칠성 개념에서 영감을 받아 하이퍼그래프의 'lean coloring'과 lean number를 도입한다. 적은 색깔로 충분하지만 NP-Hard 복잡도를 가지며, 단순 복합체의 색칠과 이분 그래프의 부분 색칠로 재해석된다. 균등, 분할, 경로 연결성, 완전 하이퍼그래프에 대한 한계를 제공하고 130개 매듭과 고리의 lean number를 계산한다.
technique: 추상 단순 복합체(abstract simplicial complex) 색칠과 이분 그래프 부분 색칠을 이용한 하이퍼그래프 색칠 문제의 재정식화

title: Measures and generalizations of dual Littlewood identities
abstract: We introduce three families of vectors $|\underlineλ^{so}\rangle$, $|\underlineλ^{sp}\rangle$ and $|\underlineλ^{o}\rangle$ parametrized by partitions in the Fock space by using products of adjoint vertex operators. We show that the quotient space of the dual vacuum vector is spanned by the partition vectors indexed by a special family of partitions. The partition-indexed vectors also help us to derive the dual Littlewood identities of types B, C, and D in a new manner associated to the special family of partitions. As an application, we obtain a new free fermionic construction to show that the measures related to dual Littlewood identities introduced by Rains \cite[Section 7]{Rai2000} and Betea \cite[Section 3]{Be2020} are determinantal with repect to some explicit correlation kernels.   Furthermore we establish a number of generalized Littlewood identities summed over certain restricted partitions by computing the inner products with elements indexed by one-column partitions {or generalized partitions $(0^m)$} in the complete dual Fock space. {In particular, for each positive integer $n$, we obtain generalized Littlewood identities for $(-n)$-asymmetric partitions. We show that these generalized Littlewood identities contain several well-known Littlewood-type identities as special cases. Consequently we also give a new proof of the generalized Littlewood identity \cite[(5.25)]{LSV2008} for Lie superalgebras. } %We also produce infinite generalized Littlewood identities by calculating the inner products between these elements and some elements indexed by one-column partitions in the complete dual Fock space.
relevance_reason: 본 논문은 Littlewood 항등식, Fock 공간, 정점 작용소 대수를 다루며 McMullen's problem(볼록 위치의 점 배치, oriented matroid, 조합 기하)과 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 논문은 Fock 공간에서 수반 정점 작용소의 곱으로 정의된 세 가지 벡터 족을 도입하고, 이들이 특수 분할로 인덱싱된 분할 벡터에 의해 생성됨을 보인다. B, C, D 타입의 쌍대 Littlewood 항등식을 새로운 방식으로 유도하며, 이를 통해 관련 척도들이 명시적 상관 커널에 대해 행렬식적임을 보인다.
technique: 자유 페르미온 구성(free fermionic construction)과 Fock 공간에서의 내적 계산을 이용한 일반화된 Littlewood 항등식 도출.

title: Graph Puzzles III.1: A Proof of Sabidussi's Compatibility Conjecture
abstract: We prove Sabidussi's compatibility conjecture. Let $G$ be a finite connected multigraph in which every vertex has even degree and the minimum degree is at least four, and let $T$ be a closed trail that traverses every edge exactly once. The edges of $G$ can be partitioned into circuits (connected 2-regular subgraphs) so that no circuit contains the two edges used consecutively anywhere in $T$. In fact, the edges can be four-coloured so that every such pair receives two different colours and the subgraph formed by the edges of each colour has even degree at every vertex. Formalization in Lean 4 is also available in the author's github.
relevance_reason: 그래프 회로 분할과 색칠 문제로, McMullen's problem의 convex position과 oriented matroid 구조와는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 Sabidussi의 호환성 추측을 증명한다. 짝수 차수의 유한 연결 멀티그래프에서 모든 간선을 정확히 한 번 순회하는 폐곡선 경로에 대해, 간선들을 회로(연결된 2-정규 부분그래프)로 분할할 수 있으며, 경로에서 연속으로 사용되는 간선 쌍이 서로 다른 회로에 속하도록 할 수 있음을 보인다. 또한 4-색칠로도 동일한 성질을 만족하도록 할 수 있음을 증명한다.
technique: 폐곡선 경로(closed trail) 기반의 간선 분할 및 색칠 이론

title: Clique spectral extremal problem on disjoint color-critical graphs
abstract: For a given graph $F$, a graph $G$ is called $F$-free if it does not contain $F$ as a subgraph. A graph is color-critical if deleting one of its edges decreases its chromatic number. Let $F_1, F_2, \cdots, F_t$ be $t$ disjoint color-critical graphs with chromatic number $r+1$. For $2 \leq s \leq r$ and sufficiently large $n$, we determine the unique extremal graph with the maximum $s$-clique spectral radius among all $n$-vertex $\bigcup_{i=1}^t F_i$-free graphs.
relevance_reason: 이산기하학 또는 조합최적화와의 직접 연관이 없으며, 스펙트럴 그래프 이론과 색-임계 그래프의 결합으로 McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, chirotope 등과 무관함.
summary: 본 논문은 t개의 분리된 색-임계 그래프(color-critical graphs)의 분리합집합을 포함하지 않는 n-정점 그래프 중에서 s-clique spectral radius를 최대화하는 유일한 극값 그래프를 충분히 큰 n에 대해 결정한다. 색수가 r+1인 색-임계 그래프들에 대한 스펙트럴 극값 문제를 해결한다.
technique: 스펙트럴 그래프 이론과 극값 그래프 이론의 결합; 색-임계성(color-criticality)을 활용한 금지된 부분그래프 구조 분석

title: Parking completions are $\mathbf{x}$-parking functions
abstract: Parking functions correspond with preferences of $n$ cars which enter sequentially to park on a one-way street where (1) each car parks in the first available spot greater than or equal to its preference and (2) all cars successfully park. We generalize parking functions to parking completions: Here, we are given that some cars have already parked in a set of spots, which are indexed in a sequence $\mathbf{t}$. We then consider a preference list $\mathbf{c}$, where length of $\mathbf{t}$ + length of $\mathbf{c}$ = $n$. If all cars can park, we say that $\mathbf{c}$ is a parking completion. Adeniran et al. (2020) state an open problem which proposes a connection between the number of parking completions to the volumes of Pitman-Stanley polytopes by explicit computation on small values of $n$. In this paper, we provide a solution to this open problem by proving a theorem which explains that the set of parking completions is the set of $\mathbf{x}$-parking functions.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 주차 함수(parking functions)와 $\mathbf{x}$-주차 함수의 조합론적 동치 관계를 다루며, McMullen 문제(볼록 위치, oriented matroid, 실현 가능성)와 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 주차 완성(parking completion) 개념을 도입하여, 일부 차들이 이미 주어진 위치에 주차된 상황에서 나머지 차들의 선호 목록 $\mathbf{c}$가 모든 차를 성공적으로 주차시킬 조건을 탐구한다. Adeniran et al. (2020)이 제기한 미해결 문제—주차 완성의 수와 Pitman-Stanley 폴리토프의 부피 사이의 연결—를 해결하며, 주차 완성의 집합이 정확히 $\mathbf{x}$-주차 함수의 집합과 일치함을 증명한다.
technique: 주차 완성과 $\mathbf{x}$-주차 함수 사이의 집합 동치 관계를 직접 증명하는 조합론적 방법.

title: Contextual Fraction on Permutation Gain Graphs: Exact Algorithms, Query Lower Bounds, and Dynamic Maintenance
abstract: For an explicitly represented finite empirical model, deciding whether the contextual fraction is strictly below one is NP-complete, while the standard exact linear program has one column for every global assignment. We identify a permutation-transport class in which this global problem collapses to a fixed-point calculation. Let a connected permutation gain graph act on a finite state set $O$, let $H \leq{ \rm Sym}(O)$ be its holonomy subgroup, let $F = {\rm Fix}(H)$, and let $p$ be an $H$-invariant root distribution. For the induced empirical model, \[ {\rm NCF}(e)=p(F),\qquad {\rm CF}(e)=1-p(F). \] Consequently, compatibility, $F$, and ${\rm CF}(e)$ are computable in $O(|O|(|V|+|E|))$ arithmetic and table operations. For every finite simple $2$-edge-connected graph, any deterministic exact algorithm in the explicit permutation-table query model requires at least $(|O|-1)|E|$ probes in the worst case, making the dependence on the input tables optimal up to constant factors. With a fixed spanning tree, chord insertions and deletions require $O(|O|)$ worst-case time, or time proportional to the moved-set representation, while compatibility and contextual-fraction queries take $O(1)$ time. Finally, for common-marginal realizable binary constraint languages, the support threshold ${\rm CF} < 1$ is polynomial-time equivalent to the associated finite-domain constraint-satisfaction problem and therefore inherits the Bulatov--Zhuk dichotomy. The results identify a query-optimal and dynamically maintainable tractability island inside the general contextual-fraction problem.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 순열 게인 그래프(permutation gain graph) 위의 contextual fraction 계산 및 동적 유지에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제(볼록 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid 등)와 직접적 관련이 없다.
summary: 연결된 순열 게인 그래프와 유한 상태 집합에 대해 비맥락적 분수(NCF)가 홀로노미 부분군의 고정점 분포 $p(F)$로 정확히 표현됨을 보이며, $O(|O|(|V|+|E|))$ 시간에 계산 가능함을 증명한다. 또한 명시적 순열-테이블 질의 모델에서 임의의 결정론적 정확 알고리즘은 최소 $(|O|-1)|E|$번의 탐색이 필요함을 보여 입력 테이블 의존성이 상수 인수 범위에서 최적임을 확립한다. 이진 제약 언어에 대해 $\mathrm{CF} < 1$ 임계 판정이 Bulatov–Zhuk 이분법(dichotomy)을 상속하는 다항시간 동치 문제임을 밝힌다.
technique: 홀로노미 부분군(holonomy subgroup)의 고정점 집합 계산과 스패닝 트리(spanning tree) 기반 동적 자료구조를 핵심 도구로 사용한다.

title: Ehrhart $h^*$-distributions
abstract: Every polynomial with real non-negative coefficients yields a finite probability distribution after normalization. The Ehrhart $h^*$-polynomial of a lattice polytope $P$ is a non-negative integer polynomial that encodes the integer-point counts for positive integer dilations of $P$. We study the corresponding finite distributions, which we call $h^*$-distributions. We determine the mean and variance of these distributions, establish a connection between higher moments and Ehrhart polynomial coefficients, and study their cluster points in the $d$-dimensional probability simplex. We consider the special case of real-rooted $h^*$-distributions, applying existing tail bounds to obtain new linear inequalities for the coefficients of real-rooted $h^*$-polynomials arising from reflexive polytopes. We conclude by establishing sufficient conditions under which a sequence of real-rooted $h^*$-distributions is asymptotically normal, and we apply our results to various families of polytopes, including zonotopes and Pitman-Stanley polytopes.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 Ehrhart $h^*$-다항식의 확률분포 이론을 다루며, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid와 전혀 관련이 없다.
summary: 격자 다면체(lattice polytope)의 Ehrhart $h^*$-다항식을 정규화하여 얻는 유한 확률분포, 즉 $h^*$-분포를 연구한다. 분포의 평균·분산·고차 모멘트와 Ehrhart 다항식 계수의 관계를 규명하고, 실근(real-rooted) $h^*$-다항식에 대한 꼬리 부등식(tail bounds)을 적용해 반사 다면체(reflexive polytope)의 계수에 대한 새로운 선형 부등식을 도출한다. 또한 실근 $h^*$-분포의 점근 정규성(asymptotic normality) 충분조건을 확립하고, zonotope 및 Pitman-Stanley 다면체 등 다양한 족에 적용한다.
technique: 실근 다항식에 대한 꼬리 한계(tail bounds)와 확률론적 모멘트 분석을 Ehrhart 이론에 결합.

title: Cremona invariance of filtered Varchenko--Gelfand algebras
abstract: We prove that the filtered Varchenko--Gelfand algebra is invariant under a natural Cremona operation on a class of real hyperplane arrangements. Namely, suppose that an arrangement contains all coordinate hyperplanes and that every remaining defining form is supported on two coordinates. Swapping the two coefficients in each such form produces its Cremona transform. Coordinatewise inversion gives a chamber bijection and an isomorphism of the corresponding filtered Varchenko--Gelfand algebras over every commutative coefficient ring. As an application, we exhibit two arrangements of eight central planes in $\mathbb{R}^3$ with isomorphic filtered Varchenko--Gelfand algebras but non-isomorphic tope graphs. This disproves a conjecture of Yagi--Yoshinaga on reconstructing tope graphs from filtered Varchenko--Gelfand algebras.
relevance_reason: tope graph라는 공통 개념이 등장하지만, 본 논문은 McMullen 문제나 Larman 추측과 직접 관련 없이 초평면 배열의 Varchenko–Gelfand 대수의 Cremona 불변성을 다룬다.
summary: 이 논문은 좌표 초평면을 포함하고 나머지 정의형식이 두 좌표에만 의존하는 실수 초평면 배열 클래스에서, Cremona 변환(각 형식의 두 계수를 교환)이 filtered Varchenko–Gelfand 대수의 동형을 유도함을 증명한다. 응용으로, $\mathbb{R}^3$에서 8개의 중심 평면으로 이루어진 두 배열이 동형인 filtered Varchenko–Gelfand 대수를 가지면서도 비동형인 tope graph를 가짐을 제시하여, Yagi–Yoshinaga의 추측(filtered Varchenko–Gelfand 대수로부터 tope graph를 복원 가능하다는 주장)을 반증한다.
technique: 좌표별 역사상(coordinatewise inversion)을 이용해 챔버(chamber) 전단사 대응과 대수 동형을 구성하는 것이 핵심 기법이다.
connections: 추측: tope graph와 oriented matroid의 관계를 통해 McMullen 문제의 배열 구분 도구로서 tope graph의 한계를 시사할 수 있으나, 직접적 연결 근거는 초록에 없음.

title: Lattice slices, Ehrhart polynomials, and magic positivity of generalized parking-function polytopes
abstract: For $\mathbf{b}=(b_1,\dots,b_n)\in\mathbb{Z}_{>0}^n$, a $\mathbf{b}$-parking function is a sequence $(β_1,\dots,β_n)$ of positive integers whose nondecreasing rearrangement $β_1'\leβ_2'\le\cdots\leβ_n'$ satisfies $β_i'\le b_1+\cdots+b_i$. The $\mathbf{b}$-parking-function polytope $\mathfrak{X}_n(\mathbf{b})$ is the convex hull of all $\mathbf{b}$-parking functions of length $n$ in $\mathbb{R}^n$. We prove that every lattice slice of $\mathfrak{X}_n(\mathbf{b})$, obtained by fixing one coordinate at an integer value, is itself a $\mathbf{b}'$-parking-function polytope of one dimension less, with an explicit parameter vector $\mathbf{b}'$; this yields a recursion for the number of lattice points of $\mathfrak{X}_n(\mathbf{b})$. We further show that every dilate of a $\mathbf{b}$-parking-function polytope is a translate of another such polytope, that the number of lattice points is a polynomial function of $\mathbf{b}$, and we deduce an explicit formula for the Ehrhart polynomial of $\mathfrak{X}_n(\mathbf{b})$ for arbitrary $\mathbf{b}$ as a finite sum indexed by draconian sequences, resolving a problem of Hanada, Lentfer, and Vindas-Meléndez; an equivalent formula was recently obtained, independently, by Liu and Thawinrak in a closely related setting. In the special case $\mathbf{b}=(a,b,\dots,b)$, we obtain an explicit closed form and a generating function for the Ehrhart polynomial. As an application, we classify magic positivity in the two-parameter family $\mathfrak{X}_n(a,b)=\mathfrak{X}_n(a,b,\dots,b)$: the polytope $\mathfrak{X}_n(a,b)$ is magic positive if and only if $(n,a,b)\ne(2,1,1)$. Thus, we answer a problem posed by Ferroni and Higashitani for $\mathfrak{X}_n(a,b)$. Our result extends recent work of Liu and Zhang on partial permutahedra and leads us to conjecture that magic positivity holds for every $\mathfrak{X}_n(\mathbf{b})$ with $n\ge3$.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 주차 함수 다면체(parking-function polytopes)의 Ehrhart 다항식과 격자 점 계산에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid와 전혀 관련이 없다.
summary: $\mathbf{b}$-주차 함수 다면체 $\mathfrak{X}_n(\mathbf{b})$의 격자 슬라이스가 더 낮은 차원의 $\mathbf{b}'$-주차 함수 다면체임을 증명하고, 이를 이용해 Ehrhart 다항식의 명시적 공식을 draconian sequence로 색인된 유한 합으로 도출하여 Hanada–Lentfer–Vindas-Meléndez의 문제를 해결했다. 두 매개변수 족 $\mathfrak{X}_n(a,b)$에 대해 magic positivity를 완전히 분류하여, $(n,a,b)\ne(2,1,1)$인 경우에만 magic positive임을 보였다. 또한 $n\ge3$인 모든 $\mathfrak{X}_n(\mathbf{b})$에 대해 magic positivity가 성립한다는 추측을 제시했다.
technique: 격자 슬라이스의 재귀적 구조 분석, draconian sequence를 이용한 Ehrhart 다항식 명시적 공식, 생성함수 방법.

title: Interchange graphs of (0,1)-matrices are maximally Hamiltonian
abstract: For integer vectors R,S let A(R,S) denote the class of (0,1)-matrices with row sum vector R and column sum vector S. Its interchange graph G(R,S) has A(R,S) as its vertex set, two matrices being adjacent when they differ by a single 2 x 2 interchange. Brualdi conjectured that G(R,S) is Hamiltonian for every R,S. We prove the stronger statement that G(R,S) is maximally Hamiltonian: Hamilton-laceable when bipartite, and Hamilton-connected when not. The proof is a structural induction on the number of matrices in the class, organized by the structure theory of interchange graphs. Deleting inactive lines and splitting invariant positions expresses any class as a Cartesian product, reducing the argument to the prime factors. The bipartite classes are products of complete transposition graphs; we settle them together, without induction, by proving they are paired 2-disjoint-path-coverable and hence Hamilton-laceable, using a recent theorem of Coleman, Fischberg, Gong, Harrington and Wong on paired disjoint path covers. The non-bipartite classes divide into three cases: products assembled from smaller factors, a base of Johnson graphs and small classes, and the large prime classes, treated by a pivot-and-fiber construction whose line quotients are matroid base-exchange graphs. The complete argument has been machine-checked in the Lean 4 proof assistant from first principles together with seven cited results of the literature; the disjoint-path-cover results it imports are themselves proved within the formalization.
comment: 37 pages, 2 figures. Ancillary public trust surface and reproducibility guide. Companion Lean 4 formalization, with continuous integration re-running the kernel check, at https://github.com/jbaggett/brualdi-interchange-lean
relevance_reason: 조합론의 그래프 구조 문제이지만 McMullen's problem의 볼록 위치·oriented matroid·realizability와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 행·열 합 벡터가 고정된 (0,1)-행렬 클래스의 interchange graph G(R,S)가 최대 해밀턴(maximally Hamiltonian)임을 증명한다. 2×2 교환으로 인접한 행렬들을 정점으로 하는 그래프가 이분일 때는 Hamilton-laceable, 비이분일 때는 Hamilton-connected임을 구조적 귀납법으로 보인다.
technique: Cartesian product 분해, 구조적 귀납법, matroid base-exchange graph 활용, paired disjoint path cover 정리 적용, Lean 4 기계 증명.
connections: 추측: matroid base-exchange graph를 다루므로 oriented matroid와 약한 연결 가능하나, 초록에서 chirotope, realizability, general position 등 핵심 개념 부재.

title: Hypergraph Turan with bounded matching number
abstract: For a fixed graph $G$, an $r$-uniform hypergraph is said to contain a Berge-$G$ if there exists a bijection $f\colon E(G)\to E(\mathcal{H})$ for some subhypergraph $\mathcal{H}$ such that $e\subseteq f(e)$ for every $e\in E(G)$. Motivated by Alon and Frankl's study of Turán problems under bounded matching constraints, we investigate the maximum number of edges in $r$-uniform Berge-$K_3$-free hypergraphs with matching number at most~$s$. We determine the exact Turán numbers for the cases $r=3$ and $r=4$. For $r=3$ and $n \geq 3 s$, we prove that every $n$-vertex Berge- $K_3$-free 3-graph with matching number $s$ has at most $s(n-2 s)$ edges, and we characterize the unique extremal hypergraph attaining equality. For $r=4$ and $n \geq 4 s$, the maximum number of edges is $s\lfloor(n-2 s) / 2\rfloor$, except for the exceptional case $s=1$ and $n \equiv 1(\bmod 4)$, in which the bound is $(n-1) / 2$. As a corollary, our results recover the classical theorem of Győri on Berge-$K_3$-free hypergraphs.
relevance_reason: Turán 문제와 matching 제약은 극값 조합론이지만, McMullen's problem(점의 convex position, oriented matroid, 기하학적 실현)과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 bounded matching number를 가진 r-uniform Berge-$K_3$-free 초그래프의 최대 간선 수(Turán 수)를 결정한다. $r=3$일 때 정확한 Turán 수 $s(n-2s)$와 극값 초그래프를 특성화하였고, $r=4$일 때도 정확한 값을 도출했으며, Győri의 고전적 정리를 특수한 경우로 회수한다.
technique: Matching 제약 하에서의 극값 구조 분석 및 간선 수 상한의 정확한 결정.

title: The order of long rainbow arithmetic progressions
abstract: Let $T_k$ be the minimum positive integer $t$ such that, for every positive integer $n$, every equinumerous $t$-coloring of $[tn]$ contains a rainbow $k$-term arithmetic progression. Jungić, Licht, Mahdian, Nešetřil and Radoičić conjectured that $T_k=Θ(k^2)$, while Conlon, Fox and Sudakov proved that $T_k=O(k^2\log k)$. We prove the matching lower bound $T_k=Ω(k^2\log k)$, and hence $T_k=Θ(k^2\log k)$.
relevance_reason: Rainbow arithmetic progressions와 equinumerous colorings는 Ramsey theory의 고전적 주제이나, McMullen's problem의 핵심인 convex position, oriented matroid, realizability와는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 equinumerous t-coloring of [tn]에서 rainbow k-term arithmetic progression의 최소 색상 수 $T_k$의 정확한 점근적 크기를 결정한다. 저자는 $T_k = \Theta(k^2\log k)$임을 증명하여 Conlon-Fox-Sudakov의 상한과 자신의 하한을 일치시킨다.
technique: Ramsey 이론적 논증을 통한 조합적 하한 증명 기법

title: A gap theorem for non-trivial maximal intersecting families and an exact weighted asymptotic
abstract: Let $D_n$ be the disjointness graph on the nonempty subsets of $[n]$, whose independent sets are exactly the intersecting families on $[n]$. We study the weighted independent-set polynomial $W(n)=\sum_F\prod_{S\in F}w(S)$, the sum running over these families, for the doubly exponential weight $w(S)=2^{2^{n-|S|}}-1$. The kernel-bearing (trivial) part $Z_\cap(n)$ is exact by inclusion-exclusion and satisfies $Z_\cap(n)\sim n\cdot 2^{3^{n-1}}$. For the kernel-free remainder we prove the exact prefactor $R(n)=(3/4+o(1))n\cdot 2^{3^{n-1}-2^{n-1}+2}$, whence $\log_2(Z_\cap(n)/R(n))=2^{n-1}-2+\log_2(4/3)+o(1)$, an additive $o(1)$, not merely a leading-order one. The engine is a second-level extremal theorem: among kernel-free maximal linked systems other than the $n$ one-flip stars, the largest weight exponent is $3^{n-1}-3\cdot 2^{n-2}+6$, a fixed gap $2^{n-2}-4$ below the maximum, with the extremisers classified exactly. None of this is special to the weight: for $w_B(S)=B^{B^{n-|S|}}-1$ with integer $B\ge 2$ the same stars dominate, the near-extremal families sit a gap $B^{n-2}-B^2$ below, and the prefactor is $1-B^{-B}$. The combinatorial input is the $p$-biased extremal problem for non-trivial intersecting families: $M_2(n,p)=p-pq^{n-1}+qp^{n-1}$ for all $n\ge 3$, $0<p\le 1/2$, $q=1-p$. This first level is essentially known: the extremal family is the Wheel coterie of Peleg and Wool, and at $p=1/Q$ the statement, with its maximiser classification, is the case $r=n$ of Borg's Hilton-Milner theorem for signed sets (2013). We give a short self-contained Erdős-Ko-Rado proof, uniform in real $p\in(0,1/2]$, whose layer-two rigidity feeds the second level. The novelty claimed lies at the second level and in the prefactor, where the classification cannot be read off the layer profile alone: at $n=5$ one profile carries two non-isomorphic types of extremisers.
relevance_reason: 교집합 족(intersecting families)의 극값 문제를 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 핵심인 convex position 점 배치, oriented matroid, realizability와는 무관한 조합론적 설정.
summary: 본 논문은 [n]의 부분집합들의 교집합 족에 대한 가중 독립집합 다항식을 연구한다. 이중지수 가중치 $w(S)=2^{2^{n-|S|}}-1$에 대해, trivial kernel 부분과 kernel-free 부분의 정확한 주도항과 prefactor를 규명하며, 두 번째 수준의 극값정리로 극값 maximal linked systems을 완전히 분류한다.
technique: 포함-배제 원리, p-biased extrem값 문제, Erdős-Ko-Rado 방법, layer-wise rigidity 분석을 통한 극값 족의 정확한 분류.
connections: Borg의 Hilton-Milner 정리(signed sets)와 관련 있으나, McMullen's problem의 기하학적·oriented matroid 측면과는 직결되지 않음.

title: On Generalized von Neumann Inverse Graphs of Finite Commutative Regular Rings
abstract: Let $R$ be a ring with identity. The generalized von Neumann inverse graph of $R$, denoted by $Γ_{Reg}(R)$, is defined as the graph whose vertex set is $Reg(R)$, where two distinct vertices $a,b \in R$ are adjacent if and only if $aba=a$ or $bab=b$. In this work, we consider the reduced graph $Γ'_{Reg}(R)$ obtained by restricting the vertex set to $Reg(R)\setminus{0_R}$, so that $Γ_{Reg}(R) \cong K_1 + Γ'_{Reg}(R)$, allowing the analysis to focus on its nontrivial structure. We investigate the structure of $Γ'_{Reg}(R)$ for finite commutative von Neumann regular rings and establish several results describing its graph-theoretic properties in relation to the algebraic structure of $R$. In particular, we derive conditions that characterize connectivity, acyclicity, and planarity, and examine structural features such as vertex degrees, girth, and the existence of pendant vertices, along with their algebraic implications. We also identify circumstances under which $Γ'_{Reg}(R)$ exhibits specific graph classes, including paths, cycles, and wheels, as well as the presence of certain induced subgraphs. Furthermore, an explicit algorithm is provided to construct $Γ'_{Reg}(R)$, and connections with the inclusion ideal graph of $R$ are discussed, offering additional insight into the interplay between ring-theoretic properties and graph structures.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 가환 von Neumann 정칙환의 그래프 구조를 다루는 대수적 그래프론 연구로, McMullen의 문제(convex polytope와 oriented matroid의 기하학적 조합론)와 직접 관련이 없습니다.
summary: 유한 가환 von Neumann 정칙환 $R$에 대해 generalized von Neumann inverse graph $\Gamma'_{\text{Reg}}(R)$의 구조를 연구합니다. 연결성, 비순환성, 평면성 등의 그래프-이론적 성질과 환론적 구조의 관계를 특성화하고, 경로, 사이클, 바퀴 등 특정 그래프 클래스의 출현 조건을 규명합니다.
technique: 환론적 조건으로부터 그래프의 위상적 불변량(차수, 둘레, 유도 부분그래프)을 특성화하는 대수-조합론적 접근.

title: Acyclic Dichromatic Number of Tournaments: these are the Champions
abstract: The acyclic dichromatic number of an oriented graph is the minimum size of a vertex-partition such that the digraphs induced by any single part are acyclic, and the oriented bipartite graphs between any two parts are acyclic too. We characterize the subtournaments that must appear in every tournament with sufficiently large acyclic dichromatic number, thereby confirming a conjecture of Bang-Jensen, Picasarri-Arrieta, and Yeo and prove that acyclic dichromatic number satisfies a local to global property.
comment: A previous version of this paper was presented at Discrete Maths Days (DMD26) in June 2026
relevance_reason: Tournament의 acyclic dichromatic number는 oriented matroid의 acyclic reorientation과 개념적 유사성이 있으나, McMullen's problem(convex position, general position의 점 배치 기하학)과는 직접 관련 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 oriented graph의 acyclic dichromatic number를 연구하며, 이는 vertex partition으로 각 part의 induced digraph와 두 part 사이의 oriented bipartite graph가 모두 acyclic이 되도록 하는 최소 크기를 의미한다. 충분히 큰 acyclic dichromatic number를 가진 모든 tournament에 반드시 나타나야 하는 subtournament를 특성화하고, Bang-Jensen 등의 추측을 확인했다.
technique: Tournament 내 forbidden subtournament 특성화 및 local-to-global property 증명.
connections: 추측: acyclic orientation 구조의 조합론적 성질이 oriented matroid의 reorientation 문제와 원거리에서 연결될 가능성이 있으나, 초록 근거 부족.

title: From roots to paths: graphs simultaneously irregular with respect to rooted and ordinary paths
abstract: Let $P_n$ denote a path on $n$ vertices. A simple finite graph $G$ is called $P_n$-irregular if any two distinct vertices of $G$ belong to a different number of subgraphs of $G$ isomorphic to $P_n$. Alternatively, for a fixed vertex $r$ of $P_n$ (the root), $G$ is called $(P_n)_r$-irregular if any two distinct vertices of $G$ act as the root $r$ in a different number of subgraphs of $G$ isomorphic to $P_n$. This paper proves that for each integer $k \geq 4$, there exists an infinite family of graphs that are simultaneously $P_n$-irregular and $(P_n)_r$-irregular for every integer $n$ satisfying $4 \leq n \leq k$ and every root $r$ of $P_n$. For the path $P_3$, we observe that no nontrivial $(P_3)_r$-irregular graphs exist if $r$ is the central vertex. In contrast, if $r$ is an end-vertex of $P_3$, an infinite collection of graphs is constructed that are both $P_3$-irregular and $(P_3)_r$-irregular. In particular, these results confirm the Strong Conjecture about $F$-irregular graphs for the case where $F$ is a path $P_n$.
relevance_reason: 경로 부분그래프의 개수 분포와 정점 불규칙성(irregularity)을 다루지만, McMullen 문제의 중심인 볼록 위치의 점 배치, oriented matroid, chirotope, realizability와는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 논문은 그래프 $G$가 경로 $P_n$의 부분그래프 개수로 정점을 구별할 수 있는 $P_n$-불규칙성과, 특정 근(root)을 기준으로 한 $(P_n)_r$-불규칙성을 동시에 만족하는 그래프족의 존재를 증명한다. $k \geq 4$에 대해 $4 \leq n \leq k$인 모든 경로와 모든 근에 대해 이 두 조건을 동시에 만족하는 무한족을 구성하고, $P_3$의 경우를 특별히 분석한다.
technique: 그래프 구성을 통한 명시적 무한족의 구성(explicit infinite family construction)

title: Matroid correspondence
abstract: Motivated by algebraic correspondences and linear operators associated with volume and Lorentzian polynomials, we introduce matroid correspondences and their polymatroid analogues. A matroid correspondence defines a functor between poset categories of matroids whose morphisms are matroid quotients, and various standard functors, including deletion, contraction, free extension, truncation, intersection, union, and pullback, arise in this way. We show that these correspondences preserve representability and algebraicity under natural hypotheses. In the polymatroid setting, we establish compatibility with multisymmetric lifts. Finally, we relate this construction to the supports of linear operators with Lorentzian symbols.
relevance_reason: Matroid 이론의 일반적 틀을 제시하지만 McMullen's problem(convex position, oriented matroid의 acyclic reorientation, tope graph 등)의 구체적 문제와 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 논문은 부피 및 Lorentzian 다항식의 선형연산자에서 비롯된 matroid correspondence를 도입하고, 이를 polymatroid로 확장함. 다양한 표준 functor들(deletion, contraction, truncation, intersection 등)이 correspondence 구조 내에서 arise함을 보이고, representability와 algebraicity 보존을 증명함.
technique: Poset category 관점의 functor 구성과 선형연산자의 Lorentzian symbol 표현을 통한 대응 건립.

title: On unirational varieties with poset parameterizations
abstract: We use partially ordered sets (posets) to provide a canonical parameterization for the Zariski closure of the image of a semialgebraic set under a rational map whose coordinate functions are polynomials with nonnegative integral coefficients. The resulting poset parametrization of such a unirational variety allows us to translate several well-studied problems into combinatorics; e.g. reducing the problems to describing the poset associated to the variety. These problems include, the implicitization problem from algebraic geometry, the toric reparameterization problem, the computation of the linear span of the variety, and the problem of distinguishing two semialgebraic subsets of the same ambient space. The technique applies to instances of these problems in several fields, including algebraic geometry, algebraic combinatorics, statistics and applied algebra. We demonstrate the technique on examples from each field, including degenerate subvarieties of secant varieties, matroid flat varieties -- which generalize toric varieties of edge polytopes, as well as varieties arising in multivariate data analysis and evolutionary biology.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 포셋(poset) 기반 단일유리다양체(unirational variety) 매개변수화를 다루며, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid의 acyclic reorientation과 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 반대수적 집합(semialgebraic set)의 유리사상(rational map) 이미지의 Zariski 폐포에 대해 편순서집합(poset)을 이용한 정준 매개변수화를 제공한다. 이 포셋 매개변수화를 통해 음함수화(implicitization), 토릭 재매개변수화(toric reparameterization), 선형 스팬 계산 등 여러 문제를 조합론적 문제로 환원할 수 있다. 적용 예시로는 할선다양체(secant variety)의 퇴화 부분다양체, 매트로이드 평면 다양체(matroid flat varieties), 다변량 데이터 분석 및 진화생물학에서 나타나는 다양체 등이 포함된다.
technique: 음이 아닌 정수 계수 다항식 좌표함수를 가지는 유리사상에 대해 포셋(poset)을 이용한 정준 매개변수화를 구성하여 대수기하학적 문제를 조합론적 문제로 변환한다.

title: Faster and simpler traversal of 0/1-polytopes
abstract: Recently, Merino and Mütze (FOCS'23+SICOMP'24) presented an algorithm for computing a Hamilton path on the skeleton of any 0/1-polytope ${\rm conv}(X)$, where $X\subseteq\{0,1\}^n$. The algorithm uses as a black box an algorithm for solving the classical linear optimization problem $\min\{w\cdot x\mid x\in X\}$ for some weight vector $w\in\mathbb{R}^n$. The resulting delay per visited vertex on the Hamilton path is only by a $\log n$ factor larger than the time to solve one instance of the optimization algorithm. In this paper, we make the Hamilton path algorithm simpler and faster. Namely, we obtain an amortized delay that is only by a constant factor larger than the running time of the optimization algorithm, thus removing the $\log n$ factor. As concrete results, this yields improved algorithms for generating bases and independent sets in a matroid, spanning trees, forests, matchings and maximum matchings in a graph, vertex covers, minimum vertex covers, independent sets and maximum independent sets in a bipartite graph, and antichains, maximum antichains and ideals in a poset. All of these listings correspond to Hamilton paths on the corresponding polytopes. Furthermore, we obtain an $\mathcal{O}(t_{\rm LP})$ amortized delay algorithm for the vertex enumeration problem on 0/1-polytopes $\{x\in\mathbb{R}^n\mid Ax\leq b\}$, where $A\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$ and $b\in\mathbb{R}^m$, and $t_{\rm LP}$ is the time needed to solve the linear program $\min\{w\cdot x\mid Ax\leq b\}$. This improves upon the $\mathcal{O}(t_{\rm LP} \log n)$ delay algorithm of Merino and Mütze, and the previous $\mathcal{O}(t_{\rm LP}\,n)$ delay algorithm of Bussieck and Lübbecke from 1998.
relevance_reason: 0/1-폴리토프의 Hamilton path 열거 알고리즘에 관한 논문으로, McMullen 문제(일반 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid, chirotope 등)와 직접적인 연관이 없다.
summary: 본 논문은 Merino–Mütze(FOCS'23+SICOMP'24)의 0/1-폴리토프 $\mathrm{conv}(X)$ 골격 위 Hamilton path 알고리즘을 개선하여, 선형 최적화 $\min\{w\cdot x\mid x\in X\}$를 블랙박스로 사용하는 amortized delay를 기존 $\mathcal{O}(t_{\mathrm{opt}}\log n)$에서 $\mathcal{O}(t_{\mathrm{opt}})$로 줄인다. 이를 통해 매트로이드 기저·독립집합, 신장 트리, 매칭, 이분 그래프의 독립집합 등 다양한 조합 구조의 열거 알고리즘이 개선된다. 또한 0/1-폴리토프 $\{x\in\mathbb{R}^n\mid Ax\leq b\}$의 꼭짓점 열거 문제에 대해 $\mathcal{O}(t_{\mathrm{LP}})$ amortized delay 알고리즘을 얻어, 1998년 Bussieck–Lübbecke의 $\mathcal{O}(t_{\mathrm{LP}}\,n)$ 결과를 대폭 개선한다.
technique: 선형 최적화를 블랙박스로 활용하는 Hamilton path 알고리즘의 재설계를 통해 $\log n$ 오버헤드를 제거하고 상수 인수 amortized delay를 달성.

title: Ideal Gårding polynomials
abstract: We introduce ideal Gårding polynomials, a convexity-enhanced subclass of Gårding polynomials whose Gårding components are recursively convex under partial differentiation. This class strictly contains real stable polynomials and, after translation and homogenization, lies in the Lorentzian class.   Our main result is that ideal Gårding polynomials still admit a robust structure theory despite this additional convexity: they are preserved under polarization, satisfy natural closure properties, and support a linear preserver theory. A key contribution of this paper is a universal model for univariate Gårding polynomials, described by monotone root sequences and equivalently by volume polynomials of Pitman--Stanley polytopes. We establish quotient concavity, and Newton--Maclaurin type inequalities, which leads to the polarization theorem, and suggests further connections with convex geometry and Lorentzian polynomials.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 Gårding 다항식의 볼록성 이론을 다루며, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid와 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 Gårding 다항식의 하위 클래스인 'ideal Gårding polynomials'를 도입하며, 이들의 Gårding 성분이 편미분 하에서 재귀적으로 볼록함을 특징으로 한다. 주요 결과로 polarization 보존, 자연스러운 닫힘 성질, 선형 보존자 이론을 확립하고, 단변수 Gårding 다항식의 보편적 모형을 단조 근 수열 및 Pitman–Stanley polytope의 부피 다항식으로 기술한다. 또한 quotient concavity와 Newton–Maclaurin형 부등식을 증명하여 Lorentzian 다항식 및 볼록 기하와의 연결을 시사한다.
technique: 단조 근 수열과 Pitman–Stanley polytope의 부피 다항식을 이용한 보편적 모형 구성 및 polarization 정리 증명.

title: Revisiting the Stability of the Ingleton Inequality: A Tropicalization-Free Approach
abstract: The classical Ingleton inequality is known to hold for entropic points under specific exact conditional independence constraints. Recently, Matveev and Romashchenko (2026) investigated the stability of these implications, quantifying the extent to which the Ingleton inequality can be violated when a group of conditional mutual information terms is small but non-zero. While their proofs relied fundamentally on the complex framework of tropical probability spaces, we revisit these stability results using a completely tropicalization-free approach. By developing an alternative framework, we significantly streamline the underlying concepts and proofs, derive explicit error terms, and improve some estimates. Furthermore, we resolve an open problem posed in prior work by exhibiting a new infinite family of entropy inequalities that establishes the stability of the sum of two Ingleton expressions.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 정보 이론의 Ingleton 부등식 안정성에 관한 것으로, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid와 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 조건부 독립 제약 하에서 성립하는 고전적 Ingleton 부등식의 안정성을 재검토한다. Matveev와 Romashchenko(2026)의 열대 확률 공간 기반 접근을 대체하는 열대화 없는(tropicalization-free) 프레임워크를 개발하여 오차 항을 명시적으로 유도하고 일부 추정치를 개선하였다. 또한 두 Ingleton 식의 합의 안정성을 확립하는 새로운 무한 족의 엔트로피 부등식을 제시함으로써 선행 연구의 미해결 문제를 해결하였다.
technique: 열대 확률 공간 프레임워크를 사용하지 않는 대안적 접근법을 개발하여 명시적 오차 항을 갖는 엔트로피 부등식의 무한 족을 도출.

title: Some Integer Sequences Arising From Game Theory
abstract: A counting problem arising naturally from game theory leads to the problem of estimating the coefficients $t_{ij}$ of a particular bivariate rational function. Restricting to the diagonal sequences $t_{j+k,k}$ (with $k$ fixed) allows us to study these sequences using elementary one-variable methods.
relevance_reason: 게임 이론에서 비롯된 수열 계수 추정은 McMullen's problem의 볼록 위치·oriented matroid·점 배치와 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 게임 이론에서 자연스럽게 나타나는 계수 문제로부터 두 변수 유리함수 $t_{ij}$의 계수를 추정하는 조합 문제를 다룬다. 대각선 수열 $t_{j+k,k}$에 제한하여 단변수 기법으로 분석한다.
technique: 이변수 유리함수 계수의 대각선 제한(diagonal restriction)을 통한 단변수 분석

title: Edge complexity of graphs
abstract: Gupta and Iosevich introduced the edge complexity of a graph as the minimum Fourier ratio of its adjacency matrix over all vertex labelings and bounded it below by graph energy divided by the square root of twice the number of edges. We characterize equality for a fixed labeling: the Fourier transform of the adjacency matrix must have at most one nonzero entry in each row and column. This implies regularity, circulancy of every positive even power of an extremizing adjacency matrix, and a parity restriction on connected components, and it gives equality results for certain Laplacian spectral projectors. We construct equality cases from affine involutions on cyclic groups. Singer difference sets yield, for every prime power $q$, an equality-attaining $(q+1)$-regular graph that is not an abelian Cayley graph. We also establish Fourier-ratio estimates for weak, Cartesian, and strong graph products, including preservation of equality under weak products of coprime orders. We use Fourier-ratio recovery as a coding theorem to obtain entropy upper bounds for low-complexity adjacency matrices and complement them with a lower bound obtained by perturbing complete graphs. Finally, a concentration argument shows that if $Np_N/\log N\to\infty$ and $\limsup_{N\to\infty}p_N<1$, then $\operatorname{FR}_{\min}(G(N,p_N))$ is of order $N$ with probability tending to one.
relevance_reason: 그래프의 edge complexity와 Fourier 비율을 다루지만 McMullen's problem의 convex position, oriented matroid, 또는 combinatorial realizability와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 그래프의 edge complexity를 정점 라벨링에 따른 인접행렬의 최소 Fourier 비율로 정의하고, 이를 그래프 에너지로 하한 제시한다. 등호 달성 조건을 특성화하고, Singer difference sets와 affine involutions을 이용한 구성 예시를 제공하며, 그래프 곱(weak, Cartesian, strong products)에 대한 Fourier 비율 추정과 랜덤 그래프의 복잡성 농도 현상을 분석한다.
technique: Fourier 변환의 행렬 표현, 스펙트럼 해석(spectral projectors), 그리프 곱의 대수적 성질, 농도 논증(concentration argument).

title: Two problems on booksize and triangular edges in Nosal graphs
abstract: A graph $G$ with $m$ edges is said to be a Nosal graph if $ρ(G)>\sqrt{m}$. For a graph $G$, we write $bk(G)$ for its maximum book size and $τ(G)$ for the number of edges contained in triangles. Li, Liu and Zhang [J. Combin. Theory Ser. B 179 (2026) 219--249] proved that every $m$-edge Nosal graph satisfies $bk(G)> \frac{1}{24}\sqrt{m}$ and $τ(G) > \frac{1}{12}\sqrt{m}$. Recently, Zhai, Li and Lou [arXiv:2601.10163v2] proved that every $m$-edge Nosal graph satisfies $bk(G)> \frac{1}{9}\sqrt{m}$. In this paper, we establish the following result: Every $m$-edge graph $G$ with no isolated vertices and $ρ(G)\geq \sqrt{m}$ that is not isomorphic to any complete bipartite graph satisfies $bk(G)\geq\frac{ρ(G)}{3}$ and $τ(G)\geq ρ(G)$. As direct consequences, we answer a question of Li, Liu and Zhang [J. Combin. Theory Ser. B 179 (2026) 219--249] and confirm a conjecture of Li, Feng and Peng [J. Graph Theory 110 (4) (2025) 408--425].
relevance_reason: 본 논문은 그래프의 book size와 삼각형 간선 수에 관한 spectral graph theory 문제로, McMullen's problem의 convex position·oriented matroid·combinatorial geometry와 무관함.
summary: 본 논문은 Nosal 그래프(spectral radius $ρ(G)>\sqrt{m}$)의 book size $bk(G)$와 삼각형 간선 수 $τ(G)$에 대한 하한을 연구한다. 고립점이 없고 $ρ(G)\geq\sqrt{m}$이며 완전이분 그래프가 아닌 그래프에 대해 $bk(G)\geq\frac{ρ(G)}{3}$과 $τ(G)\geq ρ(G)$를 증명하여 선행 연구의 질문과 추측을 해결한다.
technique: Spectral graph theory(spectral radius)를 이용한 하한 분석.

title: HJ numbers revisited
abstract: We improve the bounds on the Hales-Jewett numbers to a tower of exponentiations. Earlier it was $WaW$ (that is, iterations of towers which are themselves iterated exponentiations). We improve the inductive step there (induction on the size of the alphabet, $|Λ|$) to 2-exponentiations, instead of towers. In the longer work in typing,   (A) We present this inductive step as a partition theorem in its own right; (but in this preliminary version we make it just serve the bound on HJ numbers).   (B) We shall deal with the density version of Hales-Jewett with similar bound.   We are also dealing with the Graham-Rothschild Theorem and the Affine Ramsey Theorem and the polynomial case, and give background.
relevance_reason: Hales-Jewett numbers는 Ramsey 이론의 조합론적 상수이며, McMullen's problem(볼록위치 점 배치, oriented matroid)과 직접적인 연결이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 Hales-Jewett 수의 상한을 개선하여 2-지수탑(2-exponentiations)으로 축소함. 알파벳 크기에 대한 귀납 단계를 tower 반복에서 2-지수 형태로 개선했으며, 밀도 버전(density version)과 Graham-Rothschild 정리, affine Ramsey 정리까지 다룸.
technique: 알파벳 크기에 대한 귀납법(induction on |Λ|)과 분할 정리(partition theorem)를 통한 상한 개선

title: Linear extremal bounds for a family of forbidden $0$-$1$ matrices
abstract: Fulek defined the $0$-$1$ matrix \[ L_3=\begin{pmatrix} 1&0&0&1&0\\ 0&0&0&0&1\\ 0&1&1&0&0 \end{pmatrix} \] and asked whether $\text{ex}(n,L_3) = O(n)$. We prove that every $r\times s$ $0$-$1$ matrix avoiding $L_3$ has at most $27r+2s$ $1$ entries. Fulek's general lower bound construction has $6n-8$ $1$ entries, so \[ 6n-8\leq \text{ex}(n,L_3)\leq29n \] for $n\geq5$. The same argument applies to an infinite family. If $Q_{a,b,k,\ell}$ is the light three-row matrix with column word $1^a3^k1^b2^\ell$, where $a,b,\ell\geq1$ and $k\geq2$, then \[ \text{ex}(r,s,Q_{a,b,k,\ell}) \leq\bigl(5(k-1)(4b+1)+a+b+\ell-1\bigr)r+2s. \] This verifies a conjecture of Pettie and Tardos on linear light patterns for an infinite family that includes the previously unresolved weight-five pattern $L_3$. The proof assigns matrix entries to edges of a bar $1$-visibility hypergraph, cuts gaps to control the multiplicity of these edges, and charges the cuts to a noncrossing graph on the rows.
relevance_reason: 본 논문은 금지된 0-1 행렬의 극값 문제로, McMullen's problem의 핵심인 점 배치, oriented matroid, 조합 기하학과 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 특정 0-1 행렬 $L_3$를 피하는 행렬의 1-항목 개수의 극값을 연구한다. $6n-8 \leq \text{ex}(n,L_3) \leq 29n$의 선형 상한을 증명하며, 일반적인 light 패턴 가족에 대해서도 선형 극값 경계를 제시한다.
technique: Bar 1-visibility hypergraph의 간선에 행렬 항목을 할당하고, 중복도를 제어하기 위해 gap을 자르며, 행(row)의 비교차(noncrossing) 그래프로 절단을 charge하는 방법.

title: Further thoughts on dimensions of posets
abstract: We recall the concept of the dimension of a finite poset $P$, and the longstanding conjecture that for all finite nonempty posets $P$ and $Q$, $\dim(P\times Q)\geq\dim(P)+\dim(Q)-2.$ We then note two other plausible inequalities, either of which would imply that one.   In the final section, writing $P\preccurlyeq P'$ if, for all $Q,$ $\dim(P\times Q)\leq\dim(P'\times Q),$ and writing $P\approx P'$ if $P\preccurlyeq P'$ and $P'\preccurlyeq P,$ we note some results and questions concerning these relations.
comment: This is an addendum to my paper at arXiv:2312.12615. 4 pages. Copy at https://math.berkeley.edu/~gbergman/papers/unpub/ or if I decide to publish it, https://math.berkeley.edu/~gbergman/papers/ , may be updated more frequently than arXiv copy
relevance_reason: Poset 차원과 곱의 조합론적 성질을 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 convex polytope, oriented matroid, 기하학적 실현가능성과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 유한 poset의 차원(dimension) 개념을 회상하고, 모든 유한 poset P, Q에 대해 $\dim(P\times Q)\geq\dim(P)+\dim(Q)-2$가 성립한다는 오랜 추측을 검토함. 이를 함의할 수 있는 두 개의 추가 부등식과, 곱의 차원 비교를 통한 poset 간 순서 관계를 제시함.
technique: Poset dimension의 순서 관계 정의 및 곱 구조에서의 부등식 분석

title: The number of perfect matchings in 3-connected planar graphs
abstract: A graph is matchable if it admits a perfect matching. Recently, Goedgebeur et al. asked whether there exists a constant $c<12$ such that infinitely many matchable planar $3$-connected graphs, each with exactly $c$ perfect matchings. We prove that every matchable planar $3$-connected graphs on at least 40 vertices has at least 12 perfect matchings, and this lower bound is sharp. This answers the question negatively.
relevance_reason: 완벽 매칭의 개수를 세는 문제이지만 McMullen's problem(일반 위치의 점 집합과 볼록 위치의 관계)과는 직접적 연관이 없음.
summary: 평면 3-연결 그래프에서 완벽 매칭의 개수에 관한 연구. 최소 40개 꼭짓점을 가진 완벽 매칭 가능 평면 3-연결 그래프는 항상 최소 12개 이상의 완벽 매칭을 가지며, 이 하한은 최적임을 증명.

title: Equivariant Schubert Calculus for Inverse Grassmannian Permutations
abstract: We give a Graham-positive expansion for the product of two double Schubert polynomials indexed by two inverse Grassmannian permutations. Surprisingly, the nonzero structure constants are double Schubert polynomials in two disjoint sets of equivariant variables. We also give a positive expansion for the product of two single Schubert polynomials indexed by a $321$-avoiding permutation (e.g., a Grassmannian permutation) and an inverse Grassmannian permutation. Unexpectedly, the nonzero structure constants are Edelman--Greene coefficients.
relevance_reason: Schubert calculus와 permutation 구조는 조합론적이나 McMullen의 문제(convex position, oriented matroid, acyclic reorientation)와 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 역 Grassmannian permutation(inverse Grassmannian permutation)으로 인덱싱된 이중 Schubert 다항식의 곱에 대해 Graham-positive 전개식을 제시한다. 구조상수가 동변 변수의 이중 Schubert 다항식으로 나타나며, 321-회피 permutation과 역 Grassmannian permutation의 곱에 대해서도 양의 전개식을 제공하는데 구조상수는 Edelman-Greene 계수이다.
technique: Equivariant Schubert calculus, double Schubert polynomials, Graham-positive expansions

title: Acyclic Poset Multiplihedra and their Quotients
abstract: Two families of polytopes underlie the combinatorics of associative operations. Associahedra and multiplihedra respectively capture the information in the operation itself and in the morphisms that respect that operation. The first applications of these polytopes, from Stasheff, were for modeling homotopy associative spaces and their homotopy homomorphisms. Later, lax and weak higher categories used both as the shapes of commuting diagrams. More recently, the associahedra have been generalized to versions based on graphs, and then to posets: the acyclonestohedra. Here we use the graph multiplihedra to define and realize new multiplihedra for the acyclonestohedra. Quotients of these are also studied, concluding with the interval polytopes of the order polytopes of posets.
relevance_reason: 이 논문은 결합적 연산의 조합론(associahedra, multiplihedra)을 다루며, McMullen 문제나 oriented matroid의 acyclic reorientation과는 직접적인 관련이 없다.
summary: 이 논문은 결합적 연산과 그 사상(morphism)을 모델링하는 두 다면체 족인 associahedra와 multiplihedra를 포셋(poset)으로 일반화한다. 그래프 기반 multiplihedra를 활용하여 acyclonestohedra에 대한 새로운 multiplihedra를 정의하고 실현하며, 이들의 몫(quotient)을 연구하여 포셋의 order polytope에 대한 interval polytope로 귀결된다.
technique: 그래프 multiplihedra를 이용해 acyclonestohedra에 대한 새로운 다면체를 구성하고, 그 몫 구조를 분석하는 조합론적·다면체론적 방법.

title: A positive answer to the Owings's sumsets question
abstract: The paper gives a positive answer to Owings's sumsets question. That is, it is shown that for any $2$-coloring of natural numbers, there is an infinite $B\subset \mathbb{N}$ such that $B+B$ is monochromatic. Meanwhile, some weighted forms of this result are also presented.
relevance_reason: 본 논문은 Ramsey 이론과 덧셈조합론(additive combinatorics)에 관한 것으로, McMullen's problem의 핵심인 convex position, oriented matroid, combinatorial geometry와 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 이 논문은 Owings의 합집합 질문에 긍정적 답변을 제시한다. 즉, 자연수의 임의의 2-색칠에 대해 $B+B$가 단색(monochromatic)인 무한집합 $B\subset\mathbb{N}$이 존재함을 보인다. 또한 이 결과의 가중형식(weighted forms)도 제시된다.

title: Products of simplices are canonically Ramsey
abstract: A set of points $C \subset \mathbb{R}^n$ is called canonically Ramsey if there is some set of points $S\subset \mathbb{R}^{n'}$ such that any colouring of $S$, using any number of colours, must contain either a monochromatic copy of $C$ or a rainbow copy of $C$. Mao, Ozeki, and Wang introduced this notion, showing that 30-60-90 triangles are canonically Ramsey. Since then, various other canonically Ramsey configurations have been identified. The author showed that cuboids are canonically Ramsey, while Ge, Shu, Xu, and Yu recently showed that simplices are canonically Ramsey. We extend both of these results, proving that all products of simplices are canonically Ramsey.
comment: 9 pages; minor edits and a revised argument for Lemma 6, results unchanged
relevance_reason: 단순한 기하학 구성의 Ramsey 특성을 다루지만, McMullen's problem의 핵심인 일반 위치 점 배치, oriented matroid, 실현가능성과는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 논문은 canonically Ramsey 기하학적 구성의 개념을 확장하여, 단순형(simplex)의 곱(product of simplices)이 모두 canonically Ramsey임을 증명한다. 이는 이전 결과인 cuboid와 단순형의 canonically Ramsey 특성을 통합·일반화한 성과이다.
technique: 조합론적 색칠 논증을 통해 모든 곱 단순형 구성에서 단색 또는 rainbow 복사본의 존재를 보장.

title: The Endpoint Cardinality of Discrete Cube Skeleta
abstract: We determine the minimum order of a finite lattice set that contains a filled axis-parallel cube skeleton about every point of some $N$-point set of centers. For fixed integers $0\leq k<n$, the answer for $N$ centers is $N^{1-(n-k)/(2n^2)}$, up to constants depending on $n$ and $k$. Thornton proved every smaller exponent and gave a construction of this order; the endpoint lower bound was left open when $k\geq1$. Our proof combines a midpoint estimate, a labelled form of Shearer's projection inequality, and a strong induction that balances large and small radii without a dyadic pigeonhole loss. In particular, a lattice set containing a square boundary about each of $N$ centers has at least a constant times $N^{7/8}$ points.
relevance_reason: 이산기하학의 조합론적 최적화 문제이지만, McMullen의 문제(볼록위치의 점 배치, oriented matroid, realizability)와는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 유한 격자점 집합의 최소 크기를 결정하는 문제로, N개의 중심점 각각에 대해 축 평행 정육면체 골격(skeleton)을 포함하는 경우를 다룬다. 고정된 정수 0≤k<n에 대해 답은 N^{1-(n-k)/(2n²)}의 형태이며, 특히 N개 중심에 대한 정사각형 경계는 최소 Θ(N^{7/8})개 점을 필요로 한다.
technique: midpoint estimate, Shearer의 사영 부등식의 표지된(labelled) 형태, 그리고 dyadic pigeonhole 손실 없이 큰 반지름과 작은 반지름을 균형 있게 다루는 강한 귀납법.

title: Geometries admitting trialities for the symmetric and alternating groups
abstract: In incidence geometry, a triality is a symmetry cyclically exchanging triples of types of elements. Requiring geometries with trialities to satisfy standard regularity conditions makes their construction highly non trivial, and known examples are rare. In this paper, we present two infinite families of flag transitive, thin and residually connected geometries admitting trialities and no dualities with type preserving automorphism groups isomorphic to Sym(n) or Alt(n). We also develop general methods that extend to other settings. The residues of the two families are fundamentally different. In the first family, the maximal parabolics have constant size while in the other their size grows essentially linearly with the degree of the group.
relevance_reason: 기하학 구조의 대칭성과 군론에 관한 논문이지만 McMullen's problem(고차원 볼록 점 배치의 조합 구조)과는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 triality(삼원 대칭)을 허용하는 flag transitive한 얇은 기하(thin geometry)와 residually connected 기하를 구성한다. 이들 기하의 자기동형군이 대칭군 Sym(n) 또는 교대군 Alt(n)이고 duality를 갖지 않는 두 개의 무한 족을 제시하며, 두 족은 근본적으로 다른 잔여 구조(residue)를 가진다.
technique: 입사 기하(incidence geometry)에서 정규성 조건(regularity conditions)을 만족하는 triality 허용 기하의 systematic 구성

title: Block designs and systems of pairs
abstract: We propose a new way to construct one block design from another, thus linking some block designs in a new way. At the same time, we find relationships between block designs and systems of pairs. Some of these relationships are established, another one is conjectured.
relevance_reason: Block designs과 systems of pairs는 조합론의 고전 주제이나, McMullen's problem(고차원 convex position 점 배치와 oriented matroid)과는 직접 관련성이 없음.
summary: 논문은 한 block design으로부터 다른 block design을 구성하는 새로운 방법을 제안하고, block designs과 systems of pairs 사이의 관계를 탐구한다. 일부 관계는 증명되었고 일부는 추측으로 제시된다.
technique: 초록만으로는 핵심 기법을 특정하기 어려움.

title: Perfect matching in 4-partite 4-uniform hypergraphs
abstract: A balanced $k$-partite $k$-graph is a $k$-uniform hypergraph such that every edge intersects each partition class in exactly one vertex, where each partition class has size $n$. Lo and Markström (2014) determined the minimum vertex-degree threshold for perfect matchings in balanced \(3\)-partite \(3\)-graphs. In this paper, we determine the minimum vertex-degree threshold for balanced \(4\)-partite \(4\)-graphs. The proof relies on a reduction framework for \(k\)-partite \(k\)-graphs, through which the existence of a perfect fractional matching is converted into a finite-dimensional optimization problem.
relevance_reason: Perfect matching in hypergraphs는 조합론의 고전 주제이지만, McMullen's problem의 핵심인 일반적 위치의 점 배치, oriented matroid, chirality와는 직접 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 균형잡힌 4-분할 4-균일 하이퍼그래프에서 완벽한 매칭의 존재를 위한 최소 정점 차수 임계값을 결정한다. 증명은 분할 하이퍼그래프의 축소 프레임워크를 사용하며, 완벽한 분수 매칭의 존재를 유한 차원 최적화 문제로 변환한다.
technique: k-분할 k-그래프의 축소 프레임워크와 분수 매칭을 유한 차원 최적화 문제로 환원하는 방법.

title: Frustration index of a signed planar graph and the feedback vertex set
abstract: A feedback vertex set of a graph is a set of vertices whose deletion leaves a forest. In 2016, Dross, Montassier, and Pinlou conjectured that every planar graph $G$ of girth at least $g$ admits a feedback vertex set of size at most $e(G)/g$. In this note, we confirm this conjecture by connecting this problem with signed graphs. The frustration index of a signed graph $(G,Σ)$ is defined as the minimum number of negative edges among all signatures on $G$ that are switching-equivalent to $Σ$. Equivalently, it is the minimum number of edges whose deletion results in a balanced subgraph of $(G,Σ)$. We show that the minimum size of a feedback vertex set of a planar graph is bounded above by the maximum frustration index over all signatures of the graph, and thereby provide a tight upper bound on the size of the minimum feedback vertex set, which resolves the conjecture of Dross, Montassier, and Pinlou (2016).
relevance_reason: Signed graph 와 oriented matroid 이론이 관련될 가능성이 있으나, 초록은 평면그래프의 feedback vertex set 과 signed graph frustration index 연결에만 집중하며 combinatorial geometry/convex position 문제와는 직접 연관성 없음.
summary: 논문은 평면그래프의 최소 feedback vertex set 크기가 모든 signature 에 대한 최대 frustration index 로 위로 유한되는 것을 보이며, 이를 통해 Dross-Montassier-Pinlou (2016) 추측—girth 가 $g$ 이상인 평면그래프 $G$ 는 크기 최대 $e(G)/g$ 의 feedback vertex set 을 갖는다—을 증명한다. Signed graph 의 frustration index 는 balanced subgraph 를 남기는 최소 음수 간선 수로 정의된다.
technique: Signed graph 의 switching-equivalence 와 frustration index 개념을 이용한 feedback vertex set 문제의 재해석.

title: Spectral and Additive Combinatorial Methods for Cycles and Absorbing Sets in Lifted-Product Quantum LDPC Codes
abstract: The finite-length performance of quantum low-density parity-check (LDPC) codes under iterative decoding is governed by small substructures of the Tanner graph, principally short cycles and absorbing sets. While the classical theory of these substructures for quasi-cyclic codes is well developed through discrete Fourier transform (DFT) methods, these tools do not directly address the two-block tensor structure $H_X = [\,\widetilde{H}_1 \mid I \otimes \widetilde{B}^T\,]$ of the lifted-product (quasi-cyclic generalised hypergraph product, QC-GHP) codes that dominate current quantum LDPC constructions.   In this paper we develop a quantum-specific spectral framework that exploits this structure. At its core is a DFT block-diagonalisation of $H_X H_X^T$ that reduces moment-trace and cycle computations from an $(r_1\ell)\times(r_1\ell)$ matrix to a sum of $\ell$ small $r_1\times r_1$ Hermitian matrices, with the second block entering only as a scalar shift. From this result we derive a closed-form $4$-cycle count for generalised bicycle codes via additive energies, a joint Sidon characterisation of girth $6$ in the spirit of Fossorier's classical criterion, a Fourier expression for the number of $(3,3)$ elementary absorbing sets in column-weight-$3$ codes via the Wang-Dolecek-Wesel triangle bijection, and a lower bound on stopping-set sizes using the expander mixing lemma.
relevance_reason: 양자 LDPC 부호의 부호 이론과 spectral 방법에 관한 논문으로, McMullen's problem의 기하학적·조합론적 구조(convex position, oriented matroid, 점 배치)와는 직접적 관련이 없음.
summary: 본 논문은 lifted-product 양자 LDPC 부호의 유한 길이 성능을 지배하는 짧은 사이클(cycle)과 흡수 집합(absorbing set)을 분석한다. DFT 블록 대각화를 통해 $H_X H_X^T$의 moment-trace와 사이클 계산을 축소하고, 일반화된 bicycle 부호의 4-사이클 개수, girth 6 특성화, 그리고 정지 집합(stopping set) 하한을 도출한다.
technique: DFT 블록 대각화와 additive combinatorics(Sidon 특성화, Wang-Dolecek-Wesel 삼각형 전단사, 확장자 혼합 보조정리)를 양자 부호 구조에 적용한 spectral framework.
